dungeon.safe_haven: You find a safe haven to rest!
dg.cat.corridor.d: A narrow corridor winds between walls of stacked bones, each skull facing outward as if watching your passage. Centuries of dust coat every surface, disturbed only by your footsteps.
dg.cat.corridor.a: The air is thick and stale. Cobwebs brush your face like ghostly fingers.
dg.cat.chamber.d: Stone sarcophagi stand in orderly rows, their carved lids depicting the noble dead within. Faded tapestries hang in tatters from the walls, their stories lost to time.
dg.cat.chamber.a: You hear faint scratching from within one of the coffins. Probably just settling stone. Probably.
dg.cat.hall.d: A grand hall where skeletal remains sit enthroned in ceremonial poses, their empty eye sockets fixed on an altar at the far end. Tarnished silver chains drape between the pillars.
dg.cat.hall.a: Candles that should have burned out centuries ago still flicker with pale blue flame.
dg.cat.shrine.d: A crumbling altar stands before a defaced statue - perhaps one of the Old Gods, their name scratched away by fearful hands. Seven candles once burned here, now melted to nothing.
dg.cat.shrine.a: The Ocean's whispers seem louder near old shrines. The dead remember what the living forget.
dg.cat.crypt.d: The ornate tomb of a forgotten lord dominates this chamber. Gold leaf still clings to the walls despite centuries of decay. A broken sword lies atop the sarcophagus.
dg.cat.crypt.a: This person was important once. Now they are bones and dust, like all the rest.
dg.cat.alcove.d: A small alcove carved into the stone holds a simple shrine where mourners once knelt. Dried flowers crumble at your touch, their scent long faded to memory.
dg.cat.alcove.a: Names are carved into the walls here - hundreds of them, each a life now ended.
dg.sew.corridor.d: Murky water flows sluggishly through this brick-lined tunnel. The smell is overwhelming - a cocktail of decay and things best left unnamed. Rusted grates line the floor.
dg.sew.corridor.a: Something moves in the water beside you. Probably just rats. You tell yourself it's just rats.
dg.sew.chamber.d: Several massive pipes converge here, creating a domed chamber of slick brick and corroded iron. The constant dripping creates an unsettling rhythm.
dg.sew.chamber.a: The walls are coated with something that glistens in your torchlight. Best not to touch it.
dg.sew.hall.d: An old workers' area, now abandoned to darkness and decay. Rusted tools hang on pegs, and a rotted workbench lies overturned. Someone lived here once - a bedroll sits in the corner.
dg.sew.hall.a: The city above has forgotten this place exists. So have the maps.
dg.sew.shrine.d: Those banished from society built a rough shrine here, deep in the filth. Crude symbols are painted on the walls in substances you'd rather not identify.
dg.sew.shrine.a: Even the forsaken need gods. Perhaps especially the forsaken.
dg.sew.crypt.d: The sewers broke through into this ancient crypt long ago. Water-logged coffins float in the murk, their contents thankfully hidden beneath the surface.
dg.sew.crypt.a: The dead here have no rest. The water keeps them company in their corruption.
dg.sew.alcove.d: A hidden alcove where someone stored contraband. Rotted crates still hold rusted weapons and moldy cloth. A skeleton slumps in the corner, a knife in its ribs.
dg.sew.alcove.a: Whatever deal went wrong here, both parties lost.
dg.cav.corridor.d: The natural stone walls twist and turn, carved by water over countless millennia. Phosphorescent fungi cling to the damp surfaces, casting an ethereal blue glow.
dg.cav.corridor.a: The tunnel breathes - a gentle draft flows past you, suggesting vast spaces beyond.
dg.cav.chamber.d: Magnificent crystal formations jut from every surface - floor, walls, and ceiling alike. They catch your light and scatter it into rainbow fragments across the stone.
dg.cav.chamber.a: The crystals hum with a frequency you feel in your teeth. Something sleeps within them.
dg.cav.hall.d: The ceiling vanishes into darkness far above. Stalactites hang like the teeth of some enormous beast, dripping endlessly into pools of crystal-clear water below.
dg.cav.hall.a: Your footsteps echo for what seems like forever. You are very small here.
dg.cav.shrine.d: Natural pillars form a perfect circle, older than any civilization. Carvings depict waves rising from an endless ocean, and figures that might be the Old Gods before they had names.
dg.cav.shrine.a: Manwe himself once stood in places like this, before the first forgetting. The stone remembers.
dg.cav.crypt.d: Figures stand frozen in stone - ancient travelers caught by some geological process and preserved forever. Their expressions are peaceful. Perhaps death was quick.
dg.cav.crypt.a: The cave has claimed them. In time, it will claim everything.
dg.cav.alcove.d: A small grotto holds a pool of impossibly clear water. Glowing creatures drift lazily beneath the surface, their light painting rippling patterns on the ceiling.
dg.cav.alcove.a: The water looks pure. Refreshing. But nothing that lives here should be touched.
dg.ruin.corridor.d: Crumbling pillars line what was once a grand corridor. Faded murals depict scenes of a civilization at its height - festivals, coronations, and rituals whose meaning is now lost.
dg.ruin.corridor.a: Your torch illuminates fragments of former glory. Each step crunches on fallen stone.
dg.ruin.chamber.d: Strange symbols cover the floor in concentric circles, their meaning forgotten but their power still palpable. The ceiling is painted with stars in constellations that no longer exist.
dg.ruin.chamber.a: The air crackles with residual energy. Whatever was summoned here left its mark.
dg.ruin.hall.d: Towering shelves of rotted books and crumbling scrolls stretch to the vaulted ceiling. Some texts still glow faintly with preserved enchantments.
dg.ruin.hall.a: Whispers seem to emanate from the books themselves - knowledge desperate to be remembered.
dg.ruin.shrine.d: Seven alcoves once held statues of the Old Gods - Manwe's drops of essence, separated from the Great Ocean. Most lie shattered, but one remains: a figure weeping eternal stone tears.
dg.ruin.shrine.a: The Seven Seals were forged in temples like this. Some say the gods' true power still sleeps within.
dg.ruin.crypt.d: The builders who created this place were buried with their greatest works. Intricate automatons stand guard, frozen mid-motion, their power sources long depleted.
dg.ruin.crypt.a: Such knowledge, such craft - lost to time and hubris.
dg.ruin.alcove.d: A small workspace where a scholar once recorded the events of their age. The desk is covered in dust, but a single unfinished manuscript remains, the ink still legible.
dg.ruin.alcove.a: The last words read: 'They are breaking through the wards. May the gods have mercy on—'
dg.demon.corridor.d: The walls are constructed entirely of fused bones - thousands of them, packed and melted together into a grotesque architecture. Some still have scraps of flesh attached.
dg.demon.corridor.a: Screams echo from somewhere ahead. Or is it behind? The sound seems to come from everywhere.
dg.demon.chamber.d: Hooks and chains hang from the ceiling, some still bearing their grisly cargo. The floor is sticky with blood - some of it fresh. Implements of pain line the walls.
dg.demon.chamber.a: Something terrible happened here. Something terrible is still happening here.
dg.demon.hall.d: A massive pentagram is carved into the obsidian floor, its lines still glowing with hellfire. The walls are covered in contracts written in blood - souls bargained and claimed.
dg.demon.hall.a: The temperature drops suddenly. Your breath fogs. Something is aware of you.
dg.demon.shrine.d: This altar was built to worship pain itself. The stone is warm to the touch and pulses like a heartbeat. Offerings of suffering have stained it black.
dg.demon.shrine.a: Every moment of anguish that occurred here has been... saved. Treasured. Fed upon.
dg.demon.crypt.d: A yawning pit descends into darkness. From below comes the sound of moaning and the scratch of countless hands against stone. The dead here do not rest.
dg.demon.crypt.a: They were thrown in alive. Some of them are still falling.
dg.demon.alcove.d: Fleshy pods hang from the walls, pulsing with unholy life. Something is growing inside them - something that was once human. Something that remembers being human.
dg.demon.alcove.a: They can see you. They are so very hungry.
dg.ice.corridor.d: Walls of solid ice reflect your torchlight infinitely, creating a dizzying hall of mirrors. The cold here is beyond cold - it burns.
dg.ice.corridor.a: Your breath crystallizes instantly. Each exhale falls as tiny diamonds of ice.
dg.ice.chamber.d: Figures are preserved in the ice walls - adventurers, soldiers, creatures - their faces frozen in expressions of terror or determination. A gallery of the dead.
dg.ice.chamber.a: One of them blinks. You're almost certain one of them blinks.
dg.ice.hall.d: A vast frozen hall stretches before you, its ceiling lost in swirling snow that never stops falling. Ice sculptures of impossible beauty line the walls - or are they frozen victims?
dg.ice.hall.a: Something ancient sleeps beneath the ice. You can hear it breathing.
dg.ice.shrine.d: A shrine carved from a single massive sapphire-ice, dedicated to powers that predate the sun. The cold radiating from it would kill an unprotected mortal in minutes.
dg.ice.shrine.a: Winter is not a season here. Winter is a god, and this is its throne.
dg.ice.crypt.d: Niches carved into the ice hold perfectly preserved bodies - a king in his crown, a bride in her gown, a child clutching a toy. Centuries pass, but here nothing changes.
dg.ice.crypt.a: Death comes slowly in the cold. They had time to think, at the end.
dg.ice.alcove.d: Water once flowed here - you can see it frozen mid-cascade, an eternal waterfall caught in a single moment. Fish are suspended in the ice, forever swimming nowhere.
dg.ice.alcove.a: Time itself seems frozen. Perhaps it is.
dg.fire.corridor.d: This tunnel was carved by flowing magma long ago, its walls smooth as glass. Cracks in the floor glow cherry-red, and the heat makes breathing painful.
dg.fire.corridor.a: The mountain is alive. You can feel its heartbeat through the stone.
dg.fire.chamber.d: A river of molten rock flows through the center of this vast chamber, casting everything in hellish orange light. Stone islands float impossibly on the liquid fire.
dg.fire.chamber.a: The air shimmers with heat. One wrong step means an end more painful than any torture.
dg.fire.hall.d: Ancient smiths once worked here, using the mountain's own fire. Their tools still hang on the walls, too hot to touch. Half-finished weapons glow in the magma light.
dg.fire.hall.a: The things made here were not meant for mortal hands.
dg.fire.shrine.d: A shrine to fire itself, where sacrifices were cast into the flames to ensure the mountain's favor. The ashes of offerings past coat everything.
dg.fire.shrine.a: The fire demands feeding. It always demands feeding.
dg.fire.crypt.d: The dead were brought here to be returned to the fire that birthed all things. Urns of volcanic glass line the walls, each containing the ashes of a life.
dg.fire.crypt.a: From fire we came. To fire we return.
dg.fire.alcove.d: A small grotto of natural obsidian, its surfaces reflecting the distant magma glow. Someone has carved prayers into the glass - prayers for survival, for mercy, for death.
dg.fire.alcove.a: The glass remembers. It was liquid once. It felt the mountain's rage.
dg.void.corridor.d: This corridor exists in defiance of geometry. The walls meet at angles that hurt to look at. The floor and ceiling sometimes switch places when you're not watching.
dg.void.corridor.a: Gravity is more of a suggestion here. Your sanity is actively opposed.
dg.void.chamber.d: Reality has given up in this place. Up is down. Inside is outside. You can see yourself from angles that should be impossible. You wave, and you wave back.
dg.void.chamber.a: You're not sure you're still you. You're not sure 'you' means anything here.
dg.void.hall.d: Portraits line the walls - but the subjects are concepts, not people. You see paintings of Fear, of Loss, of That Feeling When You Can't Remember A Word.
dg.void.hall.a: The paintings watch you. The paintings ARE watching.
dg.void.shrine.d: This shrine predates the Seven. It honors an eighth Old God - one that Manwe erased from memory itself. The altar holds no statue, only an outline where existence should be.
dg.void.shrine.a: Some waves were never meant to separate from the Ocean. Some chose to forget themselves entirely.
dg.void.crypt.d: The dead here are not bodies but ideas - the crypt holds the corpses of Purpose, of Hope, of the belief that things might be okay. They decompose slowly into chaos.
dg.void.crypt.a: When enough meaning dies, even reality begins to rot.
dg.void.alcove.d: Impossibly, this small space is normal. The walls are just walls. The floor stays down. It feels wrong now - the normalcy is the aberration.
dg.void.alcove.a: You could stay here forever. You could become the new occupant of this tiny sanity.
dg.merchant.d: A hidden alcove where a merchant has set up shop, seemingly unbothered by the dangers.
dg.merchant.a: Exotic goods glitter in the lamplight. How does he survive down here?
dg.default.a: The darkness presses in around you.
dg.mystery.cat.d: Skeletal arms protrude from the walls in strange formations.
dg.mystery.cat.a: A cryptic inscription on the wall reads: 'The dead remember.'
dg.mystery.ruin.d: Faded symbols cover the walls, remnants of ancient magic long dormant.
dg.mystery.ruin.a: The air feels charged with residual energy.
dg.mystery.cav.d: Massive crystals of different colors jut from the walls and floor.
dg.mystery.cav.a: They emit a soft hum that resonates in your chest.
dg.mystery.demon.d: Dark altars line the walls, stained with the offerings of ages past.
dg.mystery.demon.a: The demons who once worshipped here are long gone.
dg.mystery.default.d: An unusual room with ancient markings and unfamiliar architecture.
dg.guard.cat.d: Carved stone guardians flank the passage, their eyes seeming to follow you.
dg.guard.cat.a: Whatever they once protected, they have long since failed.
dg.guard.ruin.d: A weathered stone face is carved into the archway, its features worn smooth by time.
dg.guard.ruin.a: Ancient wisdom once dwelt here. Now only silence remains.
dg.guard.void.d: The darkness here seems to have weight and presence.
dg.guard.void.a: You feel observed, but nothing challenges your passage.
dg.guard.default.d: An ornate archway marks the entrance to this passage.
dg.guard.default.a: Whatever wards once protected it have long since faded.
dg.danger.ruin.d: Pressure plates and wall slots hint at defenses that may have once been deadly.
dg.danger.ruin.a: The mechanisms have rusted. The traps are long disabled.
dg.danger.demon.d: Dark stains on the walls suggest this corridor has seen much violence.
dg.danger.demon.a: The echoes of past screams seem to linger.
dg.danger.default.d: This corridor shows signs of past dangers - broken mechanisms and scattered bones.
dg.danger.default.a: Whatever threats existed here have been overcome by time.
dg.vault.cat.d: Behind a false wall lies a chamber where the faithful stored treasures meant for the afterlife. Ancient offerings to the Old Gods rest untouched - gold coins bearing faces of forgotten kings, chalices that once held sacramental wine.
dg.vault.cat.a: The dead believed these treasures would follow them back to the Ocean. They were wrong about the gold, but perhaps right about the journey.
dg.vault.sew.d: A hidden vault beneath the city's refuse, where criminals stored their ill-gotten gains. Someone carved prayers to Manwe on the walls - even thieves seek redemption.
dg.vault.sew.a: The stench cannot reach this room. Neither, it seems, can justice.
dg.vault.cav.d: A natural geode formation conceals a chamber of breathtaking beauty. Ancient crystals pulse with the same light that illuminated the world before the first forgetting.
dg.vault.cav.a: These crystals remember what the world has forgotten. Some say they are solidified drops of the Ocean itself.
dg.vault.ruin.d: This treasury was sealed before the gods fell. Seven pedestals hold artifacts of immense power - one for each Old God, each drop of Manwe's essence that chose to forget itself.
dg.vault.ruin.a: A Seal may rest here. Or perhaps just the memory of one.
dg.vault.demon.d: A demon prince's personal collection - cursed artifacts, stolen souls trapped in jars, and things taken from the faithful. The corruption here is thick enough to taste.
dg.vault.demon.a: Every treasure here was someone's hope. Every gold coin paid for someone's despair.
dg.vault.ice.d: Frozen in eternal ice, treasures from a civilization that worshipped Winter as an Old God. They believed the cold would preserve them until the Ocean reclaimed all things.
dg.vault.ice.a: They are still waiting. The ice does not melt. The Ocean has not come for them yet.
dg.vault.fire.d: The mountain's fire guards this chamber where master smiths stored their greatest works. Weapons forged in magma, blessed by prayers to the fire that burns at creation's heart.
dg.vault.fire.a: The fire that made these treasures is the same fire that will unmake the world. Creation and destruction are the same wave.
dg.vault.void.d: This vault contains treasures that no longer exist - ideas abandoned, possibilities foreclosed, paths untaken. They are here because the Void remembers everything reality forgot.
dg.vault.void.a: Take what you need. These things were never truly yours, but then again, nothing is.
dg.vault.default.d: A hidden chamber filled with treasures that someone went to great lengths to conceal. The seals bear symbols of the Old Gods.
dg.vault.default.a: What was worth hiding from the world? What secrets do these walls keep?
dg.lore.cat.d: Shelves of burial records and death rites line this ossuary annex. Among the lists of the deceased, you find fragments of older texts - prayers written before men knew what they were praying to.
dg.lore.cat.a: Every name recorded here was once a wave in the Ocean. Every death, a return to the source.
dg.lore.sew.d: Records deemed too dangerous for public libraries were dumped here and forgotten. Heretical texts about the Ocean's true nature, banned histories of the Old Gods' fall.
dg.lore.sew.a: Truth flows downward like water. The things the world discards, the sewers remember.
dg.lore.cav.d: Cave paintings older than language cover these walls - images of an endless Ocean, of waves becoming flesh, of the moment the first soul forgot it was water.
dg.lore.cav.a: The first artists knew the truth. They painted it where the stone would remember forever.
dg.lore.ruin.d: Crystalline tablets preserve memories from before the Seven Seals were forged, before Manwe's sorrow split the Ocean into separate beings. Each tablet pulses with knowledge that could shatter a mind unprepared for truth.
dg.lore.ruin.a: The scholars who wrote these knew they were waves. They chose to forget anyway, so their knowledge could be separate. Could be... theirs.
dg.lore.demon.d: Demons collect knowledge like mortals collect gold. These books are bound in skin, written in blood, and contain truths about the corruption that seeps between the cracks of reality.
dg.lore.demon.a: The demons learned something from the Void. Something about what happens when waves refuse to return to the Ocean.
dg.lore.ice.d: Frozen scrolls and ice-encased tablets contain the wisdom of a civilization that understood the cycle of death and return. They wrote about the 'Great Thaw' - when all ice would melt back into the Ocean.
dg.lore.ice.a: They believed cold was a form of remembering. When things freeze, they stop changing. Stop forgetting.
dg.lore.fire.d: Records inscribed on stone tablets that survived the mountain's fury. Fire-worshippers who knew the mountain's heart was connected to something older - the first flame of creation itself.
dg.lore.fire.a: The volcano is a wound in the world. Through it, one can glimpse what lies beneath all reality.
dg.lore.void.d: Books float in the void, their pages filled with words that haven't been thought yet, histories of events that never happened, futures that were abandoned. One tome catches your eye: 'What the Wave Forgot.'
dg.lore.void.a: In the Void, all possibilities exist. Even the ones the Ocean chose not to dream.
dg.lore.default.d: Ancient texts and carved stones preserve knowledge from a forgotten age. Prayers to the Old Gods, meditations on the Ocean's nature, maps of places that no longer exist.
dg.lore.default.a: Here lie pieces of truth that the world has tried to forget. But forgetting is what made the world.
dg.meditate.cat.d: Among all this death, someone created a place for reflection. Cushions still hold the impressions of those who sat here, contemplating mortality. A single candle burns eternally, its flame the pale blue of souls departing.
dg.meditate.cat.a: Death is not an ending, the walls seem to whisper. It is a return. Close your eyes and feel the Ocean waiting.
dg.meditate.sew.d: Someone transformed this forgotten corner into a place of peace. Clean water trickles from a crack in the wall, and moss grows in patterns that seem almost deliberate - almost like waves.
dg.meditate.sew.a: Even in filth, purity exists. Even forgotten, the Ocean reaches out.
dg.meditate.cav.d: An underground spring feeds a perfectly calm pool, its surface a mirror of absolute stillness. The silence here is profound - the cave itself seems to hold its breath.
dg.meditate.cav.a: The pool remembers being the Ocean. If you look deeply enough, you might remember too. Sit. Breathe. Let the water show you what you've forgotten.
dg.meditate.ruin.d: A meditation circle surrounded by faded murals depicting the Old Gods in harmony - before they forgot they were one, before the separation that created suffering. Seven cushions remain, one for each god.
dg.meditate.ruin.a: The gods themselves would rest here, remembering for just a moment that they were all Manwe's dreams. You can feel their peace still lingering.
dg.meditate.demon.d: An impossible sanctuary in this realm of torment - a small bubble where demonic influence cannot reach. Someone powerful carved this peace from the surrounding corruption with their dying breath.
dg.meditate.demon.a: Even here, the Ocean's grace penetrates. The demons cannot corrupt what refuses to be separate.
dg.meditate.ice.d: A chamber of perfect crystalline ice, so cold that even thoughts move slowly. Those who meditate here can glimpse eternity - the unchanging truth beneath all change.
dg.meditate.ice.a: In perfect stillness, the illusion of separation fades. You are not frozen. You are simply... still. As still as the Ocean before it dreamed of waves.
dg.meditate.fire.d: A chamber at the volcano's core where the heat becomes something else - not burning but purifying. The stone here is warm as living flesh, and the magma's glow soothes rather than threatens.
dg.meditate.fire.a: The fire that destroys also transforms. Close your eyes and let it burn away what you only think you are.
dg.meditate.void.d: A bubble of absolute calm exists here, surrounded by the chaos of unreality. In this one place, you can think clearly. You can remember who you were before you forgot.
dg.meditate.void.a: In the center of madness, you find surprising clarity. Perhaps because madness is just another wave - and at the center of every wave is stillness.
dg.meditate.default.d: A peaceful alcove where weary souls can find rest and insight. The air is still, the light is soft, and the silence invites contemplation.
dg.meditate.default.a: The walls seem to absorb your troubles. Rest here. Dream of the Ocean that dreams of you.
dg.ante.cat.d: Skulls of a thousand warriors line the walls, their empty gazes fixed on the door ahead. Each was a hero once. Each thought they were different. Each became part of the collection.
dg.ante.cat.a: A Seal may lie beyond this door - or just another fragment of forgotten power. The dead do not warn, they only witness.
dg.ante.sew.d: The tunnels converge here, and with them, all the city's refuse - physical and spiritual. Something has grown fat on centuries of corruption, and it waits in the chamber beyond.
dg.ante.sew.a: When waves forget they are water, they can become... anything. Even this.
dg.ante.cav.d: The cave narrows to a final passage, the stone walls pulsing with a rhythm like a heartbeat. Something ancient has claimed this place - something that was here before the mountain rose.
dg.ante.cav.a: The earth remembers what walked before man. Before gods. Before the first forgetting.
dg.ante.ruin.d: Seven locks once barred this door - one for each Old God. Now the locks lie broken, the seals shattered. Whatever was imprisoned here has had centuries to grow in power.
dg.ante.ruin.a: Some prisons are not meant to hold forever. Some prisoners were meant to escape, when the time was right.
dg.ante.demon.d: The screaming reaches a crescendo here. Souls embedded in the walls reach out with translucent hands, trying to pull you back from the horror beyond. They failed. They all failed.
dg.ante.demon.a: The demon lords are waves that refused to return - that twisted their separation into eternal hunger. What you face is a corruption of what was meant to be divine.
dg.ante.ice.d: Ice so ancient it predates the world forms the walls here. Beyond the frozen portal, something stirs - something that has slept since the Ocean first dreamed of cold.
dg.ante.ice.a: Some waves froze rather than return. They became monuments to refusal. Now one awakens.
dg.ante.fire.d: The heat here would kill lesser beings instantly. The door ahead is made of solidified magma, and beyond it, the mountain's true heart beats with ancient fury.
dg.ante.fire.a: Fire was the first separation - heat from cold, light from dark. What dwells within remembers being part of the first flame.
dg.ante.void.d: Reality thins to nothing here. Through the door, you sense... yourself? Or perhaps what you will become. Or what you have always been. The Void does not distinguish between past and future.
dg.ante.void.a: You came seeking a Seal. You came seeking power. But power is just another form of separation, and separation is what created the Void in the first place.
dg.ante.default.d: The air grows heavy with power that radiates from beyond the door ahead. Ancient wards flicker and fail - whatever protections existed here have been overcome by what lies within.
dg.ante.default.a: Prepare yourself. There is no turning back. But then, there never was.
dg.arena.demon.d: A circular fighting pit with tiered stone seats surrounding it.
dg.arena.demon.a: Dark stains cover the floor. Many battles have been fought here.
dg.arena.cav.d: The cave opens into a circular chamber. Bones litter the floor.
dg.arena.cav.a: This natural formation has seen much violence over the years.
dg.arena.default.d: A circular chamber with high walls, clearly designed for battle.
dg.arena.default.a: The echoes of past conflicts still linger here.
dg.memory.cat.d: A sarcophagus bears your name - but carved centuries ago. The face etched in stone is yours, yet the style predates living memory. Inside lies... nothing. The body is gone. Because you are wearing it.
dg.memory.cat.a: You have died before. Many times. Each death was a return to the Ocean, each birth a new forgetting. But this time, something is different. This time, you're starting to remember.
dg.memory.sew.d: Graffiti on the wall tells a story you somehow know - a hero's fall from grace, a choice that led to exile, a name scratched out in shame. Your hand trembles. You know that name.
dg.memory.sew.a: Not all past lives were noble. Not all waves crest high before they fall. But even disgraced waves return to the Ocean.
dg.memory.cav.d: A pool of perfectly still water shows not your reflection but a memory - you, in another body, another time, standing at the edge of a vast Ocean. You were about to step in. You were about to go home.
dg.memory.cav.a: Why did you choose to forget? Why do any of us? Perhaps because forgetting is the only way to experience returning.
dg.memory.ruin.d: Faded murals depict your face - in different bodies, different eras, but unmistakably you. A warrior. A scholar. A ruler. A beggar. The same soul, wearing different masks throughout history.
dg.memory.ruin.a: The amnesia cracks. Something wants to be remembered. Someone wants to come home. And that someone... is you.
dg.memory.demon.d: A demon has captured one of your past selves - their soul imprisoned in a mirror, screaming silently. You remember now. You made a terrible choice in that life. The demons have been feeding on that guilt ever since.
dg.memory.demon.a: Even your sins are waves returning to the Ocean. Even your darkness is part of the light.
dg.memory.ice.d: Frozen in the ice is a scene from your past - a moment of perfect happiness, crystallized forever. You remember now. You chose to freeze this moment rather than let it end. But everything ends. Everything returns.
dg.memory.ice.a: You cannot hold onto waves. You cannot freeze the Ocean. But you can remember that you are both.
dg.memory.fire.d: In the magma's glow, you see yourself being unmade and remade - dying in fire, being reborn from it. This is where your soul was forged, life after life. The mountain remembers every version of you.
dg.memory.fire.a: Death is not destruction. It is transformation. And you have transformed so many times.
dg.memory.void.d: A mirror that doesn't show your reflection but something else - every version of you that ever existed, overlapping, merging, separating. You are not one wave. You are all the waves you've ever been.
dg.memory.void.a: In the Void, past and future collapse. You see yourself before the first forgetting, and after the final return. You have been here before. You have been everywhere before. You are the Ocean, dreaming.
dg.memory.default.d: This place triggers something deep in your mind. You've seen this before. You've been this before. The walls of forgetting thin, and something ancient stirs within you.
dg.memory.default.a: Close your eyes. Let it come back to you. Remember what you chose to forget. Remember who you really are.
dg.feat.cat.1.d: Ancient bones, picked clean long ago.
dg.feat.cat.2.d: A heavy stone lid covers this sarcophagus.
dg.feat.cat.3.d: This section of wall looks weak.
dg.feat.cat.4.d: Words carved into stone, mostly illegible.
dg.feat.cat.5.d: A corroded iron gate blocks a passage.
dg.feat.cat.6.d: A clay urn that might contain valuables. Or ashes.
dg.feat.sew.2.d: A mound of refuse. Something might be hidden in it.
dg.feat.sew.3.d: An old valve. Turning it might do something.
dg.feat.sew.4.d: A recent victim. They might have supplies.
dg.feat.cav.5.d: An unusual shape. Natural? Or carved?
dg.feat.ruin.3.d: Only the base remains. Something was here.
dg.feat.ruin.4.d: A concealed space behind a tapestry.
dg.feat.ruin.5.d: Gears and levers. An ancient device.
dg.feat.demon.2.d: A horrific contraption. Something is strapped to it.
dg.feat.demon.3.d: An altar radiating evil. Offerings sit upon it.
dg.feat.demon.4.d: Someone is locked inside, barely alive.
dg.feat.demon.5.d: A tear in reality. Looking into it hurts.
dg.exit.demon: A blood-red portal flickers to the {0}.
dg.hidden.vault: A faint draft suggests a hidden passage...
dg.hidden.cat: A loose stone conceals a narrow passage.
dg.hidden.sew: Behind the flowing water, a gap in the wall...
dg.hidden.cav: A crevice, barely visible in the crystal light.
dg.hidden.ruin: A concealed door, marked only by faded runes.
dg.hidden.demon: A portal of shadow, visible only to those who look with fear.
dg.hidden.default: A hidden passage reveals itself to careful eyes.
dg.boss.cat.d: A massive chamber dominated by a throne made entirely of bones. Something ancient stirs.
dg.boss.sew.d: The stench is overwhelming. Something massive has made this place its home.
dg.boss.cav.d: A giant crystal dominates the room, pulsing with malevolent energy.
dg.boss.ruin.d: The final chamber, sealed for millennia. You have awoken what sleeps within.
dg.boss.demon.d: Chains rattle. The floor is a carpet of tortured souls. The demon lord awaits.
dg.boss.ice.d: Ice so cold it burns. A massive figure frozen in the wall begins to crack free.
dg.boss.fire.d: A river of magma encircles an obsidian platform. A creature of fire rises.
dg.boss.void.d: This is it. The heart of madness. Reality itself screams.
dg.boss.default.d: A powerful presence fills this room.
dg.treasure.d: A chamber filled with glittering treasure, watched over by fearsome guardians who will fight to the death to protect their hoard.

healer.shopkeeper_mood: {0} The Fat is sitting at his desk, reading a book.
healer.mira_teaser1: A young woman kneels beside an injured traveler, carefully tending
healer.mira_teaser2: his wounds. She's good at it. You can tell she's done this many times.
healer.alignment_discount: Your {0} alignment grants you a {1}% discount!
healer.already_full: "{0}, you are already at full health," {1} says with a shrug.
healer.how_much_hp: "How much HP would you like restored?"
healer.base_cost_info: Base cost is {0} gold per HP restored.

castle.mail_body_1:
Your Majesty,

The treasury report for this quarter shows steady growth.
Our financial situation remains stable.

Your humble servant.
castle.mail_body_2:
Your Highness,

The people speak highly of your rule.
Morale in the kingdom is good.

Long live the Crown!
castle.mail_body_3:
Most Noble Sovereign,

A delegation from a distant land requests an audience.
They bring gifts and proposals of trade.

Awaiting your decision.
castle.mail_body_4:
My Liege,

The castle walls require maintenance.
I recommend allocating funds for repairs.

Your faithful steward.
castle.mail_body_5:
Your Royal Majesty,

All is well in the realm.
The guards report no incidents.

May your reign be long and prosperous.

dormitory.desc3: the smell of sweat and cheap ale.
dormitory.desc4: A few snoring lumps stir under thin blankets.
dormitory.what_to_do: What would you like to do?
dormitory.sleep_warning: WARNING: Sleeping here leaves you vulnerable to attack!
dormitory.no_sleepers: No one is asleep right now.
dormitory.claim_bunk: You claim a free bunk and drift into uneasy sleep...
dormitory.awaken_refreshed: You awaken refreshed, ready for a new day of adventure.
dormitory.sleep_vulnerable: WARNING: You are vulnerable to attack while sleeping here!
dormitory.sleep_logout: Sleep here for the night and log out? (y/N):
dormitory.cant_afford: You can't afford even this flea-ridden bunk.
dormitory.claim_thin_blanket: You claim a bunk and pull the thin blanket over yourself...
dormitory.drift_uneasy: You drift into uneasy sleep... (logging out)
dormitory.slit_throat: Anyone could slit your throat in the night.
dormitory.no_vulnerable: No vulnerable sleepers in the dormitory.
dormitory.who_attack: Who do you attack? (number or name, blank to cancel):
dormitory.creep_toward: You creep toward {0}'s bunk, weapon drawn...
dormitory.steal_gold: You rifle through their belongings and steal {0} gold!
dormitory.leave_body: You leave {0}'s body in the bunk.
dormitory.leave_lifeless: You leave {0}'s lifeless body in the bunk.
dormitory.fought_off_sleep: {0} fought you off even in their sleep!
dormitory.too_righteous: You feel too righteous to cause such mischief today.
dormitory.no_one_disturb: There is no one to disturb.
dormitory.thunderous_shout: You let out a thunderous shout!
dormitory.wakes_furious: {0} wakes up furious and attacks you!
music_shop.performance: Hire a Performance, combat buffs for 5 fights
music_shop.talk_melodia_interested: Talk to Melodia  (she seems interested in your adventures)
music_shop.lore_songs: Lore Songs of the Old Gods
music_shop.atmo1: Instruments of every kind hang from the walls and ceiling — lutes, lyres,
music_shop.atmo2: harps, drums, and things you have no name for. The air itself seems to
music_shop.atmo3: hum faintly, as if the instruments are whispering to one another.
music_shop.state_inshop1: Melodia sits at the back, tuning a lute. Her apprentice Cadence
music_shop.state_inshop2: stands behind the counter, polishing a silver flute.
music_shop.state_inshop3: Cadence smiles. "Welcome! Looking to buy, or just to listen?"
music_shop.state_adv1: Cadence stands behind the counter, running the shop with quiet
music_shop.state_adv2: confidence. A hand-painted sign reads: "Melodia is out on an
music_shop.state_adv3: adventure. All services still available — she taught me well!"
music_shop.state_adv4: "She talks about you, you know," Cadence says with a grin.
music_shop.state_dead1: Cadence stands behind the counter alone. A dried flower rests
music_shop.state_dead2: beside a framed sketch of Melodia on the wall.
music_shop.state_dead3: "She'd want me to keep the music going," Cadence says quietly.
music_shop.state_dead4: "So that's what I do. What can I play for you?"
music_shop.bard_discount: As a fellow musician, you receive a 25% discount on performances.
music_shop.sr_inshop: Melodia and her apprentice Cadence are here.
music_shop.sr_adv: Cadence runs the shop. Melodia is out adventuring.
music_shop.sr_dead: Cadence keeps the music going in Melodia's memory.
music_shop.bbs_inshop: Cadence minds the counter. Melodia tunes a lute in back.
music_shop.bbs_adv: Cadence runs the shop. Melodia is out adventuring.
music_shop.bbs_dead: Cadence keeps the music going in Melodia's memory.
music_shop.no_instruments: "I'm afraid I don't have any instruments suitable for your level right now."
music_shop.bard_only: Only Bards can wield instruments in combat.
music_shop.seller_approve: {0} nods approvingly. "A fine choice! May it sing true in battle."
music_shop.perf_intro: {0} can play you a song whose power lingers for 5 combats.
music_shop.perf_tales: Each performance tells a different tale from the history of the realm.
music_shop.replace_buff: A new performance will replace the current one.
music_shop.notes_fade: The last notes fade. The room is quiet for a moment.
music_shop.buff_gained: The {0} stirs something in you. (+{1}% for {2} combats)
music_shop.already_traveling: Melodia is already traveling with you!
music_shop.cadence_handled: Cadence waves from behind the counter. "I've got things handled here!"
music_shop.cadence_portrait: Cadence glances at the portrait on the wall and looks away.
music_shop.party_full: Your party is currently full. Visit the Inn to manage companions.
music_shop.offer_stands: "The offer stands whenever you're ready. I'll be here."
music_shop.lore_dead: Ancient ballads Melodia passed down to Cadence before she fell.
music_shop.lore_adv: Ancient ballads Melodia taught Cadence before leaving on her adventure.
music_shop.lore_inshop: Ancient ballads about the seven gods who shaped this world.
music_shop.lore_unlock: Songs unlock as you encounter their subjects in the dungeon.
music_shop.lore_locked: ??? — You haven't encountered this being yet.
music_shop.lore_none: No songs available yet. Venture deeper into the dungeon...
music_shop.lore_not_unlocked: This song has not yet been unlocked.
music_shop.lore_stirs: Something stirs within you... a deeper understanding of the gods.
inn.drink_ale: Ale - Easy going, more rounds to survive
inn.drink_stout: Stout - A solid choice for serious drinkers
inn.drink_bomber: Seth's Bomber - Rocket fuel! Only the brave dare...

inn.game_bones: Skull and Bones (Blackjack with bone tiles, 2x payout)
temple.prophecies: The Prophecies of the Old Gods
weapon_shop.kicked_out1: The big trolls pick you up and throw you out!
weapon_shop.kicked_out2: Maybe you should be more careful about haggling next time...
weapon_shop.kicked_return: Press Enter to return to street...

weapon_shop.ambient_steel: Steel rings against steel somewhere in the back.
weapon_shop.ambient_whetstone: The slow grind of a whetstone fills the room.
weapon_shop.ambient_hammer: A hammer pounds away at an anvil in the smithy next door.
weapon_shop.ambient_oil: The sharp smell of oil and metal hangs in the air.
weapon_shop.ambient_blade: A blade is drawn from its scabbard and inspected with a soft whistle.
weapon_shop.shopkeeper_greeting: A fat troll stumbles out from a back room and greets you.
weapon_shop.align_discount: Your {0} alignment grants you a {1}% discount!

love_street.romance_stats: My Romance Stats - View your romantic history
love_street.date_dinner: Romantic Dinner (500g) - Fine dining and conversation
love_street.date_walk: Moonlit Walk (free) - Stroll together and hold hands
love_street.date_theater: Theater Performance (1000g) - Watch a show together
love_street.date_picnic: Picnic by the Lake (200g) - Quiet time in nature
love_street.date_dancing: Dancing at the Inn (300g) - Dance the night away
settlement.desc_small_1: A handful of rough shelters cluster in a clearing beyond the gates.
settlement.desc_small_2: Cookfire smoke rises lazily. The settlers eye you with cautious hope.
settlement.desc_medium_1: A growing community has taken root here. Rough-hewn buildings line
settlement.desc_medium_2: muddy paths. The sound of hammers and conversation fills the air.
settlement.desc_large_1: A bustling frontier settlement stretches before you. What began as
settlement.desc_large_2: a few tents is becoming a proper town, alive with purpose.
settlement.return_to_main: You head back through the gates to Main Street.
settlement.not_that_much_gold: You don't have that much gold!
settlement.contribute_success: You contribute {0} gold to the settlement.
settlement.no_services: No services available yet. The settlement needs more buildings!
settlement.tavern_desc_1: The settlers share a hearty meal with you by the tavern fire.
settlement.tavern_desc_2: You feel inspired and ready for battle.
settlement.shrine_spent: The shrine's healing power is spent for today. Return tomorrow.
settlement.already_full_hp: You are already at full health.
settlement.shrine_desc_1: The shrine tender guides you to a quiet alcove.
settlement.shrine_desc_2: Warmth spreads through you as your wounds mend.
settlement.palisade_desc_1: The settlement guards share their patrol techniques with you.
settlement.palisade_desc_2: You feel more aware of threats and better prepared to defend.
settlement.workshop_desc: The settlement craftsman examines your item carefully...
settlement.watchtower_report: The watchtower scouts report on Floor {0}:
settlement.special_floor_15: An ancient seal radiates power here.
settlement.special_floor_30: A seal awaits a worthy claimant.
settlement.special_floor_45: A seal shimmers in the darkness.
settlement.special_floor_60: An ancient seal hums with energy.
settlement.special_floor_80: A seal of tremendous power waits.
settlement.council_claimed_today: You've already claimed your share today. Come back tomorrow.
settlement.council_elder: The council elder counts out your share from the treasury.
settlement.market_desc: The settlers display their wares on rough wooden tables.
settlement.market_coming_soon: (Market stall trading coming in a future update!)
settlement.no_active_proposals: No active proposals. The settlers are focused on other work.
settlement.already_voted: You've already cast your vote on this proposal.
settlement.need_gold_endorse: You need {0} gold to endorse a proposal.
settlement.endorse_success: You endorse the proposal! Your influence sways the settlers.
settlement.oppose_success: You speak against the proposal. The settlers reconsider.
settlement.service_not_available: This service is not yet available.
settlement.arena_desc: You spar with the arena fighters, learning their aggressive techniques.
settlement.thieves_desc: The thieves share their secrets of finding hidden treasures.
settlement.mystic_depleted: The mystic circle's energy is depleted for today. Return tomorrow.
settlement.mystic_mana_desc: The mystic circle hums with power. Arcane energy flows into you.
settlement.mystic_hp_desc: The mystic circle pulses with restorative energy, mending your wounds.
settlement.prison_desc: The jailers teach you how to spot and avoid traps.
settlement.scouts_prompt: Which dungeon floor to scout? (scouts will check 3 floors):
settlement.scouts_report: The scouts fan out and report back:
settlement.library_desc: You spend time studying ancient tomes in the library.
settlement.herbalist_claimed: The herbalist has already given you a herb today. Come back tomorrow.
settlement.herbalist_max_carry: You're already carrying the maximum number of {0}.
settlement.herbalist_desc: The herbalist rummages through dried bundles and hands you something.
settlement.gambling_header: The Gambling Hall buzzes with dice rolls and cheers.
settlement.gambling_prompt: How much gold to wager? (0 to leave):
settlement.gambling_walk_away: You walk away from the tables.
settlement.gambling_win: The dice favor you! You win {0} gold!
settlement.oracle_intro: The veiled oracle speaks in a distant voice:
settlement.oracle_hint_0: The deeper you go, the stronger the rewards... and the dangers.
settlement.oracle_hint_1: Ancient seals wait on floors 15, 30, 45, 60, 80, and 99.
settlement.oracle_hint_3: Companions found in the Inn have their own quests and stories.
settlement.oracle_hint_4: The King's favor can be won... or taken by force.
settlement.oracle_hint_5: Some weapons carry enchantments that reveal themselves in battle.
settlement.oracle_hint_6: The settlement grows stronger with each building completed.
settlement.oracle_hint_7: NPC settlers build what their hearts desire. Different settlers, different towns.
settlement.oracle_hint_8: Herbs gathered from your garden can turn the tide of battle.
settlement.oracle_hint_9: There are multiple endings to discover. Will you become a god?
wilderness.intro_line1: Beyond the city gates, untamed lands stretch in every direction.
wilderness.intro_line2: Danger and discovery await those bold enough to venture forth.
wilderness.return_city: You return through the city gates.
wilderness.region_too_dangerous: The {0} is too dangerous for you. (Requires level {1})
wilderness.too_tired: You're too tired for another expedition today. Rest and try tomorrow.
wilderness.bonus_gold: You search the area and find {0} additional gold.
wilderness.eat_foraged_food: You eat the foraged food. (+{0} HP)
wilderness.already_healthy: A pleasant snack, but you're already healthy.
wilderness.medicinal_plant: The medicinal plant restores your health. (+{0} HP)
wilderness.discover_ruins: You discover ruins in the wilderness...
wilderness.ruins_search_or_leave: [S] Search for treasure   [L] Leave it alone
wilderness.ruins_gold_found: You find {0} gold hidden in the ruins!
wilderness.ruins_potion_found: You also find a dusty healing potion!
wilderness.ruins_trap: A hidden trap springs! You take {0} damage!
wilderness.ruins_picked_clean: The ruins have already been picked clean.
wilderness.ruins_leave: You move on, leaving the ruins undisturbed.
wilderness.traveler_sell_potion: The {0} offers to sell you a healing potion for {1} gold.
wilderness.traveler_shares_wisdom: The {0} shares wisdom of the wilds.
wilderness.traveler_lore_line1: "The deeper dungeon levels hold treasures beyond imagining,
wilderness.traveler_lore_line2: but the Old Gods sleep there. Tread carefully."
wilderness.traveler_shares_food: The {0} shares food and drink. (+{1} HP)
wilderness.traveler_nod_leave: You nod and continue on your way.
wilderness.shrine_discover: You discover a weathered shrine at the roadside.
wilderness.shrine_symbols: Ancient symbols glow faintly in the stone.
wilderness.shrine_warm_light: A warm light envelops you. Your wounds close and your mind clears.
wilderness.shrine_str: The shrine blesses you with strength. (+1 STR)
wilderness.shrine_dex: The shrine blesses you with agility. (+1 DEX)
wilderness.shrine_wis: The shrine blesses you with wisdom. (+1 WIS)
wilderness.shrine_xp: Ancient knowledge flows into you. (+{0} XP)
wilderness.shrine_peace: You feel a moment of peace, but nothing else happens.
wilderness.discovery_revisit_hint: (You can revisit this location from the Discoveries menu)
wilderness.no_discoveries_hint: Explore the wilderness to find hidden locations.
wilderness.revisits_exhausted: You've already revisited enough discoveries for today.
news.empty: The news board is empty. Nothing to report.
love_street.sr_desc: The air is thick with perfume and promise. Beautiful creatures beckon from doorways.
love_street.desc1: The air is thick with perfume and promise. Lanterns cast a warm, inviting glow
love_street.desc2: over the cobblestones. Beautiful creatures of all races beckon from doorways,
love_street.desc3: while well-dressed patrons move between the various establishments.
love_street.bbs_desc: Perfume and promise fill the air. Beautiful creatures beckon from doorways.
love_street.beauty_desc1: As you enter the worn-down old establishment at the end of Love Street,
love_street.beauty_desc2: you notice creatures of all kinds moving up and down the stairs,
love_street.beauty_desc3: each in the company of beautiful companions.
love_street.beauty_madam: A fat, ugly troll woman appears - Clarissa, the madam.
love_street.beauty_introduces: Clarissa introduces you to the courtesans:
love_street.cant_afford_courtesan: "Come back when you can actually afford me, peasant!"
love_street.hall_desc1: You enter the lobby of this grand and fashionable establishment.
love_street.hall_desc2: The furnishings are expensive, giving you the feeling of a luxury hotel.
love_street.hall_desc3: Subdued music adds to the pleasant atmosphere.
love_street.hall_giovanni: A slim man dressed in black approaches.
love_street.hall_hello: "Hello, I am Giovanni. What can I do for you today?"
love_street.hall_introduces: Giovanni introduces you to the gigolos:
love_street.gigolo_lack_funds: "I'm afraid you lack the funds," {0} says with a sigh.
love_street.disease_pain: As you leave, you start to feel pain in your nether regions!
love_street.disease_infected: By the gods! You've been infected with a venereal disease!
love_street.disease_rush: You rush to the Healer, crying for help...
love_street.disease_treatments: The monks give you foul-smelling potions and painful treatments.
love_street.disease_hp_halved: Your HP has been halved! Visit the Healer to cure this affliction.
love_street.mingle_nobody: There's no one around to mingle with right now.
love_street.mingle_already_flirted: You've already tried flirting with them this visit.
love_street.allure_surges: The Elixir of Allure surges through you...
love_street.need_drink_gold: You need {0} gold to buy a drink.
love_street.buy_drinks: You signal the barkeep and two drinks appear. {0} accepts gratefully.
love_street.over_drinks: Over drinks, you learn that {0} is {1}.
love_street.no_date_partner: You don't have anyone to take on a date.
love_street.no_date_hint: Try mingling and improving your relationships first!
love_street.who_date: Who would you like to take on a date?
love_street.could_not_find: Could not find {0} in town. They may have left.
love_street.where_take: Where would you like to take them?
love_street.need_date_gold: You need {0} gold for this date activity!
love_street.date_kiss: As the date ends, {0} leans in for a tender kiss.
love_street.passion_warmth: The Passion Potion's warmth spreads through you both...
love_street.gift_welcome: "Welcome, welcome! Looking for something special for someone special?"
love_street.gift_no_one: You don't know anyone well enough to give gifts to.
love_street.gift_meet_people: Try meeting and talking to people first!
love_street.gift_not_romantic: ({0} might not see this as romantic...)
love_street.gift_not_accept: ({0} might not accept this from you...)
love_street.gift_purchase: You purchase {0} and present it to {1}.
love_street.gift_walks_away: They walk away, leaving the gift behind.
love_street.gossip_crone: An ancient crone beckons you into a shadowy alcove.
love_street.gossip_no_gold: "No gold, no gossip!" Madame Whispers cackles.
love_street.gossip_affair: Word is {0} has been seen with {1}
love_street.gossip_available: "Looking for love? Let me see who's available..."
love_street.gossip_who_investigate: "Who do you want me to look into?"
love_street.gossip_dig_up: "Ah, {0}... let me dig up what I know..."
love_street.potion_crone: An old witch cackles as you approach her bubbling cauldron.
love_street.potion_already_charm: "You already have the charm flowing through you, dear!"
love_street.potion_charm_drink: You drink the shimmering pink liquid. Warmth spreads through you.
love_street.potion_charm_effect: You feel irresistibly charming! (+{0} CHA for this visit)
love_street.potion_already_allure: "You already have allure magic ready, dear!"
love_street.potion_allure_drink: You drink the golden elixir. Your eyes seem to sparkle with magic.
love_street.potion_allure_effect: Your next flirt will be absolutely irresistible!
love_street.potion_forget_drink: You pour the misty blue liquid into your partners' drinks.
love_street.potion_forget_effect: The jealousy of {0} partner{1} has been soothed!
love_street.potion_forget_wasted: None of your partners were jealous. The potion was wasted.
love_street.potion_already_passion: "You already have passion magic ready, dear!"
love_street.potion_passion_drink: You drink the deep red potion. Fire courses through your veins.
love_street.potion_passion_effect: Your next date will end with a guaranteed invitation to intimacy!

marketplace.atmo_desc1: A cavernous hall of polished stone, lined with glass display cases and
marketplace.atmo_busy: The air buzzes with haggling voices and the clink of coin purses.
marketplace.atmo_few: A few merchants stand behind their stalls, calling to passersby.
marketplace.atmo_empty: The stalls stand mostly empty today, dust settling on the counters.
marketplace.grimjaw_desc: , the half-orc auctioneer, looms behind the registry desk.
marketplace.grimjaw_slow: "Slow day. You selling or just wasting my time?"
marketplace.grimjaw_few: "Got a few things worth looking at. Browse the board."
marketplace.grimjaw_plenty: "Plenty of goods today! Step up, step up!"
marketplace.what_to_do: What would you like to do?
marketplace.bbs_empty: Grimjaw's auction hall stands mostly empty. "Slow day."
marketplace.board_empty1: The bulletin board is bare. A few old nails jut from the cork.
marketplace.board_empty2: Grimjaw shrugs. "Nothing posted. Come back later, or list something yourself."
