creation.difficulty.easy_selected: Easy mode selected - enjoy a relaxed adventure!
creation.difficulty.normal_selected: Normal mode selected - the classic Usurper experience!
creation.difficulty.hard_selected: Hard mode selected - prepare for a challenge!
creation.difficulty.nightmare_desc1: Death is permanent. Your save will be
creation.difficulty.nightmare_desc2: deleted if you die. No resurrections.
creation.difficulty.nightmare_confirm: Death is PERMANENT. Are you SURE? (y/N):
creation.difficulty.nightmare_sealed: Your fate is sealed. May the gods have mercy.
creation.difficulty.nightmare_wise: A wise choice. Select another difficulty.
creation.difficulty.invalid: Please choose E, N, H, or !.
creation.welcome_to_usurper: W E L C O M E   T O   U S U R P E R
creation.welcome_to_realm: W E L C O M E   T O   T H E   R E A L M !
church.holy_wards: The holy wards surrounding this sacred place repel those of dark alignment.
church.cleanse_soul: Perhaps confession at a neutral shrine could help cleanse your soul...
church.press_return: Press Enter to return to the street...
church.desc1: You stand in a magnificent cathedral with soaring arches and stained glass
church.desc2: windows casting colorful light across the stone floor. The air is filled
church.desc3: with the scent of incense and the soft murmur of prayers. Candles flicker
church.desc4: on the altar, and religious artifacts line the walls.
church.sr_desc: A magnificent cathedral with soaring arches and stained glass windows.
church.bishop_approves: {0} nods approvingly at your righteous presence.
church.bishop_concerned: {0} looks concerned about the darkness in your soul.
church.bishop_welcomes: {0} welcomes you to this sacred place.
church.donate_how_much: How much do you want to give to the Church?
church.donate_zero: The Church appreciates your presence, if not your generosity.
church.donate_no_gold: Scoundrel! You don't have that much!
church.donate_virtue: Your virtue and support from the Church increase.
church.donate_faith_gain: Your piety has been noted. (+{0} Faith standing)
church.blessing_pure: Your soul is in no need of salvation (lucky you).
church.blessing_how_much: How much do you want to give for a blessing?
church.blessing_no_offering: The Church cannot provide salvation without proper offering.
church.blessing_no_gold: You don't have that much gold!
church.blessing_cancelled: Your soul remains as it was.
church.blessing_contribution: Your contribution of {0} {1} gives you salvation.
church.blessing_ritual: {0} performs a sacred ritual over you.
church.blessing_faith: The Faith recognizes your devotion. (+{0} Faith standing)
church.heal_perfect: You are in perfect health, both body and soul.
church.heal_blessed: {0} blesses you for your good fortune.
church.heal_gods_watch: May the gods watch over you.
church.heal_not_needed: You don't need that particular healing.
church.heal_return_funds: Return when you have sufficient funds.
church.heal_wounds_close: Your wounds close and your strength returns!
church.heal_sight_restored: Your sight is restored! The world comes back into focus!
church.heal_plague_cured: The plague leaves your body! You feel purified!
church.heal_smallpox_cured: The smallpox is cured! Your skin clears!
church.heal_measles_cured: The measles fade away! You feel healthy again!
church.heal_leprosy_cured: The leprosy is banished! Your body is made whole!
church.heal_all_cured: Divine light fills your body! All ailments are cured!
church.heal_faith_wisdom: Your faith in divine healing grants you wisdom! (+{0} chivalry)
church.marriage_no_perform: The Church does not perform ceremonies for those already wed.
church.marriage_seeking: "Ah, seeking the blessed union of marriage!"
church.marriage_sacred: "This is one of the Church's most sacred ceremonies."
church.marriage_hearts_burn: "For marriage, both hearts must burn with love."
church.marriage_consult: "Let me consult the spirits and see where your heart stands..."
church.marriage_nearly_ready: "Ah, {0} is nearly ready! Keep courting at Love Street."
church.marriage_passion_stirs: "Passion stirs, but love has not yet bloomed. Visit Love Street."
church.marriage_need_nurturing: "These bonds need much nurturing before wedding bells ring."
church.marriage_no_connections: "I sense no romantic connections in your heart at all."
church.marriage_step1: 1. Visit Love Street [X] — compliments, drinks, dates, and gifts
church.marriage_step2: 2. Intimate scenes deepen bonds on both sides
church.marriage_step3: 3. Love potions at the Magic Shop [M] give a boost
church.marriage_step4: 4. Both you AND your partner must reach 'In Love' status
church.marriage_step_note: Note: Regular talking [0] only builds up to Friendship.
church.marriage_those_who_would: "I see there are those who would marry you:"
church.marriage_who_prompt: Who do you wish to marry? (Enter number or name, or Q to cancel):
church.marriage_not_among: "{0}" is not among those who would marry you.
church.marriage_only_love: You can only marry someone who is in love with you.
church.wedding_bells: The Church bells ring in celebration!
church.wedding_children: "May your union be blessed with children!"
church.wedding_love_corner: (Visit the Love Corner for intimate moments)
church.confess_leads: {0} leads you to a private confessional booth.
church.confess_speak: "Speak, my child, and unburden your soul."
church.confess_pure: "Your soul is pure, you have no need for confession."
church.confess_righteous: "Go forth and continue your righteous path."
church.confess_reduce: Confession can reduce your darkness by up to {0} points.
church.confess_prompt: Do you wish to confess your sins? (Y/N):
church.confess_return: "Return when you are ready to face your sins."
church.confess_begin: You begin to confess your sins...
church.blood_something_else: "Wait. There is something else. Something deeper."
church.blood_sense_blood: "I sense blood on your soul. Not just sin. Death."
church.blood_cost: "Blood absolution requires a donation of {0} gold."
church.blood_not_erase: "It will not erase what you've done. But it may ease the weight."
church.blood_hands: {0} places his hands on your head.
church.blood_shared: "The blood does not wash away. But the weight... the weight can be shared."
church.blood_remains: "The weight remains, then. Return when you are ready."
church.bishop_righteous: "Ah, a truly righteous soul stands before me!"
church.bishop_beacon: "Your good deeds shine like a beacon in the darkness."
church.bishop_continue: "Continue on your path of virtue, my child."
church.bishop_reward: "As a reward for your righteousness, accept this blessing!"
church.bishop_blessing_days: You receive a divine blessing for 3 days!
church.bishop_darkness_sense: "I sense great darkness in your soul, child."
church.bishop_redemption: "You must seek redemption before it's too late."
church.bishop_consider: "Consider making a donation or purchasing a blessing."
church.bishop_insist: "In fact, I insist you confess your sins immediately!"
church.bishop_force_confess: The Bishop strongly encourages confession. Confess now? (Y/N):
church.bishop_neutral1: "Welcome, child. Your soul walks the line between light and dark."
church.bishop_neutral2: "Choose your path wisely, for each deed shapes your destiny."
church.bishop_neutral3: "The Church stands ready to guide you toward righteousness."
church.bishop_wisdom1: "Charity given in secret is worth twice that given in public."
church.bishop_wisdom2: "A pure heart is more valuable than all the gold in the kingdom."
church.bishop_wisdom3: "Those who help others will find help when they need it most."
church.bishop_wisdom4: "Darkness flees from the light of good deeds."
church.bishop_wisdom5: "The path to salvation is paved with acts of kindness."
home.knock_at_door: An hour later, there's a knock at the door...
armor_shop.sell_prompt: Sell which piece? ([A]ll backpack, 0 to cancel):
armor_shop.no_sellable_armor: No sellable armor in your backpack.
armor_shop.autobuy_invalid: Invalid choice. Please enter Y, N, S, or C.
sysop.console_header: S Y S O P   C O N S O L E
anchor_road.desc_red_fields: The Red Fields stretch east, where warriors test their mettle.
anchor_road.desc_blood_glory: Blood and glory await those brave enough to enter.
anchor_road.bbs_desc: The Red Fields stretch east. Blood and glory await the brave.
anchor_road.invalid_choice: Invalid choice! Type 'look' to redraw menu.
anchor_road.no_fights_left: You have no player fights left today!
anchor_road.come_back_tomorrow: Come back tomorrow when you're rested.
anchor_road.scan_bounty_board: You scan the bounty board for wanted criminals...
anchor_road.no_bounties: No bounties available at this time.
anchor_road.fled_bounty: You fled the fight. The bounty remains uncollected.
anchor_road.bested_by_target: {0} bested you! The bounty remains uncollected.
anchor_road.no_team_gang_war: You must be in a team to participate in gang wars!
anchor_road.visit_team_corner: Visit Team Corner at the Inn to create or join a team.
anchor_road.no_team_fights: You have no team fights left today!
anchor_road.no_rival_teams: No rival teams found to challenge!
anchor_road.defeat_one_by_one: You must defeat their members one by one!
anchor_road.breath_recover: You catch your breath and recover {0} HP.
anchor_road.team_controls_town: * YOUR TEAM NOW CONTROLS THE TOWN! *
anchor_road.defeated_after: You were defeated after taking down {0} opponent{1}.
anchor_road.gauntlet_desc_1: Face 10 waves of increasingly dangerous monsters.
anchor_road.gauntlet_desc_2: Your health and mana carry over between waves.
anchor_road.gauntlet_desc_3: Survive all 10 to earn the title of Gauntlet Champion!
anchor_road.gauntlet_min_level: You must be at least level {0} to enter The Gauntlet.
anchor_road.need_gold: You need {0} gold to enter. You only have {1}.
anchor_road.come_back_later: You decide to come back another time.
anchor_road.gates_slam: The iron gates slam shut behind you.
anchor_road.crowd_roars: The crowd roars as you enter the arena...
anchor_road.catch_breath: You catch your breath... +{0} HP, +{1} Mana
anchor_road.flee_disgrace: You flee the arena in disgrace!
anchor_road.no_team_claim: You must be in a team to claim towns!
anchor_road.already_controls: Your team already controls this town!
anchor_road.no_controller: No team currently controls this town.
anchor_road.claim_prompt: Claim the town for your team? (Y/N):
anchor_road.town_claimed: * YOUR TEAM NOW CONTROLS THE TOWN! *
anchor_road.rule_wisely: Rule wisely, for challengers will come...
anchor_road.town_controlled_info: The town is currently controlled by: {0}
anchor_road.must_defeat_gang_war: To claim the town, you must defeat the controlling team in Gang War!
anchor_road.use_gang_war: Use the (G)ang War option to challenge them.
anchor_road.no_town_control: Your team doesn't control any town!
anchor_road.leave_town_open: This will leave the town open for other teams to claim.
anchor_road.abandoned_control: Your team has abandoned control of the town.
anchor_road.town_free: The town is now free for the taking...
anchor_road.approach_prison: You approach the forbidding prison walls...
anchor_road.guards_patrol: Guards patrol the perimeter, watching for trouble.
anchor_road.end_up_in_prison: You could end up in prison yourself if caught.
anchor_road.sneak_past_guards: You sneak past the guards and find a prisoner!
anchor_road.help_escape: You help them escape through a secret passage.
anchor_road.prisoner_thanks: The prisoner thanks you and disappears into the night.
anchor_road.guards_spotted: The guards spotted you and gave chase!
anchor_road.barely_escaped: You barely escaped, losing {0} HP in the process.
anchor_road.peer_through_bars: You peer through the iron bars...
anchor_road.cells_empty: The prison cells appear to be empty.
pantheon.menu_comment_desc: Send a proclamation to your believers
pantheon.menu_recruit_desc: Convert a pagan or steal from a rival
pantheon.menu_bless_desc: Grant a combat buff to a believer
pantheon.menu_proclamation_desc: Send a divine message to all
pantheon.no_boons: No boons configured. Use [F] Favors to set boons for your followers.
pantheon.no_believers: You have no believers yet. Use Divine Deeds to recruit followers.
pantheon.favors_updated: Divine favors updated. Your followers will feel the change.
pantheon.no_deeds_left: Your divine power is spent for today. Rest until the morrow.
pantheon.no_mortals_to_recruit: There are no mortals available to recruit.
pantheon.recruit_success: {0} falls to their knees in worship!
pantheon.recruit_failure: {0} resists your divine call. Perhaps next time.
pantheon.steal_failure: {0}'s faith holds firm. You cannot turn them.
pantheon.no_believers_to_bless: You have no believers to bless.
pantheon.no_mortals_to_smite: There are no non-believers to smite.
pantheon.poison_failure: Your influence fails to take hold. Their bond is too strong.
pantheon.no_prisoners: There are no prisoners to free.
pantheon.free_success: The prison walls shimmer and {0} walks free!
pantheon.proclamation_intro: Your words will echo across the realm.
pantheon.proclamation_success: Your words thunder across the mortal realm!
pantheon.only_god: You are the only god in the realm.
pantheon.comment_header: SEND A COMMENT TO YOUR BELIEVERS
pantheon.comment_intro: This message will appear as news (no deed cost).
pantheon.comment_success: Your words have been recorded in the annals.
pantheon.manwe_approach: You approach the throne of Manwe, the Supreme Creator.
pantheon.manwe_max_1: "You have reached the pinnacle of divine power."
pantheon.manwe_max_2: "There is nothing more I can teach you."
pantheon.manwe_max_3: "Go forth and shape the world as you see fit."
pantheon.renounce_warning: WARNING: This is permanent and cannot be undone!
pantheon.renounce_1: - Your divine record will be erased
pantheon.renounce_2: - All believers will lose their faith
pantheon.renounce_3: - Your character data will be wiped
pantheon.renounce_4: - You will start fresh (cycle bonuses preserved)
pantheon.renounce_confirm_yes: Are you sure? (Type YES to confirm):
pantheon.renounce_confirm_name: This is truly permanent. Type your divine name to confirm:
pantheon.renounce_abdicate: The throne has been abdicated as you renounce your divine power.
pantheon.renounce_fade: The divine light fades from your eyes...
pantheon.renounce_new_life: The wheel turns. A new life awaits.
dark_alley.guards_block: Guards block the entrance to the Dark Alley.
dark_alley.return_martial_law: You must return when martial law is lifted.
dark_alley.rejection_hand: A heavy hand lands on your shoulder. You turn to find cold eyes staring you down.
dark_alley.rejection_kind: "We don't serve your kind here. The Shadows have long memories,
dark_alley.rejection_enemies: and you've made too many enemies in this alley."
dark_alley.rejection_standing: Shadows standing: {0} — you need at least -50 to access underground services.
dark_alley.sr_desc: Torches sputter in the moist air. Whispers of illicit trade echo between crooked doorways.
dark_alley.sr_shadow_member: You are a member of The Shadows.
dark_alley.visual_desc: Torches sputter in the moist air and the smell of trash mixes with exotic spices.  Whispers of illicit trade echo between crooked doorways.
dark_alley.visual_virtuous: The vendors eye you suspiciously. Your virtuous aura doesn't belong here.
dark_alley.visual_shadow_member: The shady merchants nod in recognition. You're one of them.
dark_alley.shadow_member_tag: You are a member of The Shadows.
dark_alley.bbs_desc: Torches sputter in the moist air. Whispers of illicit trade echo in the dark.
dark_alley.drug_enter: You enter a smoky den lined with velvet curtains. A hooded dealer
dark_alley.drug_enter2: spreads an array of colorful vials and packets across the table.
dark_alley.drug_no_gold: The dealer laughs. "Come back when you have real money!"
dark_alley.drug_back_away: You back away from the table.
dark_alley.drug_shadow_boost: The Shadows have noted your... activities. (+5 Shadows standing)
dark_alley.steroid_enter: A muscular dwarf guards crates of suspicious vials.
dark_alley.steroid_limit: The dwarf shakes his head. "Your body can't handle any more, friend."
dark_alley.orbs_enter: A hooded cleric guides you to glowing orbs floating in a pool.
dark_alley.orbs_healed: Warm light knits your wounds together – you are fully healed!
dark_alley.groggo_enter: The infamous gnome Groggo grins widely behind a cluttered desk.
dark_alley.groggo_enter2: "Secrets, charms, and forbidden knowledge! What'll it be?"
dark_alley.groggo_intel: (1) Dungeon Intel - 100 gold (reveals monsters on current floor)
dark_alley.groggo_fortune: (2) Fortune Reading - 250 gold (hints about upcoming events)
dark_alley.groggo_blessing: (3) Blessing of Shadows - 500 gold (temporary stealth bonus)
dark_alley.groggo_no_fortune: Groggo scoffs. "The future costs money, friend!"
dark_alley.groggo_crystal: Groggo peers into a murky crystal ball:
dark_alley.groggo_already_blessed: You already have the Blessing of Shadows active!
dark_alley.groggo_traces: Groggo traces arcane symbols in the air...
dark_alley.groggo_shadows_wrap: Shadows wrap around you like a cloak!
dark_alley.bob_mug: Bob hands you a frothy mug that smells vaguely of goblin sweat.
dark_alley.bob_warmth: The warmth spreads through you. (+10 HP)
dark_alley.bob_brave: You feel brave! (Nothing happened, but you feel good.)
dark_alley.bob_coins: Bob winks and slides some coins back. "For a friend." (+5 gold)
dark_alley.bob_burns: It burns going down! You feel... something.
dark_alley.alchemist_enter: Shelves of bubbling concoctions line the walls.
dark_alley.alchemist_no_gold: The alchemist shakes his head – no credit.
dark_alley.alchemist_limit: Your mind has been enhanced to its limit by alchemy.
dark_alley.alchemist_int_boost: Your mind feels sharper! (+2 INT, {0} boosts remaining)
dark_alley.alchemist_heal: A warm glow mends some wounds. (+20 HP)
dark_alley.alchemist_fizzle: The potion fizzles nastily… you feel uneasy. (+2 Darkness)
dark_alley.shadows_intro1: You feel eyes on you. The shadows in the corner of the alley seem
dark_alley.shadows_intro2: to deepen, to solidify into something almost human...
dark_alley.shadows_figure1: A figure emerges. You cannot see their face - it's wrapped in darkness
dark_alley.shadows_figure2: that seems to move and shift like smoke. Only their voice is clear.
dark_alley.shadows_noticed: "You've been noticed," the voice whispers, neither male nor female.
dark_alley.shadows_attention: "Not everyone who walks these alleys catches our attention."
dark_alley.shadows_study: The faceless figure tilts its head, studying you.
dark_alley.shadows_no_share: "The Shadows do not share. We do not compete."
dark_alley.shadows_find_us: "When you are ready to walk free of chains... find us."
dark_alley.shadows_dissolves: The figure dissolves back into the darkness.
dark_alley.shadows_beckons: The figure beckons you deeper into the shadows.
dark_alley.shadows_crown: "The Crown demands obedience. The Faith demands worship."
dark_alley.shadows_know: "The Shadows know what the Crown hides. What The Faith fears."
dark_alley.shadows_unseen: "We move unseen. We profit while others fight."
dark_alley.shadows_benefit1: • 20% better prices when selling items (fence bonus)
dark_alley.shadows_benefit2: • Access to exclusive black market goods
dark_alley.shadows_benefit3: • Friendly treatment from thieves and assassin NPCs
dark_alley.shadows_req_darkness: • Darkness 200+ (or complete a favor for The Shadows)
dark_alley.shadows_too_light: "You walk too much in the light," the voice observes.
dark_alley.shadows_embrace: "Embrace the darkness. Do what must be done."
dark_alley.shadows_prove: "Or... prove yourself with a favor. We remember those who help us."
dark_alley.shadows_nods: The faceless figure nods - somehow you can tell, even without seeing.
dark_alley.shadows_understand: "You understand how the world works. Good."
dark_alley.shadows_step_in: "Will you step into the shadows with us?"
dark_alley.shadows_warning1: • Lock you out of The Crown and The Faith
dark_alley.shadows_warning2: • Decrease standing with rival factions by 100
dark_alley.shadows_shrug: The figure shrugs - or seems to.
dark_alley.shadows_patient: "The offer remains. The shadows are patient."
dark_alley.shadows_gone: Between one blink and the next, the figure is gone.
dark_alley.shadows_ritual1: The figure leads you deeper into the darkness.
dark_alley.shadows_ritual2: The alley twists and turns in ways that should be impossible.
dark_alley.shadows_ritual3: You lose all sense of direction.
dark_alley.shadows_ritual4: Finally, you stand in a chamber of absolute darkness.
dark_alley.shadows_ritual5: You cannot see the walls. You cannot see the floor.
dark_alley.shadows_ritual6: You can only see the figure, outlined in shadow.
dark_alley.shadows_no_oath: "There is no oath," the voice says. "No vow. No ritual."
dark_alley.shadows_coin1: Something cold touches your hand. A coin, heavier than gold.
dark_alley.shadows_coin2: You cannot see its face, but you can feel the symbol carved into it.
dark_alley.shadows_keep: "Keep this. Show it when you need to."
dark_alley.shadows_know_you: "Those who see it will know you walk with us."
dark_alley.shadows_welcome: "Welcome to the darkness. Use it well."
dark_alley.shadows_receive: As a member of The Shadows, you will receive:
dark_alley.shadows_perk1: • 20% better sell prices at black markets
dark_alley.shadows_perk4: • The information network works for you now
dark_alley.shadows_back_alley: When you blink, you find yourself back in the Dark Alley.
dark_alley.shadows_coin_pocket: The figure is gone. But you can feel the shadow coin in your pocket.
dark_alley.easter_squint: You squint into the deepest shadows of the alley...
dark_alley.easter_nothing: At first, you see nothing but darkness.
dark_alley.easter_adjust: But as your eyes adjust, shapes begin to form...
dark_alley.easter_letters: Letters. Ancient letters, carved into the very shadows themselves.
dark_alley.easter_shift: They seem to shift and dance, but you can just make out the words:
dark_alley.easter_shadow: "The Shadow remembers what the Light forgets."
dark_alley.easter_discovered: You have discovered something hidden in this dark place!
dark_alley.easter_fade: The shadows shift, and the words fade from view.
dark_alley.easter_waiting: But you know they are still there, waiting for another
dark_alley.easter_curious: curious soul to find them in the darkness.
dark_alley.bm_no_access: You don't have access to the Black Market.
dark_alley.bm_enter: A hooded figure beckons you behind a false wall.
dark_alley.bm_enter2: Crates of contraband line the narrow room.
dark_alley.bm_poison_vials: Poison Vials (x3), {0:N0}g - Coat blade in combat
dark_alley.bm_forged_result: The forger hands you new papers. Darkness reduced by {0}.
dark_alley.bm_poison_vial_limit: You can't carry any more vials. ({0}/{1})
dark_alley.bm_poison_use: Use [B] Coat Blade during combat to apply a poison.
dark_alley.bm_poison_limit: You can't carry any more. Three is the limit.
dark_alley.bm_smoke_limit: You can't carry any more smoke bombs. Three is the limit.
dark_alley.bm_smoke_result: Smoke bomb acquired. You now carry {0}.
dark_alley.informant_no_access: You don't have access to the information network.
dark_alley.informant_enter: A wiry figure in a dark corner taps the table impatiently.
dark_alley.informant_cost: "Intel costs {0} gold. Take it or leave it."
dark_alley.informant_no_gold: "Come back when you can afford it."
dark_alley.informant_no_wanted: Nobody on the wanted list right now.
dark_alley.gambling_enter: Smoke curls through the low-ceilinged room. A scarred half-orc
dark_alley.gambling_enter2: runs the tables while nervous eyes watch from every corner.
dark_alley.gambling_limit: The half-orc waves you off. "You've had enough action for today."
dark_alley.gambling_min_gold: "You need at least 10 gold to play, rat."
dark_alley.gambling_no_coin: "You ain't got that kind of coin."
dark_alley.dice_rattles: The half-orc rattles two dice in a leather cup.
dark_alley.cards_intro: Three cards face-down. One is the Queen of Shadows.
dark_alley.cards_shuffle: The dealer's hands blur as he shuffles them.
dark_alley.skull_intro: A grinning skull sits on the table. Choose your risk.
dark_alley.skull_golden: A golden tooth gleams inside! Fortune favors the bold!
dark_alley.skull_empty: Empty. The skull laughs silently at your misfortune.
dark_alley.pick_used_up: You've used up all your thievery attempts for the day.
dark_alley.pick_streets_hot: The streets are too hot right now. Come back tomorrow.
dark_alley.pick_scan: You pull your hood low and scan the crowd for marks...
dark_alley.pick_empty: The streets are empty. No marks to be found.
dark_alley.pick_slip_away: You slip back into the shadows.
dark_alley.pick_guards: Guards materialize from every alley. There's no escape.
dark_alley.pick_prison: You are dragged to the prison!
dark_alley.pit_enter: A roaring crowd surrounds a blood-stained fighting pit.
dark_alley.pit_enter2: The air reeks of sweat, ale, and desperation.
dark_alley.pit_limit: The pit boss shakes his head. "Three fights is the limit. Rules are rules."
dark_alley.pit_bare: All pit fights are bare-knuckle — no armor allowed!
dark_alley.pit_victory: The crowd roars! You are victorious!
dark_alley.pit_defeat: You fall to the dirt. The crowd jeers.
dark_alley.pit_no_fighters: No fighters are stepping up to the pit tonight.
dark_alley.pit_side_bet: Place a side bet on the fight?
dark_alley.loan_enter: A gaunt man with golden teeth sits behind a reinforced desk.
dark_alley.loan_enter2: Two massive enforcers flank the doorway.
dark_alley.loan_overdue: ** OVERDUE — Enforcers are looking for you! **
dark_alley.loan_paid: The loan shark counts the gold and nods.
dark_alley.loan_not_enough: "You don't have enough. Don't waste my time."
dark_alley.loan_changed_mind: "Changed your mind? Don't keep me waiting too long."
dark_alley.loan_forward: The loan shark leans forward with a predatory grin.
dark_alley.loan_five_days: "Five days to pay it back. Interest accrues daily."
dark_alley.loan_deadline: "Miss the deadline... and my boys will collect in other ways."
dark_alley.loan_interest: (Interest accrues 10% daily. Repay at the Loan Shark.)
dark_alley.fence_enter: A weasel-faced man examines goods through a cracked magnifying glass.
dark_alley.fence_nothing: "You got nothing worth my time. Beat it."
dark_alley.fence_cursed: "Cursed, eh? I know a buyer for everything."
dark_alley.safe_locked: A heavy door blocks your way. A slot opens and eyes peer out.
dark_alley.safe_locked2: "You don't belong here, clean-skin. Come back when you've
dark_alley.safe_locked3: got some real darkness in your soul."
dark_alley.safe_enter: A cramped room with a filthy cot and a locked door.
dark_alley.safe_enter2: At least nobody will find you here... probably.
dark_alley.safe_no_gold: "No gold, no bed. Sleep in the gutter."
dark_alley.safe_shadow_coin: Your Shadow coin keeps the thieves at bay.
dark_alley.safe_shadow_watch: The Shadows watch over you. No one will find you here.
dark_alley.tribute_already: The Shadows already tolerate you. No tribute needed.
dark_alley.tribute_figure: A cloaked figure emerges from the shadows.
dark_alley.tribute_back: "Word is you want back in our good graces. That can be arranged..."
dark_alley.tribute_no_gold: "Come back when you can afford it. We don't do charity."
dark_alley.tribute_open: "The underground is open to you again. Don't make us regret it."
dark_alley.evil_filled: The darkness has had its fill of you today.
dark_alley.evil_return: Return tomorrow to continue your dark work.
dark_alley.evil_slink: You slink back into the shadows, licking your wounds.
dark_alley.evil_altar_cold: The altar is cold. The Broken Blade is shattered.
dark_alley.evil_altar_linger: But darkness still lingers, and your blood still has power.
dark_alley.evil_seal_echo: Ancient energy courses through you. The seal's echo shatters.
dark_alley.gambling_loss: You lost {0:N0} gold. The house always wins... eventually.
dark_alley.gambling_bet_prompt: Place your bet (min {0}, max {1:N0}, 0 to leave):
dark_alley.dice_favor: You called it! The dice favor you.
dark_alley.cards_queen_win: The Queen smiles at you from card {0}. Sharp eyes!
dark_alley.cards_queen_lose: The Queen was hiding on card {0}. Better luck next time.
dark_alley.pick_success: Your fingers find the purse... got it!
dark_alley.pick_gutter: {0} leaves you bleeding in the gutter.
dark_alley.pit_released: A {0} is released into the pit!
dark_alley.pit_bet_lost: Lost your spectator bet of {0:N0} gold.
dark_alley.pit_crowd_wild: The crowd goes wild! You claim {0:N0} gold from {1}!
dark_alley.pit_stumble_out: You stumble out of the pit, {0:N0} gold poorer.
dark_alley.pit_side_bet_prompt: Place a side bet on the fight?
dark_alley.loan_offer: "Need some coin? I can offer up to {0:N0} gold."
dark_alley.loan_count_out: The loan shark counts out {0:N0} gold.
dark_alley.fence_sold: The fence pockets {0} and slides you {1:N0} gold.
dark_alley.safe_robbed: You wake to find your purse lighter. Someone picked your pocket!
dark_alley.tribute_accepted: The figure pockets your gold and nods.
dark_alley.enc_mugger_appear: A figure steps from the shadows, blade gleaming!
dark_alley.enc_mugger_demand: "Hand over 50 gold or I'll gut you like a fish!"
dark_alley.enc_mugger_vanish: You hand over the gold. The mugger vanishes into the dark.
dark_alley.enc_beggar_tug: A ragged beggar tugs at your sleeve.
dark_alley.enc_beggar_tip1: "The monsters on the deeper floors carry enchanted weapons, they do..."
dark_alley.enc_beggar_tip2: "Watch out for the loan shark's enforcers. They break kneecaps for fun."
dark_alley.enc_beggar_tip3: "I heard the guards are planning a raid on the alley tomorrow..."
dark_alley.enc_beggar_tip4: "There's a secret path in the dungeon. Look for the cracked wall."
dark_alley.enc_beggar_tip5: "The fence pays more for cursed items than regular ones, if you know how to ask."
dark_alley.enc_beggar_tip6: "The pit fights are rigged, but if yer strong enough it don't matter."
dark_alley.enc_guard_badge: An undercover guard reveals a badge. More guards swarm in.
dark_alley.enc_guard_prison: You are dragged to the prison!
dark_alley.enc_guard_watching: You notice someone watching you a bit too intently...
dark_alley.enc_guard_slip: Undercover guard? You slip away before they can act.
dark_alley.enc_guard_bump: A well-dressed man bumps into you, mutters an apology, and moves on.
dark_alley.enc_merchant_sidle: A cloaked figure sidles up to you.
dark_alley.enc_merchant_potion: "Psst... healing potion. Real good stuff. Only {0} gold."
dark_alley.enc_merchant_pocket: You pocket the potion. It smells alright... probably.
dark_alley.enc_merchant_str: A warm rush of power. (+1 STR)
dark_alley.enforcer_appear: A massive figure blocks your path. Scarred knuckles crack.
dark_alley.enforcer_demand: "You owe the boss. Time to pay up... one way or another."
dark_alley.enforcer_crumple: The enforcer crumples to the ground.
dark_alley.enforcer_settled: Word on the street is the loan shark considers the debt settled.
dark_alley.enforcer_beaten: The enforcer beats you senseless and takes everything.
dark_alley.enforcer_lost: Lost all gold ({0:N0}). Took {1} HP damage.
dark_alley.enforcer_extension: "The boss is giving you 3 more days. Don't waste them."
dark_alley.evil_need_gold: You need {0} gold. You only have {1:N0}.
dark_alley.evil_blood_cut: The blade bites deep. You lose {0} HP as blood spills across the altar.
dark_alley.evil_dark_pact: Dark Pact active: +{0}% damage for {1} combats!
dark_alley.evil_void_whisper: The Void whispers back. You glimpse something vast beneath reality.
dark_alley.deed_rob_beggar_desc:
An old beggar dozes against the alley wall, a few copper coins
scattered in his cup. He'd never even know they were gone.
dark_alley.deed_vandalize_shrine_desc:
A small roadside shrine to the Seven sits unattended, its candles
still flickering. You topple it and scatter the offerings into the gutter.
dark_alley.deed_spread_rumors_desc:
The gossips near the well are always hungry for scandal. A well-placed
lie about a merchant's debts could ruin someone — and entertain you.
dark_alley.deed_poison_well_desc:
The public well serves dozens of families. A few drops of bitter
nightshade, and by morning the healers will have their hands full.
dark_alley.deed_extort_shopkeeper_desc:
The old cobbler on Anchor Road has been skimming the King's tax.
You know because you watched him do it. A quiet word, a meaningful look...
dark_alley.deed_desecrate_dead_desc:
The cemetery holds more than memories. The recently buried are sometimes
interred with jewelry. The gravedigger looks the other way — for a price.
dark_alley.deed_arson_market_desc:
The timber-framed stalls of the lower market are tinder-dry. One spark
and the chaos will keep the guards busy for hours — perfect cover.
dark_alley.deed_blackmail_noble_desc:
You've been watching Lord Aldric's midnight visits to the Dark Alley.
A man of his position has much to lose. Your silence has a price.
dark_alley.deed_whisper_noctura_desc:
They say if you speak the Shadow Queen's true name three times in
absolute darkness, she hears you. In the deepest corner of the alley,
where no torch reaches, you whisper: 'Noctura... Noctura... Noctura...'
The shadows thicken. Something answers.
dark_alley.deed_sabotage_wagons_desc:
The Crown's supply caravan passes through the narrow streets at dawn.
A loosened axle pin, a spooked horse — the King's soldiers go hungry
while the rebels feast.
dark_alley.deed_blood_maelketh_desc:
In a cellar beneath the alley, fanatics of the Broken Blade maintain
a hidden altar stained rust-red. They welcome you with hollow eyes.
The blade they offer is sharp. Your blood will feed a god's hunger.
dark_alley.deed_dark_pact_desc:
A figure in the alley offers something no merchant sells: certainty.
Sign your name in blood and ink blacker than midnight, and for ten
combats your blade will strike true. The price is written in letters
too small to read.
dark_alley.deed_thorgrim_law_desc:
There is an older law than the King's. In the underground court beneath
the alley, you stand before a mockery of justice and pronounce sentence
on the weak. The shadows applaud.
dark_alley.deed_void_sacrifice_desc:
Beyond the alley, past the cellar, past tunnels that should not exist,
there is a place where the stone floor drops into nothing. The cultists
call it the Mouth. Cast something precious into it, and the Void
gives power in return.
dark_alley.deed_shatter_seal_desc:
The Seven Seals aren't just lore. Fragments of their power echo in
hidden places. In the deepest part of the alley, you find such a
fragment — a humming shard of ancient law. You could study it...
or you could break it and drink in the power that spills out.
dark_alley.ambient_footstep: A distant footstep echoes and then stops.
dark_alley.ambient_skitter: Something small skitters across the cobblestones.
dark_alley.ambient_drip: Water drips steadily from a broken gutter overhead.
dark_alley.ambient_voices: Hushed voices drift from a darkened doorway.
dark_alley.ambient_shadow: A shadow shifts at the far end of the alley.
dark_alley.ambient_laughter: Distant laughter, low and brief, comes from somewhere unseen.
dark_alley.visual_prices_higher: Prices are {0}% higher for someone of {1} alignment.
dark_alley.visual_discount: You receive a {0}% discount as a fellow {1} soul.
dark_alley.visual_no_trust: The Shadows don't trust you. (Standing: {0:N0}, need -50+)
dark_alley.drug_under_influence: You're already under the influence of {0}!
dark_alley.drug_wear_off: Effects will wear off in {0} day(s).
dark_alley.groggo_floor_hint: "For someone of your skill, floor {0} should be manageable..."
dark_alley.fortune_1: "I see gold in your future... but also danger."
dark_alley.fortune_2: "A powerful enemy watches you from the shadows."
dark_alley.fortune_3: "The deeper you go, the greater the rewards."
dark_alley.fortune_4: "Trust not the smiling stranger in the Inn."
dark_alley.fortune_5: "Your destiny is intertwined with the Seven Seals."
dark_alley.fortune_6: "The old gods stir in their prisons..."
dark_alley.bob_price: "Just {0} gold for liquid courage!" Bob grins.
dark_alley.news_shadow_joins: A new shadow moves through Dorashire...

home.desc_level0: You stand in a drafty, dilapidated shack. The walls are thin and the roof leaks.
home.desc_level1: Your home has seen some repairs. The walls are patched, keeping out the worst of the wind.
home.desc_level2: A sturdy cottage with solid walls and a proper door. It feels like a real home.
home.desc_level3: A comfortable home with good furniture and warm light.
home.desc_level4: A fine manor with quality furnishings and elegant decor.
home.desc_level5: A grand estate befitting a hero, beautifully appointed throughout.
home.bed_level0: A moth-eaten straw pile serves as your bed.
home.bed_level1: A simple cot sits in the corner.
home.bed_level2: A sturdy wooden bed frame holds a thin mattress.
home.bed_level3: A plush feather mattress promises restful sleep.
home.bed_level4: An ornate four-poster bed dominates the bedroom.
home.bed_level5: A magnificent canopy bed draped in silk awaits you.
home.hearth_level1: A simple hearth crackles with warmth.
home.hearth_level2: A stone fireplace radiates steady heat.
home.hearth_level3: An iron stove fills the room with comforting warmth.

prison.vex_voice: A voice drifts from the cell next to yours:
prison.vex_psst1: "Psst. Hey. You. The one with the look of someone
prison.vex_peer1: You peer through the bars. In the adjacent cell,
prison.vex_peer2: a lean figure lounges against the wall with improbable comfort.
prison.vex_peer3: He's grinning - actually grinning - in a place like this.
prison.vex_metal: He produces a bent piece of metal from nowhere.
prison.vex_locks1: "I've been picking locks since before I could walk."
prison.vex_locks2: "Which is good, because I probably won't be walking much longer."
prison.vex_menu_escape: [E] Let him help you escape (and recruit him)
prison.vex_shake_head: You shake your head and return to your own cell.
prison.vex_works_lock: He works the lock with practiced ease.
prison.vex_trick1: "You know what the trick is?" he whispers.
prison.vex_trick2: "It's not about forcing things. It's about listening."
prison.vex_trick3: "Every lock wants to be opened. You just have to ask nicely."
prison.vex_door_open: Your cell door swings silently open.
prison.vex_smoke: Vex is already beside you, moving like smoke.
prison.vex_sewers1: "Come on. I know a way out. Built this place's sewers
prison.vex_sewers2: for a job once. Long story."
prison.vex_passages1: As you move through the dark passages, he talks.
prison.vex_passages2: It's compulsive - like he can't stand silence.
prison.vex_dying1: "I'm dying, by the way," he mentions casually.
prison.vex_dying2: "Wasting disease. Got maybe a month left."
prison.vex_dying3: "So I figure - might as well spend it doing something fun."
prison.vex_glance1: He glances at you, and for just a moment,
prison.vex_glance2: the mask slips. You see something real beneath the jokes.
prison.vex_tag_along: "You seem interesting. Mind if I tag along?"
prison.vex_joined: {0} has joined you as a companion!
prison.vex_warning_dying: WARNING: Vex is dying. His time is limited.
prison.vex_make_most: Make the most of the days you have together.
prison.vex_emerge: You emerge from the sewers into the night air.
prison.vex_condition: "The condition?" He laughs, but there's an edge to it.
prison.vex_born1: "Born with it. Wasting disease. No cure."
prison.vex_born2: "Every healer I've seen says the same thing:"
prison.vex_born3: "'Sorry, nothing we can do. Go enjoy your time.'"
prison.vex_lockpick: He spins his lockpick between his fingers.
prison.vex_best_thief1: "So I did. Became the best thief in the kingdom."
prison.vex_best_thief2: "Stole from kings. Robbed temples. Picked pockets at my own funeral."
prison.vex_best_thief3: "...That last one was a practice run."
prison.vex_too_short: "Life's too short to take seriously. Trust me, I know."
prison.vex_suit_yourself: "Suit yourself. Offer stands if you change your mind."
street.pickpocket_noticed: You feel a hand reaching for your coin purse!
street.thief_flees: The thief flees into the crowd.
street.ignore_thief: You pretend not to notice. The thief slinks away.

street.buy_drinks_toast: The brawlers toast to your health!
street.buy_drinks_no_gold: You don't have enough gold! The brawl continues!

street.accept_fight: "Let us fight with honor!" you declare.

street.defeated_muggers: You defeated the muggers and found {0} gold on their bodies!

street.escape_muggers: You sprint away and lose them in the streets!
street.caught_muggers: They catch you and beat you badly!

street.gang_recruit: "You look like you could use some friends..."
street.gang_victory_fame: Word spreads of your victory over the {0}!
street.gang_not_recruiting: The gang members exchange looks and back away...
street.gang_let_pass: They let you pass... this time.

street.romantic_time: You spend a pleasant time together...
street.romantic_friend: You have a wonderful conversation and make a new friend!
street.romantic_wake_lighter: You wake up later to find your purse lighter...
street.romantic_token: They give you a small token of affection.
street.merchant_shady_beckon: A cloaked figure beckons from the shadows...
street.merchant_wave: A traveling merchant waves you over.
street.merchant_pitch: "Fine wares! Rare items! Best prices in town!"
street.beggar_plea: "Please, kind adventurer, spare a few coins for the poor?"
street.beggar_weeps: "Bless you, kind soul!" the beggar weeps with joy.
street.beggar_amulet: The beggar hands you a strange amulet...
street.beggar_amulet_luck: "This brought me luck once. May it serve you well."
street.beggar_rob_msg: You rob the beggar of their meager possessions...
street.beggar_walk_past: You walk past without a word.

street.guard_crown_notice: The patrol leader squints at you, then notices your Crown insignia.
street.guard_crown_aside: The guards step aside without another word.
street.guard_arrest: The guards arrest you and take you to prison...
street.guard_sentence: You are sentenced to {0} day{1} in prison.
street.guard_overpower: The guards overpower you and clap you in irons!
street.guard_sentence_resist: You are sentenced to {0} days in prison for resisting arrest.
street.guard_bribe_success: The guards pocket your gold and look the other way...
street.guard_running_extra: "Running from the law, eh? That'll cost you extra!"
street.guard_sentence_run: You are sentenced to {0} days in prison.
street.guard_continue_patrol: The guards continue on their patrol.
street.ambush_paid: "Someone paid good gold to see you dead!"
street.ambush_first_strike: The assassin's first strike hits for {0} damage!
street.ambush_note: You find a note on the assassin's body...
street.flee_back_turned: They attack while your back is turned!
street.bribe_offer: "How about {0} gold and we forget this happened?"
street.bribe_rejected: {0} takes your gold and attacks anyway!
street.talk_attempt: You try to reason with them...
street.hostile_phrase_9: I've been waiting for someone like you!
street.hostile_phrase_10: End of the line for you!
street.challenge_phrase_1: I challenge you, {0}! Let us see who is stronger!
street.challenge_phrase_2: I've heard about you. Fight me!
street.challenge_phrase_3: They say youre tough. Lets see about that!
street.challenge_phrase_4: Think youre tough? Lets find out!
street.challenge_phrase_5: My sword needs blood. You'll do.
street.challenge_phrase_6: Come on then. Unless youre scared.
street.rumor_1: They say the dungeons have gotten more dangerous lately...
street.rumor_2: I heard the King is looking for brave adventurers.
street.rumor_3: Strange creatures have been spotted near the Dark Alley.
street.rumor_4: The temple priests are offering blessings to those who donate.
street.rumor_5: There's a fortune to be made in monster hunting!
street.rumor_6: The guild masters are always looking for new recruits.
street.rumor_7: Watch your back in the alleys at night...
street.rumor_8: The weapon shop just got a new shipment of fine blades.
street.rumor_9: Some say there's a secret passage in the dungeons...
street.rumor_10: The market traders have exotic goods from distant lands.
street.rumor_npc_team: They say {0} is looking to form a team.
street.grudge_steps_out: {0} steps out of the shadows, fists clenched...
street.grudge_thinks_better: The level {0} {1} thinks better of it and melts back into the crowd.
street.murder_revenge_emerges: {0} emerges from the shadows, burning with fury.
street.murder_revenge_quote_1: "You thought you could murder me and get away with it?!"
street.murder_revenge_quote_2: "I crawled back from death for THIS moment!"
street.murder_revenge_flee_fail: {0} cuts off your escape! "You're not getting away this time!"
street.murder_revenge_defeated: {0} goes down again. So much for revenge.
street.murder_revenge_even: "Now we're even. But I won't forget."
street.witness_steps_in: {0} steps in front of you, glaring.
street.witness_saw_victim: "I saw what you did to {0}. You'll answer for that."
street.witness_saw_murder: "I saw what you did. Murderer. You'll answer for that."
street.witness_bribe_success: {0} takes the {1} gold and looks away.
street.witness_bribe_memory: "I didn't see anything. But my memory might come back..."
street.witness_bribe_rejected: "You think gold will buy my silence?!" They take it AND attack!
street.witness_flee_success: You slip away from {0}. For now...
street.witness_flee_fail: {0} catches you! "Running makes you look guilty!"
street.grudge_waiting: {0} is waiting for you. Doesn't look happy.
street.grudge_quote: "You thought I'd forget what you did to me? Think again."
street.grudge_fight_loss: {0} takes {1} gold and walks away satisfied.
street.grudge_bribe_no_gold: You don't have enough gold! {0} attacks!
street.grudge_flee_success: You slip away before {0} can react!
street.grudge_flee_fail: {0} catches you! They get the first strike!
street.spouse_storms: {0} storms toward you, face twisted with anger...
street.spouse_stops_short: ...then stops short, remembering who they're dealing with.
street.spouse_retreats: "This isn't over," they hiss, retreating to find another way.
street.spouse_standing: {0} is standing right in front of you. Fists clenched.
street.spouse_knows: "I know what you've been doing with {0}."
street.spouse_find_out: "Did you think I wouldn't find out?"
street.spouse_deny_success: "I don't know what you're talking about. We're just friends."
street.spouse_deny_fail: "LIAR! I've seen the looks between you two!"
street.spouse_admit: "You're right. I'm sorry. It was wrong of me."
street.spouse_warning: "Stay away from {0}. This is your only warning."
street.spouse_taunt: "Maybe if you were a better spouse, {0} wouldn't need to look elsewhere."
street.spouse_fight: "If that's how you want to settle this..."
street.throne_quote: "Your time's up. I'm taking that throne."
street.throne_accept: "I accept your challenge. Let us settle this with steel!"
street.throne_defeated: You are defeated! {0} claims the throne!
street.throne_guards_order: "Guards! Remove this fool from my sight!"
street.throne_guards_hesitate: Your guards hesitate... their loyalty wavers!
street.throne_no_guards: You have no guards! You must face {0} yourself!
street.throne_negotiate_offer: "Perhaps there's a role for someone of your talents in my court."
street.throne_negotiate_accept: {0} considers... "A seat on the court? That could work."
street.throne_negotiate_refuse: "I don't want a SEAT. I want the THRONE!"
street.throne_imprison_order: "Seize them! 14 days in the dungeon for treason!"
street.throne_imprison_uneasy: {0} is dragged away. Your guards exchange uneasy glances.
street.throne_no_guards_imprison: Without guards, you can't imprison anyone!

street.turf_fight_champion: "I'll fight your best. Bring it on!"

street.turf_hard_way: {0}: "Then we settle this the hard way!"

ending.usurper_header: T H E   U S U R P E R
ending.usurper_line_1: Manwe falls. His body cracks like old stone and
ending.usurper_line_2: something pours out of him... raw, burning power.
ending.usurper_line_3: It hits you like a wall of fire.
ending.usurper_line_4: "You wanted this," the dying god rasps.
ending.usurper_line_5: "Take it then. Its yours now. All of it."
ending.usurper_line_7: You can't even hear him anymore. The power is too loud.
ending.usurper_line_8: It roars through you like a river breaking a dam.
ending.usurper_line_9: The remaining Old Gods kneel. They have no choice.
ending.usurper_line_10: For a while, its everything you dreamed.
ending.usurper_line_11: Mortals worship you. Whole kingdoms bend the knee.
ending.usurper_line_12: Nobody dares speak against the new god.
ending.usurper_line_15: The worshippers start to look the same. The prayers
ending.usurper_line_16: blend together. You sit on a throne of divine power
ending.usurper_line_17: and feel... nothing much at all.
ending.usurper_line_18: Manwe tried to warn you. You didn't listen.
ending.usurper_line_20: Somewhere far below, a mortal picks up a sword.
ending.usurper_line_21: You can feel it. Another hero, climbing toward you.
ending.usurper_line_22: Part of you hopes they make it.
ending.savior_header: T H E   S A V I O R
ending.savior_line_1: You stand before Manwe. The artifacts burn in your hands.
ending.savior_line_2: You could end him right now. One strike.
ending.savior_line_4: "I know what you did," you tell him.
ending.savior_line_5: "You were scared and you hurt people. A lot of people."
ending.savior_line_6: "But I didn't come all this way just to make another corpse."
ending.savior_line_7: The Creator stares at you. Something wet runs
ending.savior_line_8: down his face. You didn't know gods could cry.
ending.savior_line_10: "Shut up," you say, not unkindly. "Hold still."
ending.savior_line_11: The Soulweaver's Loom does its work.
ending.savior_line_12: The corruption burns away like fog in morning sun.
ending.savior_line_13: Manwe gasps. The Old Gods stir in their prisons.
ending.savior_line_14: One by one, they come back to themselves.
ending.savior_line_15: Its not a fairy tale ending. The gods are diminished,
ending.savior_line_16: humbled. They remember what they did. Some of them
ending.savior_line_17: can't look you in the eye.
ending.savior_line_18: But they're free. And so is the world.
ending.savior_line_19: They write songs about you. Build statues.
ending.savior_line_20: You never asked for any of it.
ending.savior_line_21: You just wanted to go home.
ending.savior_line_22: When death finally comes for you, many years later,
ending.savior_line_23: the gods are waiting. They don't say much.
ending.defiant_header: T H E   D E F I A N T
ending.defiant_line_3: "I don't want your power. I don't want ANY of this."
ending.defiant_line_4: You hold up the artifacts. "These things? They're chains."
ending.defiant_line_5: "Fancy chains, but chains all the same."
ending.defiant_line_6: "You could rule forever," Manwe says, genuinely confused.
ending.defiant_line_8: "Because thats exactly how this mess started, isn't it."
ending.defiant_line_9: "Gods deciding what mortals need. I'm done with that."
ending.defiant_line_10: You throw the artifacts on the ground.
ending.defiant_line_11: And you smash them. Every last one.
ending.defiant_line_12: Divine power sprays out like sparks from a forge.
ending.defiant_line_13: The Old Gods stumble free from their prisons.
ending.defiant_line_14: They look... small. Confused. Almost human.
ending.defiant_line_15: For the first time in millennia, they are mortal.
ending.defiant_line_16: They'll have to live among the people they once ruled.
ending.defiant_line_17: Manwe is fading. He doesn't seem to mind.
ending.defiant_line_20: He's gone before he finishes the thought.
ending.defiant_line_21: No more gods. No more divine plans.
ending.defiant_line_22: Just people, making their own mistakes.
ending.defiant_line_24: You walk out into the morning. Just another person
ending.defiant_line_25: on an ordinary road. Somehow thats enough.
ending.true_sr_title: THE TRUE ENDING - Seeker of Balance
ending.true_line_2: Different lives, different choices. You remember them all now.
ending.true_line_3: The killing. The mercy. The defiance.
ending.true_line_4: None of it was wrong, exactly. Just... incomplete.
ending.true_line_5: Manwe looks at you and you can tell he knows.
ending.true_line_6: "You're different this time," he says quietly.
ending.true_line_7: "You actually figured it out, didn't you."
ending.true_line_8: "I think so," you say. "Took me long enough."
ending.true_line_9: He laughs. Its a tired sound.
ending.true_line_10: "I've been doing this alone for so long. Building,
ending.true_line_11: fixing, watching it all break again. I could use the help."
ending.true_line_12: It's not a trick. You can see that now.
ending.true_line_13: The universe is too big for one god to manage.
ending.true_line_14: It always was. That was the whole problem.
ending.true_line_19: The Old Gods come back to themselves, slowly.
ending.true_line_20: They remember everything -- the good years and the bad.
ending.true_line_21: None of them are the same as before. That's the point.
ending.true_line_22: The cycle keeps turning, but it goes somewhere now.
ending.true_line_23: Not just around and around. Upward.
ending.true_line_24: It's going to be a lot of work.
ending.true_line_25: That's fine. You've got help this time.
ending.awakening_sr_title_2: "You are the Ocean, dreaming of being a wave"
ending.awakening_line_1: You stand before Manwe. But this time is different.
ending.awakening_line_2: He's looking at you like he recognizes you.
ending.awakening_line_3: Like he's been waiting a very long time.
ending.awakening_line_4: "You remember," he says. His voice cracks.
ending.awakening_line_6: And you do. It hits you all at once.
ending.awakening_line_7: You're not some random adventurer who got lucky.
ending.awakening_line_8: You're a piece of HIM. A fragment of the Creator,
ending.awakening_line_9: shoved into a mortal body and sent down to live and
ending.awakening_line_10: die and suffer like everyone else.
ending.awakening_line_11: So he could finally understand what it felt like.
ending.awakening_line_12: "I was lonely," Manwe says. He looks old suddenly.
ending.awakening_line_13: "I made the Old Gods because I wanted someone to talk to.
ending.awakening_line_14: But I never understood them. How could I? I'd never been
ending.awakening_line_15: mortal. Never lost anything. Never been afraid."
ending.awakening_line_16: "So you sent yourself down here," you say.
ending.awakening_line_19: All that grief you carried. The friends who died.
ending.awakening_line_20: The impossible choices. That was his grief too.
ending.awakening_line_21: Yours and his. Same person, all along.
ending.awakening_line_22: It's like being a wave that suddenly realizes
ending.awakening_line_23: it's been the whole ocean this entire time.
ending.awakening_line_24: "I don't want to be alone anymore," Manwe admits.
ending.awakening_line_25: "And the Old Gods -- they're fragments too, aren't they."
ending.awakening_line_26: We've been fighting ourselves this whole time."
ending.awakening_line_27: You take his hand. Or your hand. Same thing really.
ending.awakening_line_29: All the separation. God and mortal, creator and created.
ending.awakening_line_30: It was never real. Just a story you told yourself
ending.awakening_line_31: so you could learn what it meant to be small.
ending.awakening_line_32: The Old Gods stir. Maelketh, Veloura, all of them.
ending.awakening_line_33: They remember too now. They were never really enemies.
ending.awakening_line_34: Just pieces of one being, playing out a drama
ending.awakening_line_35: that went on way too long.
ending.awakening_line_36: There never was a cycle. Not really.
ending.awakening_line_37: Just the ocean, dreaming it was waves.
ending.awakening_line_38: The dream goes on. But now its a lucid dream.
ending.dissolution_line_1: You've done this three times now. Maybe more.
ending.dissolution_line_2: Taken the throne. Shown mercy. Walked away.
ending.dissolution_line_3: Woken up and realized you were the ocean all along.
ending.dissolution_line_5: Not the bad kind of tired. The kind where you've
ending.dissolution_line_6: done everything you came to do and theres nothing
ending.dissolution_line_8: Manwe sees it in your eyes before you say anything.
ending.dissolution_line_9: "You're leaving," he says. "For real this time."
ending.dissolution_line_10: "No more cycles. No more coming back."
ending.dissolution_line_12: "But the stories -- the whole thing keeps going--"
ending.dissolution_line_13: "It'll keep going fine without me. That's kind of
ending.dissolution_line_14: the whole point. You don't need every wave to
ending.dissolution_line_16: He's quiet for a long time.
ending.dissolution_line_17: "I never could do this," he says finally.
ending.dissolution_line_18: "Just... stop. Let go of it all. I always had to
ending.dissolution_line_19: keep building, keep fixing, keep HOLDING ON."
ending.dissolution_line_20: He looks at you almost enviously.
ending.dissolution_line_21: "Maybe thats what I should have learned from you."
ending.dissolution_line_22: You smile at him. Feels like the last one.
ending.dissolution_line_24: Not dark. Not empty. Just... still.
ending.dissolution_line_26: The world keeps on spinning somewhere out there.
ending.dissolution_line_27: The gods figure their stuff out.
ending.dissolution_line_28: New heroes pick up swords and go looking for trouble.
ending.dissolution_line_29: But you're done. And it feels right.
ending.dissolution_line_30: Not like giving up. Like finishing.

ending.quote_savior: "Could have killed him. Didn't. Don't regret it."
ending.quote_defiant: "Nobody tells me what to do. Not even gods."
ending.quote_true: "Funny how you can search the whole world and end up right where you started."

ending.world_usurper: You took the throne of the gods. The realm hasn't stopped shaking.
ending.world_savior: The realm is at peace. They still sing songs about what you did.
ending.world_defiant: No more gods telling people what to do. About damn time.
ending.world_true: The cycle is broken. Whatever comes next, its something new.

engine.support_desc_1: Usurper Reborn is a free, open-source game released under the GPL v2
engine.support_desc_2: license. It is developed by a solo developer in his spare time as a
engine.support_desc_3: love letter to the classic BBS door games of the early 1990s.
engine.support_sponsor_desc: If you enjoy the game and want to support its
engine.support_sponsor_desc2: continued development, consider sponsoring on GitHub:
engine.support_star_desc: If you don't want to donate, that's totally fine!
engine.support_star_desc2: A star on the GitHub repo goes a long way and helps others
engine.support_steam_desc: When the game launches on Steam in March 2026,
engine.support_steam_desc2: purchasing a copy is another great way to show your support.
engine.support_thanks_1: Thank you for playing. Every bit of support — whether a sponsorship,
engine.support_thanks_2: a star, a bug report, or just playing the game — means the world.

engine.story_golden_1: Long ago, in an age now lost to memory, the world was watched over by the
engine.story_golden_2: Seven Divine - gods of immense power who guided mortalkind with wisdom and
engine.story_golden_3: grace. Under their benevolent gaze, civilizations flourished. The god of
engine.story_golden_4: war taught honor in battle. The goddess of love blessed every union. The
engine.story_golden_5: god of light ensured truth prevailed over deception.
engine.story_golden_6: It was an age of miracles. An age of heroes. An age of hope.
engine.story_sundering_1: Then came the Sundering - a cataclysm whose cause remains unknown. Some say
engine.story_sundering_2: mortals grew too proud and turned away from the gods. Others whisper of a
engine.story_sundering_3: betrayal among the Divine themselves. Whatever the truth, the result was
engine.story_sundering_5: The Seven were corrupted. Twisted. Imprisoned in realms of their own making.
engine.story_sundering_6: The god of war became rage incarnate, drowning in endless bloodshed. The
engine.story_sundering_7: goddess of love withered into jealousy and obsession. The god of light
engine.story_sundering_8: faded to barely a whisper, truth dying with each passing lie.
engine.story_avarice_1: Centuries have passed. The Old Gods are now mere legends - cautionary tales
engine.story_avarice_2: told to frighten children. In their absence, mortals have created new gods
engine.story_avarice_3: to worship, pale echoes of the Divine that once were.
engine.story_avarice_4: And in this godless age, a new power has risen: AVARICE.
engine.story_avarice_5: The Halls of Avarice - a sprawling underground complex where adventurers
engine.story_avarice_6: seek fortune, glory, and power. Where the strong prey upon the weak. Where
engine.story_avarice_7: gold is the only god that matters.
engine.story_avarice_8: Some come seeking treasure. Some come seeking fame. Some come to escape
engine.story_avarice_9: their past. And some... some hear whispers in the dark. Ancient voices
engine.story_avarice_10: calling from the depths. Promising power. Demanding sacrifice.
engine.story_begins_1: You arrive at the gates of the realm with little more than the clothes on
engine.story_begins_2: your back and a hunger for something more. The bustling Main Street awaits,
engine.story_begins_3: filled with shops, taverns, and opportunities for those bold enough to
engine.story_begins_5: Will you delve into the deadly Dungeons in search of treasure and glory?
engine.story_begins_6: Will you find love on the cobblestones of this dangerous town?
engine.story_begins_7: Will you rise to become a champion... or fall to become a cautionary tale?
engine.story_begins_8: And perhaps, if you grow strong enough, you may discover what truly lurks
engine.story_begins_9: in the deepest halls. You may learn the fate of the Old Gods. You may even
engine.story_begins_10: have the chance to save them... or destroy them forever.

engine.telemetry_declined: No problem! You can enable telemetry later in Settings if you change your mind.

temple.prophecy_maelketh_defeated: The Broken Blade has shattered. War finds peace at last.
temple.prophecy_maelketh_saved: The Blade remembers honor. War serves justice once more.
temple.prophecy_veloura_defeated: The Withered Heart beats no more. Love fades from the world.
temple.prophecy_veloura_saved: Love blooms anew where hope was planted.
temple.prophecy_thorgrim_defeated: The Hollow Judge is silenced. Mortals must find their own justice.
temple.prophecy_noctura_allied: The Weaver's thread guides you through darkness.
temple.prophecy_noctura_defeated: The shadows scatter. Secrets lie bare.
temple.prophecy_aurelion_defeated: The Fading Light is extinguished. Truth dies in darkness.
temple.prophecy_aurelion_saved: The Light burns anew within a mortal vessel.
temple.prophecy_terravok_defeated: The Mountain crumbles. The foundation breaks.
temple.prophecy_terravok_saved: The Mountain rises. The foundation stands eternal.
temple.prophecy_manwe_resolved: The Creator's question has been answered. What comes next?
temple.prophecies_sealed: The prophecies remain sealed to those not yet ready.
temple.prophecies_grow_stronger: Grow stronger, and the whispers will find you...
temple.vision_seven_figures: You see seven figures standing in a circle of light.
temple.vision_faces_beautiful: Their faces are beautiful, radiant, divine.
temple.vision_darkness_creeps: Then darkness creeps in. One by one, their light dims.
temple.vision_beauty_twists: Their beauty twists. Their smiles become snarls.
temple.vision_meant_to_guide: "We were meant to guide you," one whispers.
temple.vision_endless_halls: You see yourself walking through endless halls.
temple.vision_faint_light: Ahead, a faint light flickers - barely visible.
temple.vision_light_fades: A voice speaks: "The Light fades with every lie."
temple.vision_from_temple: You sense the vision comes from... here. The Temple.
temple.vision_throne_stars: You stand before a throne of stars.
temple.vision_figure_older: Upon it sits a figure older than time itself.
temple.deep_temple_sealed: The path to the Deep Temple is sealed.
temple.deep_temple_prove: You must prove yourself against the other Old Gods first.
temple.deep_temple_descend: You descend stone steps worn smooth by millennia of pilgrims.
temple.deep_temple_torches: The torches here burn with pale, flickering flames.
temple.deep_temple_air_thick: The air grows thick with the weight of forgotten prayers.
temple.deep_temple_watches: Something watches you from the shadows between the light.
temple.aurelion_altar_dark: The altar where Aurelion once dwelt is dark and cold.
temple.aurelion_ash_remains: Only ash remains where the god of truth once flickered.
temple.aurelion_sense_loss: You feel a deep sense of... loss.
temple.aurelion_warm_light: A warm light fills the chamber.
temple.aurelion_presence: You feel Aurelion's presence within you - truth made flesh.
temple.aurelion_thank_you: "Thank you," his voice echoes in your mind.
temple.aurelion_glow: A faint glow pulses at the heart of the Deep Temple.
temple.aurelion_weak: It is weak... barely visible... but unmistakably divine.
temple.aurelion_see_me: "You... can see me?" a voice whispers.
temple.aurelion_few_can: "Few can anymore. The lies have grown so thick..."
temple.aurelion_flickers: The light flickers but cannot fully manifest.
temple.aurelion_too_weak: "I am... too weak. You must face the others first."
temple.aurelion_defeat_siblings: "Defeat more of my fallen siblings. Only then..."
temple.step_back: You step back from the fading light.
temple.aurelion_not_ready: "Not everyone is ready for the truth."

temple.ancient_stones_revealed: The ancient stones still stand, but their secret has been revealed.
temple.remember_truth: You remember the truth of creation...
temple.walk_past_altars: You walk past the busy altars, past the crowds of worshippers,
temple.far_corner: to the far corner of the temple where few tread.
temple.massive_stones: Here, massive stones form the foundation of the building.
temple.older_than_temple: They are older than the temple itself - older than any god
temple.monks_say: The monks say these stones were here before the city was built.
temple.before_mortals: Before mortals came to this land.
temple.before_gods: Before even the gods walked the earth.
temple.step_back_stones: You step back from the stones.
temple.hand_touches: Your hand touches the cold stone...
temple.warmth_pulse: Then warmth. A pulse, like a heartbeat.
temple.stone_glows: The stone GLOWS beneath your palm.
temple.ancient_symbols: Ancient symbols flare to life - a language
temple.older_language: older than any spoken by mortal or god.
temple.voice_speaks: A voice speaks directly into your mind:
temple.seek_truth: "You seek truth. So few do anymore."
temple.first_seal: "This is the First Seal - the story of creation."
temple.remember_well: "Remember it well, for understanding begins here."
temple.must_worship_to_pray: You must worship a god before you can pray for blessings.
temple.kneel_altar: You kneel before the altar of {0}...
temple.prayers_rise_immortal: Your prayers rise to the immortal realm...
temple.no_boons_configured: {0} has not yet configured divine favors.
temple.prayer_heard_no_boons: Your prayer is heard, but no boons flow.
temple.prayers_rise_incense: Your prayers rise like incense to the heavens...
temple.warm_light_fills: Warm light fills the chamber as your god hears you.
temple.shadows_coil: Shadows coil around you as your god acknowledges your devotion.
temple.balance_clarity: A sense of balance and clarity washes over you.
temple.only_silence: Only silence and candle smoke fill the small room.
temple.step_into_chapel: You step into a small, quiet chapel off the main temple.
temple.candle_illuminates: A single candle illuminates a woman kneeling before an empty altar.
temple.faded_robes: She wears the faded robes of a priestess, though they bear no symbol.
temple.hands_clasped: Her hands are clasped, but her lips do not move.
temple.prays_to_nothing: She prays to... nothing. An empty space where faith once lived.
temple.turns_back: She turns back to the empty altar.
temple.sr_ask_join: R. Ask her to join you
temple.sr_leave_prayers: L. Leave her to her prayers
temple.leave_silent_vigil: You leave her to her silent vigil.
temple.speaks_without_turning: As you reach the door, she speaks without turning:
temple.dungeons_dangerous: "The dungeons are dangerous," you say. "A healer would be invaluable."
temple.looks_long_moment: {0} looks at you for a long moment.
temple.flickers_in_eyes: Something flickers in her eyes. Not hope - something smaller.
temple.want_me_to_heal: "You want me to heal," she says.
temple.always_been_able: "I can do that. I've always been able to do that."
temple.will_it_matter: "But will it matter? Will any of it matter?"
temple.doesnt_wait: She doesn't wait for an answer.
temple.perhaps_help: "Perhaps if I help you long enough, I'll find out."
temple.candle_flickers: The candle behind her flickers - but does not go out.
temple.companion_death_warning: WARNING: Companions can die permanently. She may find her answer in sacrifice.
temple.sit_beside: You sit beside her. The silence stretches between you.
temple.was_healer_veloura: "I was a healer at Veloura's temple," she says finally.
temple.corruption_came: "When the corruption came... the healers became something else."
temple.escaped_left_faith: "I escaped. But I left my faith behind."
temple.if_i_stop: "Because if I stop... I don't know what I am anymore."
temple.squeeze_shoulder: You squeeze her shoulder gently and leave.
temple.faith_approach: You approach the inner sanctum of the Temple, where only the most
temple.faith_devoted: devoted are permitted. An elderly priestess in white robes greets you.
temple.mirael_intro: "I am High Priestess Mirael," she says, her voice gentle but firm.
temple.mirael_watched: "I have watched your journey with interest, traveler."
temple.mirael_studies: She studies you with knowing eyes.
temple.no_divided_loyalties: "The Faith does not accept divided loyalties."
temple.renounce_seek_again: "Should you ever renounce your current allegiance, seek me again."
temple.sacred_flames: She gestures to the sacred flames burning eternally on the altar.
temple.faith_old_gods_pure: "The Faith believes the Old Gods were once pure and good."
temple.faith_guided: "They guided humanity with love, wisdom, and truth."
temple.faith_corrupted: "But mortal worship corrupted them - our fears, our hatreds,"
temple.faith_absorbed: "our lies... they absorbed them all until they broke."
temple.faith_healed: "We believe the gods can be HEALED, not destroyed."
temple.faith_restore: "we will restore them to their former glory."
temple.benefit_healing: • 25% discount on healing services at all healers
temple.benefit_prayers: • Access to special healing prayers and blessings
temple.benefit_npcs: • Friendly treatment from clerics and temple NPCs
temple.benefit_standing: • Standing with The Faith grows through devotion
temple.faith_req_standing: • Faith Standing 100+ (make gold offerings, pray daily)
temple.mirael_return: "Return when your faith burns brighter," Mirael says kindly.
temple.mirael_offerings: "Make offerings at our altars. Pray daily. Show your devotion."
temple.mirael_extends: High Priestess Mirael extends her hand toward you.
temple.mirael_noted: "Your devotion has been noted. Your offerings accepted."
temple.mirael_oath: "Will you take the sacred oath and join The Faith?"
temple.join_lock_out: • Lock you out of The Crown and The Shadows
temple.join_decrease: • Decrease standing with rival factions by 100
temple.mirael_not_for_everyone: "The path of faith is not for everyone. But know this:"
temple.mirael_doors_open: "Our doors remain open, should you ever seek the light."
temple.kneel_sacred_flames: You kneel before the sacred flames.
temple.mirael_stands: High Priestess Mirael stands before you, her hands raised.
temple.oath_line1: "I pledge my soul to the restoration of the gods."
temple.oath_line2: "I will heal what is broken, mend what is torn."
temple.oath_line3: "Through faith, I will be the light in darkness."
temple.oath_line4: "Until the gods are pure, I shall not rest."
temple.flames_flare: The sacred flames flare brightly, bathing you in warm light.
temple.profound_peace: You feel a profound sense of peace wash over you.
temple.mirael_welcome: "Welcome, child of the light," Mirael says warmly.
temple.mirael_never_waver: "You are now one of us. May your faith never waver."
temple.as_member_receive: As a member of The Faith, you will receive:
temple.receive_blessings: • Access to Faith-only blessings and prayers

temple.sanctum_stillness: A chamber of perfect stillness. Incense hangs in the air.
temple.sanctum_runes: Ancient runes pulse faintly along the walls.
temple.sanctum_grant: The sanctum grants a permanent +1 to a random attribute.
temple.sanctum_kneel: You kneel on the cold stone and close your eyes...
temple.sanctum_warmth: Warmth floods through you. Something shifts within.
temple.sanctum_power_mark: The sanctum's power has left its mark on you.
