temple.no_immortal_god: You don't follow any immortal god.
temple.without_patronage: You are once again without divine patronage.
temple.desecrate_hack_line1: When nobody is around You start to
temple.desecrate_hack_line2: pound away at the altar with a pickaxe.
temple.desecrate_unholy_line1: You find some unholy substances and
temple.desecrate_unholy_line2: pour them all over the altar!
temple.gods_remember_blasphemy: The gods will remember this blasphemy!
temple.desecrate_method_smash: You smash the altar with a pickaxe, shattering holy relics.
temple.desecrate_method_pour: You pour unholy substances over the sacred symbols.
temple.desecrate_method_carve: You carve blasphemous words into the altar's surface.
temple.desecrate_method_fire: You set fire to the offerings left by faithful worshippers.
temple.desecrate_method_topple: You topple the statue of the god, watching it shatter.
inn.ambient_brawl: A brawl breaks out in the corner, but the innkeeper quickly puts a stop to it.
inn.ambient_bard: A bard plays a haunting melody on a worn lute.
inn.ambient_merchant: A merchant counts gold coins at a nearby table.
inn.ambient_guard: A guard nurses a drink, eyes scanning the room.
inn.ambient_cloaked: A cloaked figure slips through the back door.
inn.ambient_barkeep: The barkeep wipes down the counter with a dirty rag.
inn.ambient_dice: Someone is winning big at the dice table, judging by the cheers.
inn.aldric_event_crash: The tavern doors burst open with a thunderous crash!
inn.aldric_event_bandits_rush: Three armed bandits rush in, weapons drawn!
inn.aldric_event_leader_shout: "Nobody move! Hand over your gold!" the leader snarls.
inn.aldric_event_patrons_cower: The patrons cower as the bandits advance...
inn.aldric_event_suddenly: Suddenly, a figure rises from the shadows of a corner booth.
inn.aldric_event_aldric_intro: A tall warrior in battered armor steps forward, hand on his sword.
inn.aldric_event_aldric_speaks: "I think you gentlemen should leave," he says calmly.
inn.aldric_event_leader_laughs: The bandit leader laughs. "And who's going to make us? You?"
inn.aldric_event_fight_desc: What follows is a masterful display of swordsmanship.
inn.aldric_event_disarms_first: The warrior disarms the first bandit with a single sweep,
inn.aldric_event_pins_second: pins the second against the wall,
inn.aldric_event_knocks_leader: and sends the leader stumbling back with a well-placed kick.
inn.aldric_event_bandits_flee: The bandits scramble out the door, leaving their weapons behind.
inn.aldric_event_warrior_sits: The warrior sheathes his sword and sits back down,
inn.aldric_event_resumes_drink: resuming his drink as if nothing happened.
inn.aldric_event_innkeeper_thanks: The innkeeper rushes over: "Aldric, you old dog! Drinks on the house!"
inn.aldric_event_aldric_nods: The warrior — Aldric — nods and raises his mug.
inn.aldric_event_approach_prompt: You notice Aldric glancing your way. Approach him? (Y/N):
inn.aldric_event_approaches: You walk over to Aldric's table.
inn.aldric_event_aldric_greeting: "Not bad timing, friend. Name's Aldric. Buy me a drink sometime"
inn.aldric_event_aldric_nods_menu: He nods toward the inn's menu board.
inn.aldric_event_aldric_hint: "I'm usually here most evenings. If you ever need a sword arm..."
inn.aldric_event_aldric_wink: He trails off with a knowing wink.
inn.aldric_event_relationship_up: Your relationship with Aldric has improved!
inn.aldric_event_watches: You watch from your table as Aldric returns to his drink.
inn.aldric_event_remember: You'll remember him if you ever need a capable fighter.
inn.desc_smoky: The inn is smoky and full of adventurers.
inn.desc_flickering: Flickering torchlight casts long shadows on the walls.
inn.desc_seth_corner: Seth Able sits in a dark corner, sharpening his blade.
inn.desc_seth_look: He looks up as you enter, a dangerous glint in his eye.
inn.desc_seth_desc: Seth Able — the most feared warrior in the realm.
inn.desc_seth_legends: Legends say he once defeated an entire dungeon floor alone.
inn.aldric_teaser_booth: In a corner booth, a broad-shouldered warrior in battered armor
inn.aldric_teaser_drink: nurses a drink alone, watching the room with practiced eyes.
inn.aldric_teaser_scars: Old scars cross his arms, and his sword — leaning against the table —
inn.aldric_teaser_blade: has seen more battles than most soldiers see in a lifetime.
inn.aldric_teaser_notice: He notices you looking and raises his mug briefly before returning
inn.aldric_teaser_attention: his attention to the room. Something about him says 'worth knowing.'
inn.invalid_choice: Invalid choice. Type 'look' to redraw menu.
inn.drink_cost: A drink costs {0} gold. You have {1} gold.
inn.drink_mana_restored: The magical brew restores your mind. (+{0} MP)
inn.drink_stamina_restored: The hearty ale invigorates you. (+{0} Stamina)
inn.seth_warning_low: Seth laughs at you. "Come back when you've grown a bit, kid."
inn.seth_warning_mid: Seth eyes you warily. "You sure about this, friend?"
inn.seth_warning_high: Seth nods respectfully. "A worthy challenger approaches."
inn.seth_challenge_prompt: Challenge Seth Able to a duel? (Y/N):
inn.seth_ready: Seth stands up, cracking his knuckles...
inn.seth_too_low: Seth is too powerful for you right now. Come back stronger!
inn.seth_victory_impressed: Seth wipes the blood from his lip and grins.
inn.seth_victory_gold: Seth pays you {0} gold as a wager!
inn.seth_victory_teaches: Seth teaches you a combat technique!
inn.seth_defeat_quote: Seth sheathes his sword and helps you up.
inn.seth_defeat_advice: "Not bad, but not good enough. Train harder."
inn.seth_defeat_cost: You lose {0} gold from the wager.
inn.seth_fled_quote: Seth shakes his head as you retreat.
inn.seth_fled_taunt: "Running already? I expected more from you."
inn.patrons_none: The inn is empty. Not a soul in sight.
inn.patrons_count: You see {0} patrons in the inn:
inn.patrons_interact_prompt: Talk to someone? (Enter name or press Enter to leave):
inn.challenge_npc_gold_gained: You won {0} gold from the duel!
inn.gift_cant_afford: You don't have that much gold!
inn.drinking_game_desc: The drinking contest is a test of constitution and luck!
inn.drinking_game_rules: Match drinks with your opponent. Last one standing wins!
inn.drinking_game_opponent: Your opponent is {0}, a seasoned drinker.
inn.drinking_game_you_barely: You can barely keep your eyes open...
inn.drinking_game_you_pass_out: You pass out face-first on the table!
inn.drinking_game_draw: It's a draw! You both pass out at the same time.
inn.drinking_game_con_bonus: Your constitution has improved from the ordeal! (+1 CON)
inn.drinking_game_no_opponents: There's nobody here willing to drink with you.
inn.drunk_comment_1: "Did I ever tell you about the time I..." *hiccup*
inn.drunk_comment_2: "You're my besht friend, you know that?"
inn.drunk_comment_4: "One more round! I can take it!"
inn.drunk_comment_5: "Who put the floor so close to my face?"
inn.gossip_static_1: "They say the dungeon goes down a hundred floors..."
inn.gossip_static_2: "The old gods still sleep beneath the earth."
inn.gossip_static_3: "Never trust a man who drinks alone at the inn."
inn.gossip_static_4: "The weapon shop gets new stock every few levels."
inn.gossip_static_5: "There's a secret passage in the dungeon, they say."
inn.gossip_static_6: "The healer charges too much, if you ask me."
inn.gossip_static_7: "Stay away from the dark alley at night."
inn.gossip_static_8: "The king is always watching from his castle."
inn.gossip_no_rumors: Nobody seems to have any gossip today.
inn.rest_lean_back: You lean back in your chair and close your eyes...
inn.rest_no_recovery: You don't need to rest right now.
inn.rest_dream_header: You drift off and have a strange dream...
inn.sleep_cost: A room costs {0} gold per night.
inn.sleep_settle_in: You settle into the straw mattress and close your eyes.
inn.food_option_feast: Adventurer's Feast ({0}g) - Restores {1} HP, +{2} to all stats for {3} combats
inn.food_buff_applied: You feel empowered! Stats boosted for {0} combats.
inn.recruit_requirements_not_met: You don't meet the requirements to recruit {0}.
inn.recruit_party_full: Your party is full! You can have at most {0} companions.
inn.switch_activated: {0} is now ACTIVE and will join you in combat.
inn.switch_deactivated: {0} is now INACTIVE and will wait at the inn.
inn.switch_max_active: You already have the maximum number of active companions!
inn.companion_dialogue_aldric_1: "The dungeon holds many secrets. Stay close and I'll watch your back."
inn.companion_dialogue_aldric_2: "Another day, another fight. That's the life we chose."
inn.companion_dialogue_vex_1: "These pockets won't pick themselves. Let's find some marks."
inn.companion_dialogue_vex_2: "Trust is a luxury in our line of work. But you're alright."
inn.companion_dialogue_lyris_1: "The Old Gods speak through the wind. Can you hear them?"
inn.companion_dialogue_lyris_2: "Magic flows through everything. You just need to know where to look."
inn.companion_dialogue_mira_1: "Let me check those wounds. A healthy adventurer is a live one."
inn.companion_dialogue_mira_2: "The temple trained me well, but the dungeon teaches more."
inn.companion_dialogue_melodia_1: "Every battle has a rhythm. Let me find the right song for ours."
inn.companion_dialogue_melodia_2: "The old ballads speak of heroes. Perhaps we'll write a new one."
inn.quest_no_quest: {0} doesn't have a personal quest available right now.
inn.romance_loyalty_low: Your bond with {0} isn't strong enough yet.
inn.romance_milestone_4: "{0} leans close and whispers something tender."
inn.gift_companion_gold_given: You give {0} gold to {1}. Their loyalty increases!
inn.gift_companion_potion_given: You give a potion to {0}. Their loyalty increases!
inn.gift_companion_no_potions: You don't have any potions to give.

inn.training_welcome: The Training Master nods as you approach.
inn.training_cant_afford: You can't afford that training session!
inn.training_max_reached: "You've reached the peak of what I can teach for {0}."
inn.gambling_desc: A smoky back room where fortunes are won and lost.
inn.high_low_rules: Guess if the next roll will be higher or lower. 3 wins = jackpot!
inn.skull_rules: Get as close to 21 as you can without going over.
inn.skull_blackjack: SKULL & BONES! Natural 21! You win {0} gold!
inn.arm_wrestle_desc: Test your might against another patron!
inn.arm_wrestle_you_push: You push with all your might!
inn.arm_wrestle_you_win: You slam their arm down! Victory!
inn.arm_wrestle_no_opponents: Nobody wants to arm wrestle right now.

inn.rent_settling_in: You settle into your room for the night...
inn.attack_sleeper_desc: The following adventurers are sleeping at the inn:
inn.attack_sleeper_no_one: No one is sleeping at the inn right now.
inn.attack_sleeper_cowardly: You creep toward the sleeping adventurer...
inn.attack_sleeper_guard_wins: {0}'s guard defeated you! You slink away in shame.
inn.attack_sleeper_xp_gained: You gained {0} XP for the cowardly act.
inn.attack_sleeper_defeat: {0} fought you off! You retreat in shame.
inn.attack_sleeper_mercy: You decide to show mercy and leave.

spell_learning.no_magic: Only magical professions can learn spells here.
spell_learning.menu_sr: 1-9. Equip or change slot, C. Clear slot, A. Auto-fill
spell_learning.menu_sr_2: L followed by number to learn spell (e.g. L5), F followed by number to forget spell, X. Exit

spell_learning.need_level: You need to be level {0} to learn this spell!

music_shop.melodia_own_inshop: Melodia hesitates, then plays something she hasn't played in a long time.
music_shop.melodia_own_adv: Cadence picks up the lute carefully. "Melodia wrote this one. She taught it to me before she left."
music_shop.melodia_own_dead: Cadence's hands tremble slightly. "This was hers. The last song she taught me."
music_shop.recruit_curious_smile: Melodia looks up from her lute and gives you a curious smile.
music_shop.recruit_new1: "You're new around here, aren't you? The dungeon hasn't had
music_shop.recruit_new2: a chance to leave its mark on you yet."
music_shop.recruit_new4: "Come back when you've seen a bit more of the world."
music_shop.recruit_mid1: "You're starting to carry yourself like someone who's been
music_shop.recruit_mid2: down there. I can see it in the way you walk — a little more
music_shop.recruit_mid4: She tilts her head, studying you.
music_shop.recruit_mid5: "Keep at it. You've got the look of someone with a story
music_shop.recruit_high1: "You've been busy. I hear things, you know — the walls have
music_shop.recruit_high2: ears, and so do the instruments."
music_shop.recruit_high3: Her fingers find a melancholy tune on the lute strings.
music_shop.recruit_high4: "I used to do what you do. Part of me misses it terribly."
music_shop.recruit_high5: She shakes her head. "Not yet. But soon, I think."
music_shop.recruit_ready1: Melodia sets down her lute and looks at you intently.
music_shop.recruit_ready2: "I've heard whispers of your adventures through the dungeon.
music_shop.recruit_ready3: The monsters you've faced, the gods you've encountered..."
music_shop.recruit_ready4: She leans forward, her eyes bright with curiosity.
music_shop.recruit_ready5: "I used to travel with adventurers, you know. Before they fell.
music_shop.recruit_ready6: I chronicled their deeds in song. Every victory, every loss."
music_shop.recruit_ready7: "Tell me — would you let a bard tag along? I promise I'm more
music_shop.recruit_ready8: useful than I look. My songs can heal, inspire, and... well,
music_shop.recruit_ready9: the right discordant note can shatter a monster's focus."
music_shop.recruit_ready10: She glances at Cadence, who nods eagerly.
music_shop.recruit_ready11: "Don't worry about the shop. Cadence has been ready to run
music_shop.recruit_ready12: this place on her own for a while now. Haven't you, dear?"
music_shop.recruit_ready13: Cadence grins. "Go! I'll keep the instruments in tune."
music_shop.recruit_join_prompt: Would you like Melodia to join your party? [Y/N]
music_shop.recruit_success1: Melodia beams and grabs her instrument.
music_shop.recruit_success2: "This is going to make the best song yet! Let's go!"
music_shop.recruit_success3: Cadence waves from behind the counter as you leave together.

quest.hand_over_item: You hand over your {0} to the Merchant Guild.
intimacy.connection_perfect: A perfect connection. You and {0} are in complete harmony.
intimacy.connection_strong: A strong connection. You and {0} understand each other well.
intimacy.connection_pleasant: A pleasant encounter. You're still learning what {0} likes.
intimacy.connection_awkward: An awkward encounter. You and {0} aren't quite in sync yet.
intimacy.lovers_bliss: You feel empowered by your bond. (Lover's Bliss: +10% damage/defense for 5 combats)
intimacy.fade_first_time: You and {0} share an intimate moment together
intimacy.fade_first_time2: {0} eyes meet yours with nervous excitement.
intimacy.fade_familiar: You and {0} share a tender, intimate moment together.
intimacy.fade_familiar2: The familiarity between you makes it all the sweeter.
intimacy.fade_later: Later, you lie together in comfortable silence.
intimacy.fade_bond_stronger: Your bond with each other has grown stronger.
intimacy.mood_tender: A tender, loving atmosphere fills the air...
intimacy.mood_passionate: Passion crackles between you like lightning...
intimacy.mood_rough: Raw desire drives you both with urgent need...
intimacy.mood_playful: Laughter and teasing give way to something more...
intimacy.mood_kinky: Anticipation of forbidden pleasures hangs heavy...
intimacy.mood_romantic: Candlelight and whispered promises set the scene...
intimacy.mood_quick: There's no time for pretense - only need...
intimacy.anticipation_alone: The door closes behind you, and suddenly you're alone with {0}.
intimacy.anticipation_turns: {0} turns to face you, eyes dark with desire.
intimacy.choice_slow: Take it slow - savor the moment
intimacy.what_whisper: What do you whisper to them?
intimacy.reaction_matched: {0}'s eyes light up. This is exactly what {1} wanted.
intimacy.reaction_unmatched: {0} smiles, going along with your lead.
intimacy.pregnancy_partner_tells: {0} takes your hands, a mysterious smile on {1} face.
intimacy.pregnancy_partner_tells2: {0}... I have something to tell you.
intimacy.pregnancy_partner_belly: She places your hand on {0} belly.
intimacy.pregnancy_announcement: We're going to have a baby.
intimacy.pregnancy_player_feeling: You've been feeling strange lately. Different.
intimacy.pregnancy_player_sickness: When {0} notices your morning sickness, {1} goes pale.
intimacy.pregnancy_player_nods: You nod, tears in your eyes. "We're going to have a baby."
intimacy.baby_born: After nine months, a healthy {0} is born!
intimacy.family_grown: Your family has grown. Visit Love Corner to see your children.
character_creation.no_rerolls: No re-rolls remaining - these are your final stats!
character_creation.press_enter_accept: Press Enter to accept and continue...
character_creation.race_desc.human: Balanced in all areas. Can be any class.
character_creation.race_desc.hobbit: Small but agile. Excellent rogues and rangers.
character_creation.race_desc.elf: Graceful and magical. Excellent mages and clerics.
character_creation.race_desc.half_elf: Versatile like humans. Can be any class.
character_creation.race_desc.dwarf: Strong and tough. Great warriors, but distrust magic.
character_creation.race_desc.orc: Aggressive fighters with limited magic ability.
character_creation.race_desc.gnome: Small and clever. Great mages, poor heavy fighters.
character_creation.race_desc.gnoll: Pack hunters with a poisonous bite.
character_creation.race_desc.mutant: Chaotic and unpredictable. Can be any class.
character_creation.class_desc.warrior: Strong fighters, masters of weapons. Balanced and reliable.
character_creation.class_desc.barbarian: Savage fighters with incredible strength and endurance.
character_creation.class_desc.paladin: Holy warriors of virtue. Strong in combat and spirit.
character_creation.class_desc.ranger: Woodsmen and trackers. Balanced fighters with survival skills.
character_creation.class_desc.assassin: Deadly killers, masters of stealth and critical strikes.
character_creation.class_desc.bard: Party support through song. CHA scales damage. Songs buff the whole party.
character_creation.class_desc.jester: Chaotic trickster. CHA scales damage. Trickster's Luck: random combat procs.
character_creation.class_desc.magician: Arcane master. Arcane Mastery: +15% spell damage. Best offensive caster.
character_creation.class_desc.sage: Scholars and wise magic users. The deepest mana reserves.
character_creation.class_desc.cleric: Healers and holy magic users. Devoted to faith and wisdom.
character_creation.class_desc.alchemist: Bomb-throwing scientists. INT scales damage. Potion Mastery: +50% healing.
character_creation.class_str.warrior: High HP, STR, DEF, CON. Well-rounded melee.
character_creation.class_str.barbarian: Highest HP, STR, STA, CON. Raw power.
character_creation.class_str.paladin: High HP, STR, STA, CON. Tough and honorable.
character_creation.class_str.ranger: Good STA, DEX. Jack of all trades.
character_creation.class_str.assassin: Best DEX. High STR and AGI for ambushes.
character_creation.class_str.bard: Good CHA, DEX. Balanced across all stats.
character_creation.class_str.jester: Best AGI and CHA. Trickster's Luck: bonus dmg, dodge, or stamina.
character_creation.class_str.magician: Best INT. Arcane Mastery +15% spell damage.
character_creation.class_str.sage: Best WIS and INT. Deepest mana pool (50).
character_creation.class_str.cleric: Good WIS and CHA. Healing magic and mana.
character_creation.class_str.alchemist: Best WIS and INT. High CHA for trading.
betrayal.header_sacrifice: A   S A C R I F I C E
betrayal.header_betrayal: B E T R A Y A L
betrayal.header_forgiveness: F O R G I V E N E S S
betrayal.header_revenge: R E V E N G E
betrayal.eyes_changed: Something in their eyes has changed.
betrayal.sacrifice_not_malice: This was not malice. This was love.
betrayal.sacrifice_ultimate_price: A love willing to pay the ultimate price.
betrayal.perhaps_not_end: Perhaps... this doesn't have to be the end.
betrayal.understanding_bridge: Understanding might still bridge this chasm.
betrayal.wounds_too_deep: Some wounds cut too deep to heal.
betrayal.broken_not_mended: What is broken cannot always be mended.
betrayal.ocean_understanding: A distant understanding stirs within you...
betrayal.ocean_wave_crashes: The wave that crashes against you was once part of the same ocean.
betrayal.conditions_not_met: The conditions for forgiveness have not yet been met.
betrayal.forgive_release: In forgiving, you release yourself from the weight of resentment.
betrayal.wave_forgives_shore: The wave forgives the shore for breaking it.
betrayal.flinch_expecting: They flinch, expecting anger. Expecting justice.
betrayal.forgive_understand: I understand why you did what you did.
betrayal.forgive_disagree: I don't agree. I may never agree.
betrayal.forgive_let_go: But I choose to let go of this weight.
betrayal.neither_speak: For a moment, neither of you speak.
betrayal.perhaps_not: Perhaps not. But we rarely get what we deserve.
betrayal.choose_to_give: We get what we choose to give.
betrayal.door_now_open: But a door that was closed... is now open.
betrayal.path_vengeance: You have chosen the path of vengeance.
betrayal.eye_for_eye: An eye for an eye. Blood for blood.
betrayal.no_plea_mercy: Their last breath carries no plea for mercy.
betrayal.weight_remains: But the weight... the weight remains.
betrayal.violence_begets: Violence begets violence. The wave crashes, but the ocean remains.
grief.header_memories: M E M O R I E S
grief.silence_answer: The silence is your only answer.
grief.ash_feeds_soil: "But ash feeds the soil. New things grow."
grief.voice_clearer: The voice is clearer now, gentle but firm:
grief.voice_fades_echo: "A voice fades, but the echo remains."
grief.every_choice_carries: "Every choice you make carries them forward."
grief.voice_compassion: The voice speaks with infinite compassion:
grief.river_not_mourn: "A river does not mourn the water that has passed."
grief.river_flows_on: "It flows on, carrying what was into what will be."
grief.grief_river_backward: "Your grief is the river trying to flow backward."
grief.waiting_at_sea: "They are waiting for you at the sea."
grief.voice_quiet_whisper: The voice is quiet now. Almost a whisper:
grief.loved_them_hurts: "You loved them. That is why it hurts."
grief.hurt_is_price: "The hurt is not a flaw. It is the price."
grief.never_loved_at_all: "Would you rather have never loved at all?"
grief.change_permanent: "They changed you. That change is permanent."
grief.grief_passed: The grief has passed. The memory remains.
grief.effect_anger: Rage empowers your attacks but leaves you vulnerable.
grief.effect_depression: The weight of sorrow crushes your spirit.
grief.effect_acceptance: You have made peace with loss.
grief.npc_wise_denial: I see the shadow of loss upon you. But you are not yet ready to face it.
grief.npc_wise_anger: Your rage burns bright. Use it, but do not let it consume you.
grief.npc_wise_bargaining: There are no bargains to be made with death. Only acceptance.
grief.npc_wise_depression: The weight of sorrow is heavy. But it, too, shall pass.
grief.npc_wise_acceptance: You have weathered the storm. You are stronger for it.
grief.npc_casual_denial: You seem... distracted. Is everything alright?
grief.npc_casual_anger: Whoa, easy there! What's got you so worked up?
grief.npc_casual_bargaining: You're looking for something. I can tell. What is it?
grief.npc_casual_depression: Hey... you don't look so good. Need to talk?
grief.npc_casual_acceptance: There's something different about you. Wiser, maybe.
grief.atmo_denial: You could swear you see {0}'s face in the crowd. But when you look again, they're gone.
grief.atmo_anger: Your blood runs hot. Every enemy reminds you of what you've lost.
grief.atmo_bargaining: If only you could go back. Change things. Save {0}. There must be a way...
grief.atmo_depression: The world seems gray. {0}'s absence is a weight on your chest.
grief.atmo_acceptance: You think of {0} and smile. The pain remains, but it no longer defines you.

seals.deep_understanding: A deep understanding settles into your soul...
seals.resonate_power: The seals resonate with ancient power.
seals.uncovered_history: You have uncovered the complete history of the gods.
seals.face_manwe_see_more: When you face Manwe, you will see more than others.
seals.understand_choices: You will understand his choices. His regrets.
seals.true_ending_possible: THE TRUE ENDING IS NOW POSSIBLE
seals.fourth_path: If you can meet certain conditions, a fourth path opens.
seals.not_destroyer: Not destroyer. Not savior. Not defiant.

artifact.artifacts_resonate: The six artifacts you carry begin to resonate.
artifact.light_shadow_dance: Light and shadow dance around you.
artifact.tear_opens: A tear opens in the fabric of existence...
artifact.void_key_desc1: From the void between worlds, a key of pure nothing
artifact.void_key_desc2: materializes before you. It is absence given form,
artifact.voice_whispers: A voice that is no voice whispers in your mind.
artifact.seek_prison: "Seek the Creator's Prison at dungeon level 100."
artifact.journey_end: "There, your journey will end. One way or another."

magic_shop.desc_1: Shelves of potions, crystals, and arcane artifacts line the walls.
magic_shop.desc_2: Enchanted items hum softly, and the air shimmers with residual magic.
magic_shop.desc_3: A gnome perches on a high stool behind the counter, surrounded by tomes.
magic_shop.desc_4: The scent of dried herbs and ozone hangs in the air.
magic_shop.visual_align_discount: Your {0} alignment grants you a {1}% discount!
magic_shop.visual_loyalty: Loyal Customer: {0}% discount on all services!

magic_shop.potion_no_gold: {0} looks at your empty purse and shakes head.
magic_shop.curse_intro_2: Curses are tricky things. Let me see what burdens you carry...

magic_shop.curse_remains: The curse remains. Return when you have the means.

magic_shop.curse_scene_3: With a flash of light, the curse shatters!
magic_shop.curse_scene_4: The item gleams, freed from its dark burden.
magic_shop.curse_scene_5: The dark energy dissipates into nothingness.
magic_shop.curse_aftermath_1: It is done. The darkness has been lifted.
magic_shop.curse_aftermath_2: Be more careful what you pick up in the dungeon.
magic_shop.curse_aftermath_3: "May fortune favor you in your travels."

magic_shop.old_choose_item: Choose item to enchant (0 to cancel):

street_encounter.brawl.title: STREET BRAWL!
street_encounter.brawl.reason_ale: "You drank the last ale!" A furious patron shoves you!
street_encounter.brawl.reason_dice: "You cheated at dice!" A gambler throws the table aside!
street_encounter.brawl.reason_insult: "You looked at me funny!" shouts an angry stranger!
street_encounter.brawl.reason_bar_fight: A bar fight spills out into the street - and you're caught in the middle!
street_encounter.brawl.reason_mercenary: A bored mercenary is looking for trouble - and found you!
street_encounter.brawl.reason_seat: "That's MY seat!" Someone shoves you hard from behind!
street_encounter.brawl.duck_escape: You duck under a wild swing and slip away into the crowd!
street_encounter.brawl.hit_by_mug: A thrown mug catches you in the head as you try to escape!
street_encounter.brawl.buy_round: You buy a round of drinks for the house!
street_encounter.brawl.toast_health: "To your health!" The angry patron calms down and raises a toast.
street_encounter.brawl.msg_bought_drinks: Bought drinks to defuse the situation.
street_encounter.brawl.not_enough_gold: You don't have enough gold for drinks! The brawler attacks!
street_encounter.challenge.title: FORMAL CHALLENGE!
street_encounter.challenge.walks_up: {0} walks up to you with a confident stride.
street_encounter.challenge.info: "{0} the {1}, I challenge you to an honorable duel!"
street_encounter.mugging.title: MUGGED!
street_encounter.gang.title: GANG CONFRONTATION!
street_encounter.gang.block_path: A group of {0} gang members blocks the street!
street_encounter.romance.title: ROMANTIC ENCOUNTER
street_encounter.romance.approaches: {0} approaches you with a warm smile.
street_encounter.merchant.title: STREET MERCHANT
street_encounter.beggar.title: STREET BEGGAR
street_encounter.beggar.spare_coins: "Please, spare some coins? I haven't eaten in days..."
street_encounter.rumor.title: RUMOR MILL
street_encounter.guard.title: GUARD PATROL!
street_encounter.ambush.title: AMBUSH!
street_encounter.ambush.assassin_appears: An assassin drops from the rooftops!
street_encounter.ambush.first_strike: They strike before you can react! (-{0} HP)
street_encounter.ambush.victory_note: You find a note: "Contract on {0}. Payment: {1}g."
street_encounter.bribe.offer: You offer a bribe of {0} gold.
street_encounter.talk.try_reason: You try to reason with them...
street_encounter.attack.title: COMBAT!

street_encounter.turf.surrender: Your team cedes control of the area. A humiliating defeat.
street_encounter.murder.sanctioned: The kill was sanctioned. No legal consequences.

opening_story.skip_hint: Press SPACE to skip ahead at any time
opening_story.parchment_crumbles: The parchment crumbles to dust in your hands.
opening_story.words_burn: But the words burn in your mind.
opening_story.tip_explore: Explore the town. Visit the shops, the inn, the temple.
opening_story.tip_equip: Buy equipment at the weapon and armor shops.
opening_story.tip_dungeon: Enter the Dungeons to fight monsters and grow stronger.
opening_story.tip_seals: Search for the Seven Seals hidden in the dungeon depths.
opening_story.tip_dreams: Pay attention to your dreams. They hold truths.
opening_story.press_enter_journey: Press Enter to begin your journey...
opening_story.welcome: Welcome to the world of Usurper.
opening_story.may_you_find: May you find what you are looking for.
opening_story.remember_forgotten: Or remember what you have forgotten.
opening_story.echoes_power: Echoes of past cycles strengthen you:
opening_story.press_enter_cycle: Press Enter to begin the cycle anew...
opening.shadows_lengthen: The shadows around you lengthen unnaturally.
opening.time_pauses: For a moment, time itself seems to pause.
opening.priest_approaches: A temple priest approaches you, looking troubled.
opening.priest_mark: "You... you bear the mark of the Seals," he whispers.
opening.priest_visions: "The priests have seen visions. You must know:"
opening.priest_first_seal: "The first Seal lies deep in the dungeon, on the 15th level."
opening.priest_25th_level: "But beware — on the 25th level, something ancient stirs."
opening.priest_god_of_war: "Maelketh, the God of War, is awakening."
opening.priest_be_ready: "Be ready when you reach those depths. Be ready."
opening.priest_fades: The priest fades back into the crowd.
opening.tremor: A deep tremor runs through the ground beneath your feet.
opening.tankards_rattle: Tankards rattle on tables. Dust falls from the rafters.
opening.veteran_turns: A grizzled veteran at the bar turns to you.
opening.veteran_god_awakens: "{0} is awakening. The dungeon grows more dangerous."
opening.veteran_dangerous: "If you're planning to go deep, do it soon."
opening.familiar_voice: A familiar voice echoes in the void:
opening.wheel_turns: "The wheel turns. The wave returns to the ocean."
opening.you_remember: "But you... you remember. You always remember a little more."
opening.carry_forward: You carry forward the echoes of past cycles:
opening.bonus_artifacts: Artifact locations are revealed from the start
opening.bonus_key: You begin with the Ancient Key
opening.press_enter_new_cycle: Press Enter to begin the new cycle...
opening.cycle_ocean_remembers: The Ocean remembers your true ending
old_god.save_artifact_works: You raise the artifact. Light erupts from within it.
old_god.save_corruption_peels: The corruption peels away like ash in a flame.
old_god.save_something_clean: Something clean and bright emerges from beneath.
old_god.save_i_remember: "I... I remember. I remember what I was."
old_god.save_xp_reward: You gain {0} experience for your mercy.
old_god.save_chivalry: +100 Chivalry — Your mercy is noted by the universe.
old_god.say_nothing: You say nothing. Your silence speaks for you.
old_god.god_stares: {0} stares at you for a long moment.
old_god.maelketh_silence_rage: Your silence enrages me! So be it!
old_god.ground_trembles: The ground trembles beneath your feet...
old_god.ancient_power_stirs: An ancient power stirs in the darkness...
old_god.warning_less_damage: Your unenchanted weapon will deal {0}% less damage.
old_god.warning_enchant: Find an enchanted weapon to bypass this protection!
old_god.press_enter_face: Press Enter to face the Old God...
old_god.mod_fury_bright: Your fury burns bright! +25% damage, -15% defense, +15% crit
old_god.mod_maelketh_teachings: Maelketh's teachings guide you. +20% defense, boss -15% damage
old_god.mod_veloura_hostile: Veloura turns hostile! +15% damage, but she fights harder too
old_god.mod_veloura_empathy: Your empathy weakens Veloura's resolve. Boss -20% damage
old_god.mod_veloura_mercy: A mercy kill. Veloura accepts her fate. Boss -30% defense
old_god.mod_thorgrim_defiant: Thorgrim judges your defiance harshly. Boss +15% damage
old_god.mod_thorgrim_broken: Thorgrim's logic is shattered! Boss confused, -25% damage, -15% defense
old_god.mod_noctura_teaching: Noctura holds back, teaching through combat.
old_god.mod_noctura_teaching_stats: Boss at 50% power, -30% defense. Your damage +15%.
old_god.mod_noctura_enraged: Noctura is enraged by your rejection!
old_god.mod_noctura_enraged_stats: Boss +25% damage. Your crits harder to land.
old_god.mod_noctura_standard: Noctura regards you with cold indifference.
old_god.mod_aurelion_defiant: Your defiance empowers you! +20% damage, -10% defense
old_god.mod_aurelion_humble: Your humility softens Aurelion. Boss -15% damage, +15% defense
old_god.mod_terravok_destructive: Your destructive path angers Terravok! +30% damage, boss +20% damage
old_god.mod_terravok_respectful: Your respect weakens Terravok's will to fight. Boss -10% damage
old_god.mod_terravok_neutral: Terravok engages you with ancient patience.
old_god.mod_manwe_compassion: Your compassion shakes Manwe's conviction. Boss -20% damage, -15% defense
old_god.mod_manwe_allies: Your allied gods lend their power! +20% damage and defense
old_god.mod_manwe_saved_gods: The gods you saved weaken Manwe's resolve. Boss -15% damage
old_god.mod_manwe_destroyed: The power of destroyed gods courses through you! +35% damage, +20% crit
old_god.mod_defiant_spirit: Your defiant spirit adds +50 bonus damage!
old_god.mod_willing_hero: The willing hero stands firm. +30 bonus defense!
old_god.saved_seeing_world: For the first time in millennia, the god is seeing the world clearly.
old_god.heart_of_ocean: You found a Heart of the Ocean!
old_god.defeated_fades: {0} fades into nothing, a final whisper on the wind.
old_god.defeat_hit_ground: You hit the ground hard. {0} looms above you.
old_god.defeat_pulls_back: But something pulls you back from the edge.
old_god.defeat_wake_up: You wake up, battered but alive. The god is gone.

encounter.tavern.title: The Hidden Tavern
encounter.tavern.subtitle: A Dungeon Oasis
encounter.tavern.desc_1: You push aside a crumbling wall to discover a hidden tavern,
encounter.tavern.desc_2: lit by guttering candles and smelling of ale and pipe smoke.
encounter.tavern.desc_3: A grizzled bartender polishes a glass behind the counter.
encounter.tavern.bartender_greet: The bartender looks up as you enter.
encounter.tavern.option_rest: Rest in Back Room (200g) - Full heal + cure poison
encounter.tavern.ale_heal: The ale warms your belly and soothes your wounds. (+{0} HP)
encounter.tavern.no_coin: "No coin, no ale. That's how it works down here."
encounter.tavern.rest_sleep: You collapse onto a straw mattress in the back room...
encounter.tavern.rest_refreshed: You wake refreshed, wounds healed and poison cleared.
encounter.tavern.leave_msg: You slip back into the dungeon, the tavern's warmth fading behind you.
encounter.tavern.gamble_intro_1: A scarred man in the corner beckons you to his table.
encounter.tavern.gamble_intro_2: "Simple game. High card wins. You in?"
encounter.tavern.gamble_lose: You lose! The dealer sweeps the gold away.
encounter.tavern.gamble_tie: It's a tie! Your bet is returned.
encounter.tavern.stranger_intro_1: A hooded figure at the bar gestures you closer.
encounter.tavern.stranger_potion_1: "Found these on a dead adventurer. No use to him now."
encounter.tavern.stranger_potion_2: The stranger slides three healing potions across the table.
encounter.tavern.stranger_map: The stranger hands you a tattered map fragment with cryptic markings.
encounter.tavern.stranger_map_reward: Studying the map reveals dungeon secrets. (+{0} XP)
encounter.tavern.stranger_tip: "Watch for the shadows that don't move. That's where they hide."
encounter.tavern.stranger_tip_nod: You nod, filing away the advice.
encounter.tavern.stranger_deal_1: The stranger leans in close. "I have a proposition."
encounter.tavern.stranger_deal_2: "I can enhance your combat prowess... for a price."
encounter.tavern.stranger_deal_3: "Nothing material. Just a... favor, to be collected later."
encounter.tavern.stranger_deal_accept: Dark energy flows into you. The stranger smiles.
encounter.tavern.stranger_deal_refuse: "Your loss." The stranger melts back into the shadows.
encounter.tavern.stranger_drunk_1: The stranger is thoroughly drunk and rambles incoherently.
encounter.tavern.stranger_drunk_2: You nod politely and back away slowly.
encounter.minstrel.title: Wandering Minstrel
encounter.minstrel.desc_1: A minstrel sits cross-legged in the corridor, tuning a lute.
encounter.minstrel.desc_2: "A song for the brave adventurer? Each melody carries power."
encounter.minstrel.valor_play: The minstrel plays a rousing war march!
encounter.minstrel.valor_effect: Your blood surges with battle fury!
encounter.minstrel.warding_play: A haunting melody wraps around you like ethereal armor.
encounter.minstrel.healing_play: Soft, soothing notes wash over your wounds...
encounter.minstrel.ballad_compose: The song will be sung in taverns across the land!
encounter.minstrel.ballad_no_gold: "A ballad requires coin for ink and parchment, friend."
encounter.minstrel.listen_leave: You listen to a pleasant tune and feel slightly wiser.
encounter.fairy.title: Fairy Circle
encounter.fairy.desc_1: A ring of glowing mushrooms encircles a clearing.
encounter.fairy.desc_2: Tiny lights dance in the air, and you hear distant laughter.
encounter.fairy.desc_3: The fairy queen appears in a shower of sparkles!
encounter.fairy.blessing_good: The fairy queen smiles and touches your forehead...
encounter.fairy.blessing_hp: Your wounds close! HP fully restored!
encounter.fairy.blessing_mana: Magical energy surges through you! Mana fully restored!
encounter.fairy.blessing_bad_2: "You are not worthy of our gifts today."
encounter.fairy.blessing_bad_gold: A handful of gold vanishes from your pouch! (-10% gold)
encounter.fairy.steal_success: You grab a handful of glowing fairy dust!
encounter.fairy.steal_value: It's worth {0} gold to the right buyer!
encounter.fairy.steal_darkness: +20 Darkness. The fey will remember this.
encounter.fairy.steal_damage: Tiny arrows prick you from all directions! (-{0} HP)
encounter.fairy.dance_join: You join the fairy dance, whirling in the mushroom ring...
encounter.fairy.dance_spin: The world spins and colors blur together...
encounter.fairy.dance_blur: Time itself seems to bend around you...
encounter.fairy.dance_younger: You feel years younger! Full HP, Mana, and XP gained!
encounter.fairy.dance_gold: Your pockets suddenly feel heavier with fairy gold!
encounter.fairy.dance_queen_kiss: The fairy queen kisses your cheek!
encounter.fairy.dance_time_1: You dance for what feels like minutes...
encounter.fairy.dance_time_2: But days may have passed in the world above.
encounter.fairy.dance_language: You suddenly understand the language of the fey!
encounter.fairy.leave_1: You bow respectfully to the fairy queen.
encounter.fairy.leave_2: She waves and the circle fades from sight.
encounter.damsel.title: Damsel in Distress
encounter.damsel.rescue_desc_1: A young woman is cornered by a group of dungeon thugs!
encounter.damsel.rescue_desc_2: She screams for help as they close in!
encounter.damsel.rescue_charge: You charge in with weapon drawn!
encounter.damsel.rescue_scatter: The thugs scatter before your fury!
encounter.damsel.rescue_thanks_1: "Thank you, brave adventurer! You saved my life!"
encounter.damsel.rescue_thanks_2: She presses a bag of gold into your hands.
encounter.damsel.rescue_blush: She blushes and kisses your cheek before departing.
encounter.damsel.watch_hide: You hide in the shadows and observe...
encounter.damsel.watch_kick: The woman suddenly kicks the leader between the legs!
encounter.damsel.watch_dispatch: She dispatches the thugs with hidden daggers!
encounter.damsel.watch_wink: She winks at you in the shadows.
encounter.damsel.watch_thanks: "Thanks for not interfering. Here, for your discretion."
encounter.damsel.ignore_walk: You walk away as the screams fade behind you.
encounter.damsel.trap_desc_1: A beautiful woman lies bound at the edge of a pit.
encounter.damsel.trap_desc_2: "Please help me! I've been trapped here for days!"
encounter.damsel.trap_grab: As you reach for the ropes, she grabs your arm!
encounter.damsel.trap_grin: Her face shifts into a demonic grin!
encounter.damsel.trap_fool: "Fool!" she hisses as dark energy drains from you!
encounter.damsel.trap_succubus_damage: The succubus drains {0} HP from you!
encounter.damsel.trap_caution_1: You approach carefully, testing each step...
encounter.damsel.trap_caution_2: You notice the illusion shimmer and step back!
encounter.damsel.trap_caution_saved: Your caution saves you from the trap! +XP for wisdom!
encounter.damsel.trap_leave: Something feels wrong. You leave quietly.
encounter.damsel.princess_desc_1: You find a finely dressed young woman hiding behind a pillar.
encounter.damsel.princess_desc_2: She wears a golden circlet - this is royalty!
encounter.damsel.princess_desc_3: "Please, I was kidnapped! Help me return to the castle!"
encounter.damsel.princess_escort_1: You guide the princess through the dungeon corridors...
encounter.damsel.princess_escort_2: After a treacherous journey, you reach the surface safely!
encounter.damsel.princess_escort_reward: The royal court rewards you handsomely!
encounter.damsel.princess_ransom_1: You send a ransom note to the castle.
encounter.damsel.princess_ransom_2: The gold arrives... but so does your reputation.
encounter.damsel.princess_ransom_rep: -100 Chivalry. You are branded a villain.
encounter.damsel.princess_leave_2: "Please! Don't leave me here!" Her cries echo behind you.
encounter.damsel.warrior_desc_1: A fierce warrior woman battles a group of skeletons!
encounter.damsel.warrior_desc_2: She fights with incredible skill but is outnumbered!
encounter.damsel.warrior_join_1: You leap into the fray beside her!
encounter.damsel.warrior_join_2: Together you make short work of the undead!
encounter.damsel.warrior_join_3: "Well fought!" she laughs, wiping ichor from her blade.
encounter.damsel.warrior_join_4: "I'm Sera. Been fighting down here for weeks."
encounter.damsel.warrior_join_5: "Take this - I found more than I can carry."
encounter.damsel.warrior_team_hint: "If you ever need a fighting partner, come find me at the Inn."
encounter.damsel.warrior_watch_1: You watch as she fights alone...
encounter.damsel.warrior_watch_3: She sees you watching and scowls. "Thanks for nothing."
encounter.ghost.title: The Usurper's Ghost
encounter.ghost.desc_1: A shimmering figure materializes before you.
encounter.ghost.desc_2: It wears the crown and armor of an ancient king.
encounter.ghost.greet_1: "I am the ghost of a former Usurper..."
encounter.ghost.greet_2: "I once ruled this land, long ago."
encounter.ghost.greet_3: "But power is fleeting, and now I wander."
encounter.ghost.greet_4: "What would you ask of one who has seen it all?"
encounter.ghost.lore_1: "Ah, the old days... when Usurper was just a BBS door game."
encounter.ghost.lore_2: "Players would dial in on their modems at 2400 baud..."
encounter.ghost.lore_3: "Fight monsters, steal the throne, and leave rude messages."
encounter.ghost.lore_5: "And here we are, still fighting after all these years."
encounter.ghost.advice_2: "The deeper you go, the stronger you become."
encounter.ghost.advice_3: "But never fight what you cannot defeat."
encounter.ghost.advice_4: "Equip the best gear you can find."
encounter.ghost.advice_5: "And always keep healing potions in reserve."
encounter.ghost.friend_1: "A friend? How long has it been..."
encounter.ghost.friend_2: "You remind me of myself, long ago."
encounter.ghost.friend_3: "Take this, from one adventurer to another."
encounter.ghost.farewell_1: "Remember... every Usurper was once just an adventurer."
encounter.ghost.farewell_2: The ghost fades away with a knowing smile.
encounter.demons.title: Gambling Demons
encounter.demons.desc_1: Three demons sit around a floating table of bone and fire.
encounter.demons.desc_2: They roll dice made from the teeth of fallen angels.
encounter.demons.greet_1: "Ahh, fresh meat! Care for a game?"
encounter.demons.play_2: The demons' eyes glow with anticipation.
encounter.demons.wager_soul: Wager a Piece of Your Soul
encounter.demons.soul_win_stats: +10 Strength, +10 Intelligence! Power flows into you!
encounter.demons.leave_1: "Coward! Come back when you have nerve!"
encounter.demons.leave_2: The demons' laughter follows you into the darkness.
encounter.hermit.title: The Old Hermit
encounter.hermit.desc_1: An old man sits beside a small fire in an alcove.
encounter.hermit.desc_2: His eyes are kind but ancient, seeing things unseen.
encounter.hermit.desc_3: A pot of soup bubbles over the fire.
encounter.hermit.sit_1: You sit beside the hermit in comfortable silence...
encounter.hermit.sit_peace: A deep peace washes over you.
encounter.hermit.ask_2: "The dungeon reflects your soul. Fight with honor."
encounter.hermit.ask_3: "And never trust a door that opens too easily."
encounter.hermit.give_2: "Generosity in the deep places... rare indeed."
encounter.hermit.give_3: "Let me give you something in return."
encounter.hermit.give_amulet: He gives you a glowing amulet! +5 Strength!
encounter.hermit.give_potions: He fills all your potion bottles!
encounter.hermit.give_nothing: You have nothing to give. The hermit nods understandingly.
encounter.hermit.leave_msg: You nod to the hermit and continue on your way.
encounter.merchant.title: Mysterious Merchant
encounter.merchant.desc_1: A merchant in a dark cloak has set up shop in a dead-end corridor.
encounter.merchant.desc_2: Strange items glow on a floating carpet before him.
encounter.merchant.desc_3: "Welcome, welcome! Rare goods for the discerning adventurer!"
encounter.merchant.item_elixir: Stat Elixir ({0}g) - Random +5 to a stat
encounter.merchant.potion_drink: The potion heals all your wounds! HP fully restored!
encounter.merchant.elixir_str: The elixir surges through you! +5 Strength!
encounter.merchant.elixir_cha: You glow with inner light! +5 Charisma!
encounter.merchant.mystery_power: Raw power surges through you! +10 Str, +10 Def!
encounter.merchant.mystery_empty: The box is empty! You've been swindled!
encounter.merchant.mystery_elixirs: Elixirs of restoration! HP, Mana, and Potions fully restored!
encounter.merchant.info_1: "The deeper floors hold ancient seals of power."
encounter.merchant.info_2: "Collect them all to unlock the truth about the Old Gods."
encounter.merchant.info_3: "But beware... the gods themselves guard the deepest levels."
encounter.merchant.leave_msg: The merchant bows. "Until next time, adventurer."
encounter.timewarp.title: Time Warp
encounter.timewarp.desc_1: The air shimmers and distorts around you!
encounter.timewarp.desc_2: You feel yourself being pulled through time...
encounter.timewarp.future_1: You glimpse a future version of yourself!
encounter.timewarp.future_2: Your future self tosses you a bag of gold!
encounter.timewarp.battle_1: You are pulled into a legendary battle from the past!
encounter.timewarp.battle_2: Fighting alongside ancient heroes, you gain experience!
encounter.timewarp.age_2: You age rapidly before the effect fades!
encounter.timewarp.young_2: Your body is restored to peak condition!
encounter.timewarp.death_1: You witness your own death in a possible future...
encounter.timewarp.death_2: The vision is terrifying but instructive.
encounter.timewarp.death_3: You learn to defend against your future killer's techniques.
encounter.timewarp.end: The time distortion fades. You are back in the present.
encounter.library.title: Ancient Library
encounter.library.desc_1: Towering bookshelves stretch into darkness above.
encounter.library.desc_2: Dusty tomes and scrolls fill every surface.
encounter.library.desc_3: A magical light flickers, preserving this knowledge for ages.
encounter.library.history_study: You read tales of ancient heroes...
encounter.library.map_reward: Following the map, you find {0} gold!
encounter.library.map_nothing: The maps are too faded to read. You find nothing useful.
encounter.library.leave_msg: You carefully close the last book and leave the library.
encounter.well.title: The Wishing Well
encounter.well.desc_1: An ancient well stands in a grotto, water glowing faintly.
encounter.well.desc_2: Coins glitter at the bottom - offerings from past adventurers.
encounter.well.desc_3: A sign reads: "Throw a coin, make a wish."
encounter.well.throw_coin: You toss a gold coin into the well...
encounter.well.wish_granted: The well glows! Your wish is granted!
encounter.well.wish_gold: Gold coins float up from the depths!
encounter.well.wish_wisdom: Visions of ancient wisdom fill your mind!
encounter.well.wish_returned: But spits out more coins than you put in! +150 gold!
encounter.well.dive: You dive into the cold water...
encounter.well.dive_success: You surface with handfuls of coins! +{0} gold!
encounter.well.dive_angry: A water spirit is angered by your greed!
encounter.well.dive_damage: It blasts you with freezing water! (-{0} HP)
encounter.well.dive_escape: You scramble out of the well, gasping!
encounter.arena.title: Portal to the Arena
encounter.arena.desc_1: A shimmering red portal stands before you.
encounter.arena.desc_2: Through it, you can see a gladiatorial arena!
encounter.arena.crowd_roars: The crowd roars as you appear!
encounter.arena.defeat: You are carried from the arena, barely alive.
encounter.arena.fled: You flee the arena. The crowd boos.
encounter.arena.empty: The arena is strangely empty today.
encounter.arena.leave_1: You step away from the portal.
encounter.arena.leave_2: The crowd's cheering fades as the portal closes.
encounter.bone_oracle.title: The Bone Oracle
encounter.bone_oracle.desc_1: A figure made entirely of bones sits upon a throne of skulls.
encounter.bone_oracle.desc_2: Its empty eye sockets glow with pale blue light.
encounter.bone_oracle.prophecy_0: "Death comes for us all... but not today for you."
encounter.bone_oracle.prophecy_1: "Your shields will hold when others break."
encounter.bone_oracle.prophecy_2: "Honor serves you well in the battles ahead."
encounter.bone_oracle.dungeon_1: "The dead whisper secrets of these halls..."
encounter.bone_oracle.dungeon_2: "Beware the sealed chambers. They hold ancient power."
encounter.bone_oracle.dungeon_3: "The Old Gods stir in the deepest places."
encounter.spirits.title: Restless Spirits
encounter.spirits.desc_1: Translucent figures drift through the walls, wailing softly.
encounter.spirits.desc_2: These spirits seem trapped between worlds.
encounter.spirits.help_1: You speak words of comfort to the spirits...
encounter.spirits.help_2: One by one, they begin to glow with warm light.
encounter.spirits.help_3: "Thank you..." they whisper as they fade to peace.
encounter.spirits.attack_1: You swing at the spirits, but your weapon passes through!
encounter.spirits.attack_2: The spirits retaliate with chilling screams!
encounter.crypt.desc_1: A withered figure in tattered robes tends to ancient coffins.
encounter.crypt.trade_success: The Crypt Keeper hands you two vials of healing potion.
encounter.crypt.hint_seal_1: "I sense an ancient seal nearby... floor {0} holds power."
encounter.crypt.hint_god_2: "Prepare yourself well before seeking that audience."
encounter.crypt.hint_low_1: "The upper floors are just the beginning."
encounter.crypt.hint_mid_1: "You've come far, but the real challenges await."
encounter.crypt.hint_generic_1: "The dead see much that the living miss."
encounter.tomb.desc_1: A massive stone sarcophagus dominates this chamber.
encounter.tomb.desc_2: Gold offerings surround it, left by ancient mourners.
encounter.tomb.desc_3: The lid is sealed but looks movable with effort.
encounter.tomb.open_push: You strain against the heavy stone lid...
encounter.tomb.open_mummy: A mummy lurches out and claws at you!
encounter.tomb.open_mummy_treasure: But the treasure inside is worth the pain!
encounter.tomb.open_dust_1: The sarcophagus contains only dust and a golden amulet.
encounter.tomb.open_dust_2: The amulet pulses with ancient power!
encounter.tomb.take_careful: You carefully pocket the gold offerings.
encounter.ratking.desc_1: A massive rat, the size of a dog, sits atop a pile of refuse.
encounter.ratking.desc_2: Hundreds of smaller rats swarm around it protectively.
encounter.ratking.desc_3: The Rat King squeaks imperiously. It wants tribute!
encounter.ratking.pay_accept: The Rat King accepts your offering.
encounter.ratking.pay_pass: The rats part, revealing a hidden cache behind them!
encounter.ratking.pay_cache: The Rat King's hoard is impressive!
encounter.ratking.fight_swarm: The rats swarm over you, biting and scratching!
encounter.ratking.fight_damage: -{0} HP from a thousand tiny bites!
encounter.ratking.fight_slay: You slay the Rat King! Its hoard is yours!
encounter.ratking.run_flee: You flee the rats, their squeaking echoing behind you.
encounter.child.desc_1: A small child huddles in the corner, crying softly.
encounter.child.desc_2: "I'm lost... I can't find my way home..."
encounter.child.help_guide: You guide the child through the tunnels to safety.
encounter.child.check_trap_1: The child is an illusion! It's a trap!
encounter.child.check_trap_2: Poison darts fly from the walls!
encounter.child.check_safe: It seems to be a real child. You help them safely.
encounter.child.ignore_walk: You walk away, ignoring the crying child.
encounter.alchemy.title: Abandoned Alchemist Lab
encounter.alchemy.desc_1: Glass vials and bubbling cauldrons fill this hidden laboratory.
encounter.alchemy.desc_2: Colorful potions line the shelves. Most look unstable.
encounter.alchemy.drink_gulp: You grab a random vial and gulp it down...
encounter.alchemy.drink_power: Raw power surges through you! +5 Strength!
encounter.alchemy.drink_health: Your wounds knit together! HP fully restored!
encounter.alchemy.drink_poison: Poison! The potion burns your insides!
encounter.alchemy.drink_invisible: You flicker in and out of visibility! +3 Dexterity!
encounter.alchemy.read_notes: The notes contain valuable alchemical knowledge.
encounter.alchemy.steal_grab: You grab potions and gold from the lab!
encounter.hoard.title: 💰 Treasure Hoard! 💰
encounter.hoard.desc_1: A massive pile of gold and gems fills this chamber!
encounter.hoard.desc_2: It glitters enticingly in the torchlight.
encounter.hoard.trap_thieves: TRAP! Bandits spring from behind the pile!
encounter.hoard.trap_grab: You fight them off but manage to grab some gold!
encounter.hoard.some_pocket: You carefully pocket some gold and gems.
encounter.hoard.leave_caution: Your caution serves you well. You leave the bait untouched.
encounter.crystal.title: ✨ Crystal Cave ✨
encounter.crystal.desc_1: Massive crystals jut from every surface, humming with energy.
encounter.crystal.desc_2: The air crackles with magical potential.
encounter.crystal.good_1: The crystals resonate with your magical aura!
encounter.crystal.bad: A crystal shatters, sending shards into you! Ouch!
encounter.dragon_hoard.title: 🐉 Dragon's Hoard 🐉
encounter.dragon_hoard.desc_1: A sleeping dragon guards an immense pile of gold.
encounter.dragon_hoard.desc_2: You carefully, VERY carefully, reach for the treasure...
encounter.dwarven.desc_1: A small dwarven camp, complete with forge and ale barrel.
encounter.dwarven.desc_2: The dwarves welcome you warmly and share their provisions.
encounter.dwarven.reward_1: The dwarves share their healing supplies!
encounter.lake.desc_1: A vast underground lake stretches before you.
encounter.lake.desc_2: The water glows with a soft blue light.
encounter.lake.reward: The magical waters restore you completely! HP and Mana restored!
encounter.golem.desc_1: A massive stone golem blocks your path.
encounter.golem.riddle: "I have keys but open no locks. I have space but no room. You can enter but can't go inside. What am I?"
encounter.golem.correct: "Correct! You may pass." The golem steps aside.
encounter.capsule.desc_1: A sealed metal container from another era.
encounter.capsule.desc_2: Inside you find ancient coins and a scroll of knowledge.
encounter.fountain.desc: A fountain of glowing water springs from the dungeon floor.
encounter.fountain.reward: The healing waters cure all ailments! HP, Mana restored! Poison cured!
encounter.civilization.desc_1: Ruins of an ancient civilization stretch before you.
encounter.civilization.desc_2: Knowledge of their ways floods into your mind.
encounter.demon_bargain.desc_1: A demon offers you a dark bargain.
encounter.demon_bargain.desc_2: "Power for your soul... a fair trade, no?"
encounter.demon_bargain.accept_result: +10 Strength, but +100 Darkness corrupts your soul!
encounter.demon_bargain.refuse_result: You refuse the demon's offer. Your soul remains your own.
encounter.tortured.desc: Souls writhe in torment. You offer them words of comfort.
encounter.tortured.reward: +30 Chivalry! Your compassion brings them peace.
encounter.forge.title: Infernal Forge
encounter.forge.desc_1: A massive forge burns with hellfire.
encounter.forge.desc_2: Demonic smiths hammer at weapons of dark power.
encounter.forge.desc_3: One of them notices you and beckons.
encounter.forge.desc_4: "Let me improve your weapon, mortal. Free of charge... this time."
encounter.forge.reward: Your weapon glows with infernal power! +5 Weapon Power!
encounter.succubus.desc_1: A beautiful figure emerges from the shadows.
encounter.succubus.desc_2: "Come closer, darling... let me ease your pain."
encounter.succubus.succumb_result: The succubus drains your life force! -HP, -20% Gold!
encounter.frozen.desc_1: A frozen adventurer's remains hold useful supplies.
encounter.frozen.desc_2: Their journey ended, but yours continues.
encounter.frozen.reward: You salvage gold and healing potions from the remains.
encounter.ice_queen.title: 👑 The Ice Queen 👑
encounter.ice_queen.desc_1: A beautiful queen made of living ice regards you coolly.
encounter.ice_queen.desc_2: "You intrigue me, mortal. Accept my blessing."
encounter.yeti.desc_1: You stumble into a yeti's lair!
encounter.yeti.mauled: The yeti mauls you before you escape! But you find its treasure!
encounter.yeti.back_away: You back away slowly... the yeti lets you go.
encounter.aurora.title: ✨ Aurora Vision ✨
encounter.aurora.desc_1: Impossible northern lights dance in the underground sky.
encounter.aurora.desc_2: The beauty fills you with wonder and peace.
encounter.fire_elemental.title: Fire Elemental
encounter.fire_elemental.desc_1: A being of pure flame dances before you.
encounter.fire_elemental.desc_2: It shares its knowledge of fire magic before departing.
encounter.lava_boat.desc_1: A boatman offers to ferry you across a river of lava.
encounter.lava_boat.desc_2: "500 gold, and I'll take you to the other side."
encounter.lava_boat.cross: The journey reveals hidden dungeon knowledge! +{0} XP!
encounter.lava_boat.no_gold: "No gold, no ride. Swim if you dare."
encounter.phoenix.desc_1: A magnificent phoenix sits upon a nest of embers.
encounter.phoenix.desc_2: It touches you with a burning feather.
encounter.phoenix.reward: The phoenix's fire heals you! Full HP, +5 Constitution!
encounter.mirror.desc_1: A mirror of polished obsidian shows your reflection.
encounter.mirror.desc_2: But your reflection is stronger, smarter, faster...
encounter.mirror.reward: You absorb your reflection's power! +2 STR, +2 INT, +2 DEX!
encounter.void.desc: The void between realities whispers forbidden knowledge.
encounter.reality.title: Reality Tear
encounter.reality.desc_1: A tear in the fabric of reality pulses before you.
encounter.reality.desc_2: Things fall through from other dimensions...
encounter.reality.bad: Void energy lashes out at you! Ouch!
encounter.cosmic.desc_1: A being of incomprehensible scale regards you.
encounter.cosmic.desc_2: It imparts a fraction of its cosmic knowledge.
encounter.madness.desc_1: A pool of swirling, iridescent liquid bubbles before you.
encounter.madness.desc_2: Staring into it, you see impossible geometries.
encounter.madness.look_good: The madness reveals hidden truths! +10 INT, +50 Darkness!
encounter.madness.look_bad: The visions shatter your mind! -5 Intelligence!
encounter.madness.avoid: You wisely look away. Some knowledge is not worth the price.
inn.mood_tired: They look tired and worn from battle.
inn.mood_relaxed: They seem relaxed and at ease.
inn.drinking_need_gold: You need at least 20 gold to enter the drinking contest!
inn.drinking_not_enough_patrons: There aren't enough patrons in the bar for a contest!
inn.drinking_jump_bar: You jump up on the bar counter!
inn.drinking_challenge_shout: "Come on you lazy boozers! I challenge you to a drinking contest!"
inn.drinking_silence: There is a sudden silence in the room
inn.drinking_rowdy_approach: Then a rowdy bunch of characters make their way toward you...
inn.drink_ale_desc: Ale            - Easy going, more rounds to survive
inn.drink_stout_desc: Stout          - A solid choice for serious drinkers
inn.drink_bomber_desc: Seth's Bomber  - Rocket fuel! Only the brave dare...
inn.drinking_bow_success1: You stand up steadily and bow to the crowd.
inn.drinking_bow_success2: "I know my limits, friends. Good luck to you all!"
inn.drinking_bow_success3: The crowd gives a polite, if disappointed, round of applause.
inn.drinking_bow_fail1: You try to stand up but your legs wobble...
inn.drinking_bow_fail2: "Sit back down! You're not going anywhere!"
inn.drinking_bow_fail3: The crowd pushes another drink into your hand!
inn.drinking_laughter: You hear evil laughter as you stagger around the room...
inn.drinking_failed: You didn't make it, you drunken rat!
inn.drinking_opp_reels: starts to reel round in a daze!
inn.drinking_opp_falls: Everybody laughs as {0} staggers and falls to the floor!
inn.contest_stayed_sober: You managed to stay sober longer than the rest!

base.fragment_truth: (A fragment of truth settles into your consciousness...)
base.npc_gift_dialogue: "I never thanked you properly. Take this - it's not much, but..."
base.npc_catches_eye: {0} catches your eye and walks over.
base.tip_weapons: "I heard there are powerful weapons hidden on the deeper dungeon floors. Be careful down there."
base.tip_healer: "A word of advice - the healer offers better prices if you buy in bulk."
base.tip_training: "I've been training at the gym lately. You should try it - the results are worth it."
base.tip_temple: "The temple priests have been acting strange lately. Something is troubling them."
base.tip_marketplace: "Keep an eye on the marketplace. Rare goods come through every now and then."
base.compliment1: "Good to see you, friend. This town's a better place with you in it."
base.compliment2: "I've heard stories about your adventures. Impressive stuff."
base.compliment3: "You know, people around here look up to you. Keep it up."
base.compliment4: "I was just telling someone about you the other day. All good things, of course."
base.npc_heal_dialogue: "You look like you could use this. Stay safe out there."
base.threat1: "I know what you did. Stay away from me and mine, or next time we won't be talking."
base.threat2: "You've got a lot of nerve showing your face around here."
base.threat3: "Watch your back. Not everyone around here is as forgiving as I am."
base.npc_catches_arm: {0} catches your arm as you pass.
base.warning_talking: "People are talking about you. And not in a good way. You might want to lay low."
base.npc_stares_down: {0} stares you down from across the room.
base.hand_on_pommel: Their hand rests pointedly on the pommel of their weapon.

dungeon.riddle_deeper: The riddle's deeper meaning resonates within you...

dungeon.moved_on: But whatever dwelt in this place... has moved on.

dungeon.sanctuary_no_benefit: The sanctuary offers no additional benefit.

dungeon.feel_stronger: When it clears, you feel younger, stronger!
dungeon.ghost_find_seek: "There you will find what you seek..."

dungeon.portal_opens: A magical portal suddenly opens beneath you!
dungeon.gold_rains: Gold coins rain from the ceiling!
dungeon.lore_library_1: Dust motes dance in pale light from an unknown source.
dungeon.lore_library_2: Ancient tomes line walls that stretch beyond sight.
dungeon.lore_library_tome: A tome floats down from the shelves, opening before you...
dungeon.lore_library_burns: The words burn into your memory...
dungeon.lore_library_stirs: Something stirs in the depths of your consciousness...
dungeon.lore_library_nothing: You browse the ancient texts, but find nothing new.
dungeon.lore_library_known: The knowledge here already lives within you.
dungeon.memory_mirrors_1: The walls here are mirrors, but they don't show your reflection.
dungeon.memory_mirrors_2: They show... someone else. Someone familiar.
dungeon.memory_fades: The vision fades, but the feeling remains.
dungeon.memory_fragments: The mirrors show fragments of a life not quite your own.
dungeon.memory_not_yet: You sense there is more to remember, but not here. Not yet.
dungeon.settlement_poison_cured: The poison in your veins is drawn out.
dungeon.settlement_no_heal_needed: "You look healthy enough to me. Save your coin."
dungeon.battle_breaks_open: As the battle ends, something breaks open in your mind...
dungeon.explore_1: You cautiously advance through the shadowy corridors...
dungeon.explore_2: Your footsteps echo in the ancient stone passages...
dungeon.explore_3: Flickering torchlight reveals mysterious doorways ahead...
dungeon.explore_4: The air grows colder as you venture deeper into the dungeon...
dungeon.explore_5: Strange sounds echo from the darkness beyond...
dungeon.companion_warning: WARNING: Companions can die permanently. Guard her well.
dungeon.pixie_appears: A tiny glowing pixie darts through the corridor!
dungeon.pixie_giggles: She flits about trailing sparkles of light, giggling mischievously.
dungeon.pixie_caught: You snatch the pixie gently from the air!
dungeon.pixie_eyes: She looks up at you with sparkling eyes...
dungeon.pixie_kiss_quote: "Oh! You're quick! Very well, a kiss for the clever one!"
dungeon.pixie_restored: The pixie's kiss fills you with warmth. You feel completely restored!
dungeon.pixie_blessing: A pixie blessing settles over you! (+15% damage/defense for 5 combats)
dungeon.pixie_blessing_stronger: Your existing blessing grows stronger! (+3 bonus combat rounds)
dungeon.pixie_gold: She sprinkles pixie dust that turns to gold! (+{0} gold)
dungeon.pixie_vanish: The pixie winks and vanishes in a shower of sparkles.
dungeon.pixie_dust: She blows a cloud of sparkling dust in your face!
dungeon.pixie_poisoned: The pixie dust makes you feel queasy... you've been poisoned!
dungeon.pixie_steals: She snatches {0} gold from your pouch as she flies away!
dungeon.pixie_cackles: The pixie cackles and disappears in a puff of glitter.
dungeon.pixie_watch: You watch the pixie flit away, her laughter echoing off the walls.
dungeon.pixie_alone: Perhaps some things are best left alone.
dungeon.riddle_foolish_mortal: Foolish mortal. There is a price for failure.
dungeon.seal_ancient_power: As you explore the room, an ancient power stirs...
dungeon.seal_stone_tablet: Hidden beneath the dust of ages, you find a stone tablet.
dungeon.seal_divine_energy: It pulses with divine energy, warm to the touch.
dungeon.seal_seven_seals: This is one of the Seven Seals - the truth of the Old Gods.
dungeon.artifact_header: A DIVINE ARTIFACT PULSES WITH POWER!

base.rumor_king: The king grows paranoid. He sees enemies everywhere.
base.rumor_creature: Deep in the dungeon, there's a creature that guards untold riches.
base.rumor_lower_levels: Some adventurers never return from the lower levels. Choose your depth wisely.
base.rumor_dark_alley: I've heard whispers of a hidden shop in the Dark Alley...

base.rumor_castle: There's talk of a secret passage in the castle. But I've said too much.

base.rumor_veloura: I've heard there's a way to save Veloura... if you have the courage to try.

dormitory.creep_toward_npc: You creep toward {0}'s bunk, weapon drawn...
dormitory.creep_toward_player: You creep toward {0}'s bunk, weapon drawn...
dormitory.fought_off_player: {0} fought you off even in their sleep!
dungeon.group_leader_not_entered: Your group leader hasn't entered the dungeon yet.
dungeon.wait_for_leader: Wait for your leader to enter first, then follow them in.
dungeon.sr_subtitle: Abandon all hope ye who enter here
dungeon.respawned: [The dungeon's dark magic has drawn new creatures from the depths...]
dungeon.god_awaits_return: {0} awaits your return. You have the artifact.
dungeon.god_awaits_rescue: {0} awaits rescue. Seek the artifact on deeper floors.
dungeon.seal_on_floor: [!] This floor contains a Seal of Truth. Explore carefully.
dungeon.seal_already_collected: [i] The seal on this floor has already been collected.
dungeon.story_depths_1: As you descend to level 10, the air grows heavier.
dungeon.story_depths_2: The walls here are older, carved by hands that predate memory.
dungeon.story_depths_3: You notice strange symbols repeated throughout - seven interlocking circles.
dungeon.story_depths_4: A pattern that tugs at something deep within you...
dungeon.story_battlefield_1: The stones here are stained with something old.
dungeon.story_battlefield_2: Not rust. Not mortal blood. Something... golden.
dungeon.story_battlefield_3: Weapons of impossible design litter the ground.
dungeon.story_battlefield_4: Too large for human hands. Too heavy for mortal arms.
dungeon.story_battlefield_5: Something terrible happened here, long before history began.
dungeon.story_battlefield_6: A SEAL OF TRUTH lies hidden on this floor.
dungeon.story_battlefield_7: Seek a shrine, library, or sacred chamber to find it.
dungeon.story_whispers_1: You hear it now - a voice at the edge of perception.
dungeon.story_whispers_2: Not speaking to you. Speaking AS you.
dungeon.story_whispers_5: The voice knows your true name.
dungeon.story_shrine_1: Seven statues stand in a circle, faces worn by time.
dungeon.story_shrine_2: But something is wrong with them.
dungeon.story_shrine_3: The stone itself seems... sick. Twisted.
dungeon.story_shrine_4: As if the sculptures were changed after they were made.
dungeon.story_shrine_5: Beautiful forms warped into something grotesque.
dungeon.story_shrine_6: What force could corrupt stone itself?
dungeon.story_shrine_7: A SEAL OF TRUTH awaits those who seek answers here.
dungeon.veloura_warmth: You feel a familiar warmth as you step onto this floor...
dungeon.veloura_senses: Veloura senses your return - and what you carry.
dungeon.story_prison_2: Not prison cells for mortals - these are vast. Cathedral-sized.
dungeon.story_prison_3: The bars are made of something that isn't metal.
dungeon.story_prison_4: Something that hums with power even now.
dungeon.story_prison_5: Whatever was kept here was immense. And angry.
dungeon.story_prison_6: Claw marks scar the walls, deeper than any blade could cut.
dungeon.story_prison_7: A SEAL OF TRUTH holds the answer to who was imprisoned here.
dungeon.story_oracle_1: A skeleton sits upon a throne of bone.
dungeon.story_oracle_2: In death, she still clutches a crystal orb.
dungeon.story_oracle_3: The Oracle. The last mortal to speak with the gods.
dungeon.story_oracle_4: She saw the future before she died.
dungeon.story_oracle_5: And what she saw made her weep.
dungeon.story_oracle_6: Words are carved into the stone at her feet:
dungeon.story_oracle_8: A SEAL OF TRUTH awaits. It holds her final prophecy.
dungeon.ground_trembles: The ground trembles. An ancient presence stirs...
dungeon.face_maelketh: Do you wish to face Maelketh, the Broken Blade? (Y/N)
dungeon.god_retreats: You sense the god retreating back into slumber... for now.
dungeon.story_soulweaver_1: Deep within this forgotten chamber, something ancient calls to you...
dungeon.story_soulweaver_2: A device of impossible delicacy sits upon a stone pedestal.
dungeon.story_soulweaver_3: Threads of light drift from it like spider silk in a breeze.
dungeon.story_soulweaver_4: This is the Soulweaver's Loom - the artifact that can undo divine corruption.
dungeon.story_soulweaver_5: The very thing you promised to find.
dungeon.remember_veloura: You remember your promise to Veloura on floor 40.
dungeon.return_veloura_loom: Return to her with the Loom to complete the save.
dungeon.story_soulweaver_price_1: The Soulweaver's Loom pulses with power in your hands.
dungeon.story_soulweaver_price_2: And before you stands someone you never expected to see again...
dungeon.story_echoes_1: You see yourself in the walls.
dungeon.story_echoes_6: Manwe sends a fragment of himself to experience mortality.
dungeon.story_echoes_7: To learn. To grow. To remember what it means to be small.
dungeon.story_echoes_8: And at the end, the fragment returns...
dungeon.story_mourning_1: The walls here are made of crystal.
dungeon.story_mourning_4: As if these crystals formed from tears.
dungeon.story_mourning_5: Oceans of tears, shed over millennia.
dungeon.story_mourning_6: Frozen in stone. A monument to sorrow.
dungeon.story_mourning_7: Whose grief could fill a mountain?
dungeon.story_mourning_8: The SEAL OF TRUTH on this floor holds the answer.
dungeon.story_purging_1: Aurelion stands before you, radiant with divine light.
dungeon.story_purging_2: The Sunforged Blade burns bright in your hands.
dungeon.story_purging_3: 'You have earned this moment,' the God of Light speaks.
dungeon.story_purging_4: I offer you the power to end all darkness forever.
dungeon.story_threshold_1: You stand at the edge of understanding.
dungeon.story_threshold_5: You are the wave that remembered it was the ocean.
dungeon.story_threshold_6: And now the ocean must answer for what it has done.
dungeon.story_threshold_7: Collect the final seal if you have not.
dungeon.story_end_4: The god who broke his own children.
dungeon.story_end_5: The ocean that forgot it was water.
dungeon.story_end_7: - DESTROY him and take his power (Usurper)
dungeon.story_end_8: - SAVE him and restore the gods (Savior)
dungeon.story_end_9: - DEFY him and forge your own path (Defiant)
dungeon.story_end_10: Or, if you collected all Seven Seals...
dungeon.story_end_12: Choose wisely. This is the only choice that matters.
