dungeon.decline_pay: You decide not to pay. Your allies won't join you this time.
dungeon.god_fallen: The Old God has fallen. Their power flows into you.
dungeon.darkness_deepens: Your darkness deepens. You are becoming the Usurper.
dungeon.god_corruption_lifts: The Old God's corruption lifts. They remember who they were.
dungeon.divine_gratitude: A fragment of divine gratitude fills your heart.
dungeon.chivalry_grows: Your chivalry grows. You are becoming the Savior.
dungeon.god_alliance: The Old God sees something in you. An understanding.
dungeon.forged_alliance: You have forged an alliance beyond mortal comprehension.
dungeon.god_spared_hope: The Old God's eyes widen with something long forgotten - hope.
dungeon.god_spared_lingers: They fade from this place, but their presence lingers in your heart.
dungeon.promised_loom: You have promised to find the Soulweaver's Loom and return.
dungeon.artifact_deeper: The artifact lies somewhere deeper in the dungeon...
dungeon.chivalry_mercy: +75 Chivalry - Your mercy speaks louder than any blade.
dungeon.quest_started_loom: [QUEST STARTED] Find the Soulweaver's Loom and return to save this god.
dungeon.god_fled_retreat: You retreat from the divine presence.
dungeon.god_fled_wait: The Old God watches you go. They can wait.
dungeon.god_slayer_buff: Divine power surges through you! (+20% damage, +10% defense for {0} combats)
dungeon.emerge_steps: You climb the final steps out of the darkness.
dungeon.emerge_sunlight: Sunlight blinds you. The air tastes different up here — clean, alive.
dungeon.they_know: They know what you did down there. You {0} {1}.
dungeon.closing_defeated: The crowd parts as you walk toward the square. No one meets your eyes for long.
dungeon.closing_saved: You walk into the square and, for the first time in a while, the town feels lighter.
dungeon.closing_allied: You walk into the square. People whisper, but none dare speak against you.
dungeon.closing_spared: You walk into the square. Some nod with quiet respect. Others look away.
dungeon.breadcrumb_old_woman: As the crowd disperses, an old woman clutches your arm.
dungeon.react_maelketh_def_agg_1: The crowd parts before you. A veteran mutters under his breath.
dungeon.react_maelketh_def_agg_3: Children are hurried indoors. Shutters close.
dungeon.react_maelketh_def_hum_1: Children peek from behind their mothers as you emerge.
dungeon.react_maelketh_def_hum_3: An old soldier salutes you — the first real salute in years.
dungeon.react_maelketh_def_def_1: The crowd stares in disbelief. The god of war is gone.
dungeon.react_maelketh_def_def_2: A blacksmith sets down his hammer. \
dungeon.react_maelketh_sav_1: An old soldier weeps openly in the street.
dungeon.react_maelketh_sav_3: Someone starts a hymn. Others join, hesitantly at first, then with conviction.
dungeon.react_maelketh_other_1: The crowd watches you with cautious respect.
dungeon.react_veloura_def_agg_1: A couple clutches each other tightly as you pass.
dungeon.react_veloura_def_agg_3: The flower seller on the corner silently packs up her stall.
dungeon.react_veloura_def_merc_1: The crowd is quiet. A woman places a flower at the dungeon entrance.
dungeon.react_veloura_def_merc_2: someone says. Nobody argues. Nobody agrees.
dungeon.react_veloura_def_def_1: The town feels colder somehow, even in the sunlight.
dungeon.react_veloura_def_def_2: A bard stops mid-song, unable to remember the words to a love ballad.
dungeon.react_veloura_sav_1: The temple bells ring out across the town.
dungeon.react_veloura_sav_3: Strangers embrace in the street. Old grudges seem to soften.
dungeon.react_veloura_other_1: People seem warmer to each other as you walk through town.
dungeon.react_veloura_other_2: A young couple catches your eye and bows their heads in thanks.
dungeon.react_thorgrim_def_defy_1: The magistrate watches from his window, face pale.
dungeon.react_thorgrim_def_defy_2: Guards shift their grips on their spears as you pass.
dungeon.react_thorgrim_def_hon_1: The town judge removes his hat as you pass.
dungeon.react_thorgrim_def_def_1: The courthouse flag flies at half mast.
dungeon.react_thorgrim_def_def_2: Lawyers and judges whisper nervously. The law feels less certain today.
dungeon.react_thorgrim_sav_1: The town lines up in formal rows to bow as you enter.
dungeon.react_thorgrim_sav_3: A sense of order settles over the town like a warm blanket.
dungeon.react_thorgrim_other_1: The town watch stands a little straighter as you pass.
dungeon.react_noctura_ally_1: People avoid your eyes as you walk through the square.
dungeon.react_noctura_ally_2: The shadows you cast seem... longer than they should be.
dungeon.react_noctura_ally_3: The thieves' guild leaves a single black feather on your doorstep.
dungeon.react_noctura_def_agg_1: Lanterns blaze in every window tonight.
dungeon.react_noctura_def_agg_3: Some wonder quietly: who watches the dark now?
dungeon.react_noctura_def_def_1: The streetlamps seem brighter. The alleys less deep.
dungeon.react_noctura_sav_1: The thieves' guild raises a quiet toast behind closed doors.
dungeon.react_noctura_sav_2: The merchants double-check their locks tonight.
dungeon.react_noctura_sav_3: But the shadows feel... watchful. Protective, even.
dungeon.react_noctura_other_1: The town is quieter tonight. Calmer.
dungeon.react_noctura_other_2: Darkness falls as it always does, but it feels gentler somehow.
dungeon.react_aurelion_def_comp_1: The temple choir sings a dirge as news spreads.
dungeon.react_aurelion_def_comp_2: But the head priestess catches your eye and nods. She understands.
dungeon.react_aurelion_def_def_1: The priest falls to his knees in the street.
dungeon.react_aurelion_def_def_3: Storm clouds gather overhead. The town has never felt so dim.
dungeon.react_aurelion_sav_1: Golden light breaks through the clouds as you emerge.
dungeon.react_aurelion_sav_2: The crowd falls to their knees, tears streaming.
dungeon.react_aurelion_sav_3: The cry echoes from rooftop to rooftop.
dungeon.react_aurelion_sav_4: The temple bells ring in a pattern not heard in a thousand years.
dungeon.react_aurelion_other_1: The afternoon sun feels warmer than usual.
dungeon.react_aurelion_other_2: People shield their eyes, squinting upward, sensing something changed.
dungeon.react_terravok_def_resp_1: Stonemasons bow as you pass. They know stone better than anyone.
dungeon.react_terravok_def_def_1: The ground trembles beneath your feet as you emerge.
dungeon.react_terravok_def_def_2: Buildings creak. Dust falls from the rafters.
dungeon.react_terravok_def_def_3: someone whispers. No one has an answer.
dungeon.react_terravok_sav_1: The earth itself seems to sigh with relief.
dungeon.react_terravok_sav_2: Cracks in the town walls seal before your eyes.
dungeon.react_terravok_sav_3: The old well, dry for decades, begins to flow again.
dungeon.react_terravok_other_1: The cobblestones feel steadier under your feet.
dungeon.react_terravok_other_2: Miners nod to you from across the square. They feel it in the stone.
dungeon.react_default_1: The town watches you emerge from the dungeon in silence.
dungeon.react_default_2: Something has changed. Everyone can feel it.
dungeon.ambient_drips: Water drips somewhere in the darkness ahead.
dungeon.ambient_torch: Your torch gutters in an unseen draft.
dungeon.ambient_skitters: Something skitters faintly behind the walls.
dungeon.ambient_draft: A cold draft seeps through the stones.
dungeon.ambient_groan: The floor settles with a low groan.
dungeon.ambient_clang: A distant clang of metal echoes from deeper in.
dungeon.ambient_shadows: The shadows at the edge of your light seem to shift.
dungeon.breadcrumb_1: The walls here look older than the rest of the dungeon. Strange symbols are carved into the stone.
dungeon.breadcrumb_2: You get the uncomfortable feeling that something is watching you. Not a monster. Something else.
dungeon.breadcrumb_3: The shadows down here seem to move on their own sometimes. Probably just the torchlight.
dungeon.breadcrumb_4: You can hear something like slow, heavy breathing from deep below. It's probably just the wind.
dungeon.breadcrumb_5: The air down here tastes faintly of salt, like the ocean. That shouldn't be possible this far underground.
dungeon.breadcrumb_6: You catch a faint sound, almost like whispering, but you can't make out any words.
dungeon.breadcrumb_7: Your torch flickers and you notice something carved into the wall. It looks like a wave.
dungeon.breadcrumb_8: You pass a puddle and your reflection looks wrong somehow. When you look again, it's fine.

dungeon.guide_maelketh: BOSS: Maelketh, God of War awaits!
dungeon.guide_veloura: BOSS: Veloura, Goddess of Desire awaits!
dungeon.guide_thorgrim: BOSS: Thorgrim, God of Law awaits!
dungeon.guide_noctura: BOSS: Noctura, Goddess of Shadow awaits!
dungeon.guide_aurelion: BOSS: Aurelion, God of Light awaits!
dungeon.guide_terravok: BOSS: Terravok, God of Earth slumbers here!
dungeon.guide_manwe: FINALE: Manwe awaits. Your choices determine the ending.

dungeon.monster_hint_1: Shadows move at the edge of your torchlight...
dungeon.monster_hint_2: You hear hostile sounds from the darkness...
dungeon.monster_hint_3: Something is watching you from the shadows...
dungeon.monster_hint_4: The air feels thick with menace...
dungeon.room_treasure_glints: >> Something valuable glints in the darkness! <<
dungeon.trap_detect_assassin: >> Your trained eye spots a trap mechanism! <<
dungeon.trap_detect_ranger: >> Your instincts warn of hidden danger ahead! <<

dungeon.event_hint_settlement: >> Lights and voices ahead — a settlement! <<
dungeon.theme_catacombs: Ancient burial chambers filled with restless dead
dungeon.theme_sewers: Fetid tunnels crawling with vermin and worse
dungeon.theme_caverns: Natural caves carved by underground rivers
dungeon.theme_ruins: Crumbling remnants of a forgotten civilization
dungeon.theme_frozen: Ice-encrusted halls where cold itself hunts
dungeon.theme_volcanic: Molten rivers and scorching heat await
dungeon.theme_abyssal: Reality itself warps in these cursed depths
dungeon.theme_unknown: Dark passages wind into the unknown
dungeon.flavor_catacombs: Ancient burial grounds stretch before you. The dead do not rest easy here.
dungeon.flavor_sewers: The stench is overwhelming. Things lurk in the fetid waters below.
dungeon.flavor_caverns: Natural caves twist into darkness. Bioluminescent life casts eerie shadows.
dungeon.flavor_ruins: The ruins of a forgotten civilization. Magic still lingers in these stones.
dungeon.flavor_demon: Hell has bled into this place. Tortured screams echo endlessly.
dungeon.flavor_frozen: Impossible cold. Your breath freezes. Things are preserved in the ice.
dungeon.flavor_volcanic: Rivers of magma light the way. The heat is almost unbearable.
dungeon.flavor_abyssal: Reality breaks down here. What lurks beyond sanity itself?
dungeon.hint_seal_2: LORE: The Second Seal awaits - it tells of the first war between gods.
dungeon.hint_paradox_child: EVENT: The Possessed Child paradox may appear here. Choose wisely.
dungeon.hint_maelketh: BOSS: Maelketh, God of War, awaits in the depths of this floor!
dungeon.hint_seal_3: LORE: The Third Seal reveals how Manwe corrupted his own children.
dungeon.hint_veloura: BOSS: Veloura, Goddess of Desire, beckons from within this floor!
dungeon.hint_seal_4: LORE: The Fourth Seal tells of the eternal chains that bind the gods.
dungeon.hint_thorgrim: BOSS: Thorgrim, God of Law, holds court on this floor!
dungeon.hint_seal_5: LORE: The Fifth Seal contains a prophecy about your coming.
dungeon.hint_loom_discovery: EVENT: The Soulweaver's Loom awaits discovery in this chamber.
dungeon.hint_soulweaver_price: EVENT: The Soulweaver's Price - a moral choice awaits.
dungeon.hint_noctura: BOSS: Noctura, Goddess of Shadow, lurks in the darkness of this floor!
dungeon.hint_memory: MEMORY: Your forgotten past will surface here. Pay attention to dreams.
dungeon.hint_seal_6: LORE: The Sixth Seal shows Manwe's regret - his tears crystallized.
dungeon.hint_aurelion: BOSS: Aurelion, God of Light, radiates from within this floor!
dungeon.hint_destroy_darkness: EVENT: The Destroy Darkness paradox awaits those with the Sunforged Blade.
dungeon.hint_terravok: BOSS: Terravok, God of Earth, slumbers here. Will you wake him?
dungeon.hint_seal_final: LORE: The Final Seal awaits - the truth of the Ocean Philosophy.
dungeon.hint_manwe: FINALE: Manwe awaits. Your choices will determine the ending.
dungeon.hint_something_stirs: TIP: Something powerful stirs in the depths below...
dungeon.hint_ancient_power: TIP: Ancient power awaits those who dare descend further...
dungeon.confirm_leave: Leave the dungeon and return to town? (Y/N):
dungeon.chapter_awakening: The Awakening - A stranger in Dorashire
dungeon.chapter_stranger: The Stranger - Meeting the mysterious guide
dungeon.chapter_whispers: The Whispers - The gods begin to stir
dungeon.chapter_god_war: God War - The Old Gods awaken
dungeon.objective_explore: Explore the dungeons and grow stronger. Something awaits in the depths...
dungeon.objective_find_seals: Find the Seals of the Old Gods hidden throughout the dungeon. They hold the truth.
dungeon.objective_more_seals: Continue collecting Seals. Each one reveals more of the divine history.
dungeon.objective_deeper: Descend deeper. The remaining Seals await discovery in the abyss.
dungeon.objective_face_manwe: All Seals collected. Face Manwe, the Creator. Choose your ending.
dungeon.objective_ending: The story ends where it began. Seek your ending.
dungeon.lore_seals: - Seven Seals contain the history of the Old Gods
dungeon.lore_wave: - A voice calls you 'wave' - as if you are part of something larger
dungeon.lore_prophecy: - The prophecy speaks of 'one from beyond the veil' who will decide the gods' fate
dungeon.lore_corruption: - Manwe corrupted his own children - the Old Gods - to stop their war
dungeon.lore_imprisonment: - The gods have been imprisoned for ten thousand years, slowly going mad
dungeon.lore_ocean: - The 'Ocean Philosophy': You are not a wave fighting the ocean - you ARE the ocean
dungeon.lore_all_seals: - ALL SEALS COLLECTED - The true ending is now possible!
dungeon.lore_none_1: You have not yet discovered the deeper truths...
dungeon.lore_none_2: Explore the dungeons. Find the Seals. Remember who you are.
dungeon.step_seal_dungeon: - Seek the {0} in the dungeon depths
dungeon.step_grow: - Grow stronger to delve deeper into the dungeon
dungeon.step_level: - Continue leveling to access deeper dungeon floors
dungeon.step_descend: - Descend deeper. Ancient powers await in the abyss.
dungeon.step_stranger: - Look for 'The Stranger' - a mysterious NPC who knows more than they let on
dungeon.step_all_seals: - Collect all 7 Seals to unlock the true ending
dungeon.step_ready: - You are ready. Face the Creator in the deepest depths.
dungeon.awakening_0: The world seems solid and separate. You know only the physical.
dungeon.awakening_1: In quiet moments, the boundaries feel thin...
dungeon.awakening_2: What is a wave but the ocean in motion?
dungeon.awakening_3: When water meets water, which loses its identity?
dungeon.awakening_4: Some souls are older than the bodies they wear.
dungeon.awakening_5: Child of the deep waters, you are beginning to remember.
dungeon.awakening_6: The boundaries blur. Self and other merge at the edges.
dungeon.awakening_7: The wave remembers it is water. Welcome back, Dreamer.
dungeon.no_story_progress: You haven't made progress on any town stories yet.
dungeon.explore_town_hint: Explore town and talk to memorable NPCs to begin their tales.
dungeon.visit_inn_hint: Visit the Inn to meet potential allies.
dungeon.vision_fragment_settles: (A fragment of truth settles into your consciousness...)

dungeon.trap_darts: Poison darts! You take {0} damage and are poisoned!
dungeon.trap_fire: A gout of flame! You take {0} fire damage!
dungeon.trap_acid: Acid sprays your belongings! You lose {0} gold!
dungeon.trap_curse_resist: A dark curse washes over you, but your wisdom shields your mind! (Wisdom: {0})

dungeon.chamber_empty: The chamber is empty. The ancient presence has already been dealt with.
dungeon.ancient_presence_sealed: You sense an ancient presence sealed away in this chamber...
dungeon.prove_yourself_hint: Perhaps you must prove yourself elsewhere before it reveals itself.
dungeon.straggler_appears: A straggler from the upper floors wanders into view...
dungeon.awaken_temple: You awaken at the Temple of Light...
dungeon.boss_phrase_catacombs: The dead do not rest here...
dungeon.boss_phrase_sewers: You shouldn't have come down here...
dungeon.boss_phrase_caverns: These depths are mine to command!
dungeon.boss_phrase_ruins: You disturb powers beyond your comprehension!
dungeon.boss_phrase_demon: Your soul will fuel the inferno!
dungeon.boss_phrase_frozen: The cold will claim you, as it claims all things...
dungeon.boss_phrase_volcanic: Burn in the fires of the deep!
dungeon.boss_phrase_abyssal: The void hungers for your essence...
dungeon.god_intro_maelketh_1: The air grows thick with the scent of ancient battlefields...
dungeon.god_intro_maelketh_2: MAELKETH, THE BROKEN BLADE, rises before you!
dungeon.god_intro_maelketh_4: "Another warrior seeks glory in my domain."
dungeon.god_intro_veloura_1: The scent of dying roses fills the air...
dungeon.god_intro_veloura_2: VELOURA, THE FADING HEART, appears before you!
dungeon.god_intro_veloura_4: "Love is the cruelest wound of all... and the deepest."
dungeon.god_intro_veloura_5: "Will you heal what is broken, or shatter it further?"
dungeon.god_intro_thorgrim_1: The weight of judgment presses upon your soul...
dungeon.god_intro_thorgrim_4: "You stand before the court of eternity. How do you plead?"
dungeon.god_intro_thorgrim_5: "Every soul must answer for what they have done."
dungeon.god_intro_noctura_1: Shadows coalesce, forming shapes that watch...
dungeon.god_intro_noctura_2: NOCTURA, THE SHADOW QUEEN, emerges from darkness!
dungeon.god_intro_noctura_4: "The darkness remembers every secret you have buried."
dungeon.god_intro_noctura_5: "Come... let me show you what hides in your own shadow."
dungeon.god_intro_aurelion_1: A faint light flickers in the darkness, struggling to persist...
dungeon.god_intro_aurelion_2: AURELION, THE DIMMING LIGHT, manifests weakly!
dungeon.god_intro_aurelion_3: The God of Light speaks faintly:
dungeon.god_intro_aurelion_4: "My light fades... but even a dying star can burn."
dungeon.god_intro_aurelion_5: "Will you carry this flame, or let it go out forever?"
dungeon.god_intro_terravok_1: The mountain itself seems to breathe. Stone shifts like flesh...
dungeon.god_intro_terravok_4: "Mountains do not bow. Neither shall I."
dungeon.god_intro_manwe_1: Reality itself trembles. The dream knows it is being watched...
dungeon.god_intro_manwe_2: MANWE, THE CREATOR OF ALL, manifests!
dungeon.god_intro_manwe_3: The Creator speaks in a voice that is all voices:
dungeon.god_retreat_maelketh: You sense the god retreating back into slumber... for now.
dungeon.god_retreat_terravok: The mountain settles. Terravok slumbers on.
dungeon.god_retreat_manwe: The Creator's presence fades, but you feel his gaze upon you still...
dungeon.treasure_party_finds: The party finds {0} gold and {1} XP!

dungeon.first_clear_only: (Completion bonus only awarded on first clear)

dungeon.vanquished_all_foes: You have vanquished all foes on this level!

dungeon.defeat_old_god_first: You must defeat the Old God on this floor before descending deeper.

dungeon.cannot_venture_deeper: You cannot venture deeper than level {0} at your current strength.

dungeon.troubled_rest: Your rest is troubled by dark memories...
dungeon.dream_takes_shape: As you doze, a dream takes shape...
dungeon.break_camp: You break camp, feeling recovered but wary.

dungeon.scroll_ground_trembles: The ground trembles as ancient evil awakens!

dungeon.pray_for_fallen: You say a quiet prayer for the fallen adventurer.
dungeon.whispers_echo: Strange whispers echo through the corridors...
dungeon.encounter_wiser: The encounter leaves you wiser. (+{0} XP)
dungeon.portal_description_1: A shimmering portal hovers before you, crackling with energy.
dungeon.portal_description_2: It pulses with an otherworldly light.
dungeon.portal_whisks_deeper: The portal whisks you deeper into the dungeon!
dungeon.portal_treasure_dimension: You find yourself in a treasure dimension!
dungeon.portal_grab_gold: You grab {0} gold before being pulled back!
dungeon.portal_hostile_dimension: The portal leads to a hostile dimension!
dungeon.portal_guardian_crystal: The guardian drops a rare crystal!
dungeon.portal_study: You study the portal's magical patterns...
dungeon.portal_learn_magic: You learn something about dimensional magic. (+{0} XP)
dungeon.portal_avoid: You wisely avoid the unstable portal. It fades away.
dungeon.duelist_emerges: A warrior emerges from the shadows: {0}
dungeon.duelist_first_1: "Well met, {0}! I am a wandering duelist."
dungeon.duelist_first_2: "They call me {0}. I seek worthy opponents in these depths."
dungeon.duelist_win1_1: {0} kneels before you, offering their blade in salute.
dungeon.duelist_win1_2: "A worthy victory! I shall remember this."
dungeon.duelist_win3_3: "I'll train harder for our next meeting."
dungeon.duelist_win5_1: {0} bows deeply, a gesture of ultimate respect.
dungeon.duelist_win5_2: "You have mastered me. I am honored to be your rival."
dungeon.duelist_loss3_2: "Three losses... but I learn from each one."
dungeon.duelist_insult: You hurl insults at the duelist!
dungeon.duelist_slain: You have slain {0} in dishonorable combat.
dungeon.treasure_chest_discover: You discover an ancient chest hidden in the shadows!
dungeon.chest_opens_treasure: The chest opens to reveal glittering treasure!
dungeon.chest_party_finds: The party finds {0} gold and {1} XP!
dungeon.chest_discover_material: Among the treasure, you discover a {0}!
dungeon.chest_leap_back: You leap back just in time!
dungeon.chest_spikes: Spikes shoot out! You take {0} damage!
dungeon.chest_acid: Acid sprays your coin pouch! You lose {0} gold!
dungeon.chest_mimic: The chest MOVES! It's a MIMIC!
dungeon.chest_leave_alone: You wisely leave the chest alone and continue on.
dungeon.strangers_orcs_desc: A group of orcs emerges from the shadows!
dungeon.strangers_orcs_arms: They are poorly armed with sticks and clubs.
dungeon.strangers_trolls_desc: A band of trolls blocks your path!
dungeon.strangers_rogues_desc: A gang of rogues surrounds you!

dungeon.strangers_choice: (F)ight them, (P)ay them off, or try to (E)scape?

dungeon.strangers_escape_success: You manage to slip away into the shadows!
dungeon.strangers_escape_fail: They catch you trying to escape!
dungeon.strangers_steal_gold: They beat you and steal {0} gold!

dungeon.damsel_choice: (H)elp her, (I)gnore the situation, or (J)oin the ruffians?

dungeon.damsel_ignore_2: Her cries fade as you continue your journey...
dungeon.wounded_find: You find a wounded man lying against the wall.
dungeon.wounded_bleeding: He is bleeding heavily and begs for help.
dungeon.wounded_begs: You find a wounded man lying against the wall.
dungeon.wounded_heal_potion: You use a healing potion on the wounded stranger.
dungeon.wounded_bandage: You try to bandage his wounds with cloth...
dungeon.wounded_helps: It seems to help a little.
dungeon.wounded_dies: Unfortunately, he dies from his wounds.
dungeon.wounded_rob: You search the dying man's belongings...
dungeon.wounded_rob_gold: You find {0} gold in his purse.
dungeon.wounded_leave_1: You step over the dying man and continue on.

dungeon.shrine_offerings: Offerings of gold and bones surround a stone altar.
dungeon.shrine_kneel: You kneel before the ancient shrine...
dungeon.shrine_wisdom: Ancient wisdom flows into you! +{0} EXP!
dungeon.shrine_drains: The shrine drains your life force!
dungeon.shrine_gold_dissolves: Your gold dissolves into the altar!

dungeon.shrine_angry_spirit: An angry spirit emerges from the ruined shrine!
dungeon.shrine_leave: You wisely leave the mysterious shrine alone.

dungeon.trap_fall_damage: You fall into a pit and take {0} damage!
dungeon.trap_poison_darts: Poison darts shoot from the walls!
dungeon.trap_dart_damage_poisoned: You take {0} damage and are poisoned!
dungeon.trap_rune_explodes: A magical rune explodes beneath your feet!
dungeon.trap_net_falls: A net falls from above, trapping you!
dungeon.trap_struggle_free: You struggle free, but lose time...
dungeon.trap_broken_nothing: But nothing happens... the trap is broken.
dungeon.trap_find_gold: You find some gold hidden near the mechanism.
dungeon.ancient_scroll_discover: You discover an ancient scroll tucked into a wall crevice.

inn.desc_dimly_lit: The inn is dimly lit by flickering candles. Rough wooden tables are occupied
inn.desc_bartender: by travelers, merchants, and local toughs. The bartender eyes you suspiciously.
inn.desc_seth_hunched: Seth Able, the notorious drunk fighter, sits hunched over a tankard in
inn.desc_seth_bloodshot: the corner. His bloodshot eyes survey the room, looking for trouble.
inn.teaser_scarred_soldier: In the far corner, a scarred soldier sits alone, nursing a drink.
inn.teaser_seen_fights: He looks like he's seen his share of fights. He doesn't look up.
inn.bbs_desc: Smoky tavern. Ale flows freely. Seth Able eyes you from the corner.
inn.drink_order_ale: You order a tankard of ale from the bartender.
inn.drink_bitter_brew: The bitter brew slides down your throat...
inn.drink_effect_charisma: The ale boosts your confidence! (+2 Charisma temporarily)
inn.drink_effect_strength: You feel slightly dizzy but stronger! (+1 Strength temporarily)
inn.drink_effect_wisdom: The alcohol makes you reckless! (-1 Wisdom temporarily)
inn.drink_effect_hp: You feel relaxed and restored. (+5 HP)
inn.seth_passed_out: Seth Able is passed out under a table. Try again later.
inn.seth_waves_off: Seth Able waves you off dismissively.
inn.seth_enough: Seth Able waves you off dismissively.
inn.seth_come_back: Seth Able waves you off dismissively.
inn.seth_warning: WARNING: Seth Able is a dangerous opponent!
inn.seth_inn_falls_silent: The inn falls silent as you approach Seth Able...
inn.awaken_temple: You awaken at the Temple of Light...
inn.seth_incredible: INCREDIBLE! You have defeated Seth Able!
inn.seth_shocked_silence: The entire inn erupts in shocked silence...
inn.seth_bartender_drops: Even the bartender drops his glass in amazement!
inn.seth_legend: You are now a legend in this tavern!
inn.seth_patrons_cheer: The patrons cheer, but they've seen this before...
inn.seth_knocks_out: Seth Able's powerful blow knocks you unconscious!
inn.seth_massive_headache: You wake up later with a massive headache...
inn.seth_back_away: You manage to back away from Seth Able!
inn.seth_walk_away: 'That's right, walk away!' Seth calls after you.
inn.seth_chuckle_retreat: The other patrons chuckle at your retreat.
inn.seth_fist_connects: Seth Able's massive fist connects with your jaw!
inn.seth_crash_table: You crash into a table and slide to the floor...
inn.seth_patrons_laugh: The patrons laugh as Seth returns to his drink.
inn.patrons_quiet: The inn is quiet tonight. No interesting patrons to talk to.
inn.patrons_following: You see the following patrons here:
inn.what_to_do: What would you like to do?
inn.option_talk_deep: Talk - Have a deep conversation (flirt, confess, romance)
inn.victory_spreads: Word of your victory spreads through the inn!
inn.gossip_lean_back: You lean back and listen to the patrons talking...
inn.rest_quiet_corner: You find a quiet corner and rest for a while...
inn.rest_shadow_fades: The Blessing of Shadows fades as you rest...
inn.rest_recover_hp: You feel refreshed and recover {0} HP.
inn.rest_dark_memories: Your rest is troubled by dark memories...
inn.rest_full_health: You are already at full health.
inn.rest_fatigue_reduced: A brief rest eases your weariness. (Fatigue -{0})
inn.rest_dream_begins: As you doze, a dream takes shape...

dungeon.react_thorgrim_sav_2: "Thorgrim's law is restored. The courts will remember this day."
dungeon.react_aurelion_def_def_2: "The god of light... gone. Who will guide us through the darkness?"
dungeon.react_veloura_def_agg_2: "They killed the goddess of love. What happens to us now?"
dungeon.duelist_winning_3: "But today I am stronger! En garde!"
dungeon.react_maelketh_def_hum_2: "They say you bowed before the god of war... and still won."
dungeon.duelist_winning_1: "Ah, {0}! My rival returns! You've bested me before..."
dungeon.react_thorgrim_def_hon_2: "Justice was served today, by one who understands it."
dungeon.god_intro_manwe_4: You have come at last, my wayward child.
dungeon.duelist_losing_2: "I've defeated you {0} times now. Care to try again?"
dungeon.story_whispers_4: What do you seek in the deep?
dungeon.react_terravok_def_resp_2: "What it cost to break the unbreakable... only the mountain knows."
dungeon.react_thorgrim_def_defy_3: "If they can defy the god of law... what stops them defying ours?"
dungeon.react_maelketh_def_agg_2: "Killed a god of war with pure rage. What does that make them?"
dungeon.story_oracle_7: The Seal of Fate reveals what I could not speak.
dungeon.duelist_winning_2: "The score stands {0} to {1} in your favor."
dungeon.react_maelketh_sav_2: "Maelketh remembers honor. The endless wars can finally end."
dungeon.react_maelketh_other_2: "They faced the god of war and walked away. On their own terms."
dungeon.god_intro_manwe_6: I AM the beginning. And perhaps... the end.
dungeon.react_thorgrim_other_2: "Fair dealings with the god of law. That takes backbone."

inn.bandit.sitting_at_bar: You're sitting at the bar, nursing a drink after a long day.
inn.bandit.bandits_enter: The door crashes open as a group of armed bandits swagger in.
inn.bandit.leader_threat1: "Everyone stay where you are! Hand over your gold,"
inn.bandit.leader_threat2: "or we'll paint these walls with your blood!"
inn.bandit.draw_weapons: The bandits draw their weapons, steel glinting in the firelight.
inn.bandit.patrons_scatter: Patrons scramble for cover, knocking over chairs and mugs.
inn.bandit.stranger_rises: A stranger rises slowly from a corner table.
inn.bandit.tattered_armor: He wears tattered but well-maintained armor,
inn.bandit.battered_shield: and carries a battered shield that has clearly seen many battles.
inn.bandit.aldric_sporting: "Now this doesn't seem very sporting, does it?"
inn.bandit.leader_stay_out: "Stay out of this, old man, unless you want to die!"
inn.bandit.aldric_i_am_trouble: "I AM the trouble you don't want to find."
inn.bandit.stranger_efficiency: The stranger moves with brutal efficiency.
inn.bandit.shield_deflects: His shield deflects the first blade while his sword disarms another.
inn.bandit.strike_sprawling: A single powerful strike sends the third bandit sprawling.
inn.bandit.leader_flees: The bandit leader takes one look and flees into the night.
inn.bandit.wipes_blood: The stranger wipes blood from his shield and turns to you.
inn.bandit.aldric_reputation: "This inn used to have a better reputation."
inn.bandit.aldric_purpose: "I've been looking for someone worth fighting alongside."
inn.bandit.aldric_shield_back: "You look like you could use someone to watch your back."
inn.bandit.aldric_protecting: "And I could use someone worth protecting."
inn.bandit.aldric_find_trouble: "Good. I have a feeling we'll find plenty of trouble together."
inn.bandit.aldric_got_your_back: "But at least now, you've got someone watching your back."
inn.bandit.aldric_tank_hint: (Aldric is a Tank companion - he'll draw enemy attacks and protect you)
inn.bandit.aldric_disappointed: Aldric looks slightly disappointed, but nods.
inn.bandit.aldric_understand: "I understand. Not everyone wants a stranger at their side."
inn.bandit.aldric_change_mind: "But if you change your mind, you'll find me here."
inn.bandit.aldric_recruit_later: (You can recruit Aldric later by visiting the Inn)
main_street.awakening_0: Unawakened - You see only the surface of things
